features.name: Magical Tinkering
features.description:
As an action, I use thieves/artisan's tools to give 1 property to a nonmagical tiny object:
 • Emit light (5-ft radius bright light, equal dim), an odor, or a nonverbal sound
 • Static visual effect on one surface, or emit a 6-second recorded message when tapped
If I instill a property in more objects than I can have active, the oldest loses its property

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast prepared artificer cantrips/spells, using Intelligence as my spellcasting ability
To cast, I must use thieves' or artisan's tools I'm proficient with as a spellcasting focus
I can cast my prepared artificer spells as rituals if they have the ritual tag
Whenever I gain an artificer level, I can swap one artificer cantrip I know for another

extrachoices: Don't change component column on spell sheet

features.name: Infuse Item
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add Artificer Infusions to the third page

features.description:
Choose a specialism and put it in the "Class" field on the first page
Choose either alchemist, artillerist, or battle smith

features.description: [using thieves' or artisan's tools]In 1 hour (during a rest) I can create a set of artisan's tools that last until I do so again

features.description: [expertise with all tools I'm proficient with]

features.name: Flash of Genius
features.description: As a reaction when I or another in 30 ft make a check/save, I can add my Int mod to it

features.name: Magic Item Adept
features.description: It takes me half the normal time and gold to craft common and uncommon magic items

features.name: Spell-Storing Item
features.description:
When I finish a long rest, I can infuse a 1st-/2nd-level artificer spell into an item I touch
It has to be a weapon or spellcasting focus for me; Stored spells are lost if I do this again
The spell must have a casting time of 1 action, but I need not have it prepared
A creature holding an infused item can use an action to cast the spell, using my abilities

features.name: Magic Item Savant
features.description: [ignore class/race/spell/level attune require.]

features.name: Soul of Artifice
features.description:
[+1 on all saves per attuned magic item]
   As a reaction when I'm reduced to 0 HP, I can end one infusion to drop to 1 HP instead

features.name: Artificer Specialist
features.description:
Choose an Artificer Specialism and put it in the "Class" field on the first page
Choose either Alchemist or Gunsmith

features.name: Magic Item Analysis
features.description: I can cast Detect Magic and Identify as rituals without requiring material components

features.description: I have expertise with any tool proficiencies I gain from the artificer class

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast artificer spells that I know, using Intelligence as my spellcasting ability
I can use an arcane focus as a spellcasting focus

features.name: Infuse Magic
features.description:
By spending 1 minute, I can infuse one of my artificer spells into a nonmagical item
This expends a spell slot as normal and the spell must have a casting time of 1 action
An item holds max one spell for 8 hours; I can have up to my Int mod of infused items
A creature holding an infused item can use an action to cast the spell, using my ability
The spell's target is the creature activating it or, with area of effect spells, the item

features.name: Mechanical Servant
features.description:
I create a construct that obeys my orders; It acts on its own initiative
I can repair it to 1 HP during a long rest, or build a new one in a week with 1000 gp
As a reaction when I'm attacked in melee, I can have it make a melee attack back

features.name: Soul of Artifice
features.description: I gain a +1 bonus to all saving throws per magic item I am currently attuned to

features.name: Magical Tinkering
features.description:
As an action, I use thieves' or an artisan's tools to give max 1 property to a tiny object:
 • Emit light (5-ft radius bright light, equal dim light), an odor, or a nonverbal sound
 • Static visual effect on one of its surfaces; picture, 25 words, shapes, or a mix of those
If I instill a property in more objects than I can have active, the oldest loses its property

features.name: Rage
features.description:
As a Bonus Action, I can enter a Rage if I'm not wearing Heavy armor. While I'm in a Rage:
 • I have Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
 • I add bonus damage to my weapon and Unarmed Strike attacks that use Strength.
 • I have Advantage on Strength checks and saves, but can't maintain Concentration.
Rage lasts until the end of my next turn, I don Heavy armor, or I become Incapacitated.
On my turn I can extend its duration for another round by attacking an enemy, forcing an enemy to save, or by using a Bonus Action. I can maintain a Rage for up to 10 minutes.
As a Bonus Action, I can enter a Rage if I'm not wearing Heavy armor. While I'm in a Rage:

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: If not wearing armor, my AC is 10 + Dexterity modifier + Constitution modifier + Shield.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.description:
I gain mastery with a number of Simple/Martial weapons. Whenever I finish a Long Rest,
I can change one of these choices. Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select them.

features.description: As I roll my first attack on my turn, I can decide to attack recklessly. This gives me Adv. on attacks using Strength until my next turn starts, but then attacks against me also gain Adv.

features.name: Primal Knowledge

I gain proficiency in one more Barbarian skill. Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, or Survival.
While Raging, I can use Strength for my Acrobatics, Intimidation, Perception, Stealth, and Survival checks even if they normally use a different ability.

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.description: While Raging, if I drop to 0 HP and don't die, I can make a DC 10 Con save to instead have twice my Barbarian level HP. Each attempt adds +5 DC. DC resets to 10 after a Short Rest.

features.name: Persistent Rage
features.description:
Once per long rest when I roll initiative, I can regain all my expended uses of Rage.
My Rage now only ends early if I choose to end it, fall Unconscious, or don Heavy armor.

features.name: Indomitable Might
features.description: If a Strength check or save is lower than my Strength score, I can use the score instead.

features.name: Primal Champion
features.description: [+4 Str and Con, up to 25]

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.description: As a Bonus Action, I can give a Bardic Inspiration Die (BID) to another creature within 60 ft that can see or hear me. It can't have more than one. Once within the next hour when it fails a D20 Test, the creature can add its BID to the result, potentially causing it to succeed.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast Bard cantrips/spells I know, using Cha as my spellcasting ability. I can use Musical Instruments as Spellcasting Focus for them. I can swap 1 cantrip & spell when I gain a level.

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.description: I can add half my Proficiency Bonus to any skill check that doesn't otherwise use it.

features.name: Bard Subclass
features.description: Choose a Bard Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.description: I can expend a spell slot (SS) to regain a Bardic Inspiration use & regain all on a Short Rest.

features.name: Countercharm
features.description: As a Reaction when I or a creature within 30 ft fails a save against an effect that applies the Charmed or Frightened condition, I can cause the save to be rerolled with Advantage.

features.name: Magical Secrets
features.description: Whenever I choose prepared spells for my Bard spellcasting feature, I can pick from the Bard, Cleric, Druid, and Wizard spell lists, and they count as Bard spells for me.

features.name: Superior Inspiration
features.description: When I roll Initiative and have less than 2 Bardic Inspiration uses, I regain uses until I got 2.

features.name: Words of Creation
features.description:
I always have Power Word Heal and Power Word Kill prepared.
I can target a second creature with these if that creature is within 10 ft of the first target.

features.name: Divine Order
features.description: Select a Divine Order using the "Choose Feature" button above.

addMod.text: I add my Wisdom modifier (minimum +1) to my Intelligence (Arcana) checks.
I add my Wisdom modifier (minimum +1) to my Intelligence (Religion) checks.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast known/prepared Cleric cantrips/spells, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability. I can use a Holy Symbol as a Spellcasting Focus for them. I can swap out 1 cantrip whenever I gain a Cleric level and change all my prepared Cleric spells whenever I finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: I regain one CD use on a Short Rest. Effects use my Cleric spell save DC. See options below.

features.name: Turn Undead

As a Magic action, I can use 1 CD and my Holy Symbol to have each Undead of my choice within 30 ft make a Wis save or be Frightened, Incapacitated, and move away as far as it can on its turn. This lasts for 1 min or until it takes damage, I'm Incapacitated, or I die.

features.name: Cleric Subclass
features.description: Choose a Cleric Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Sear Undead
features.description: [improves Turn Undead to deal damage]

features.name: Blessed Strikes
features.description: Select a Blessed Strikes option using the "Choose Feature" button above.

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.description: As a Magic action, I can cast one Cleric spell of level 5 or lower of my choice that doesn't require a Reaction to cast. I cast it without requiring a spell slot or Material components.

features.name: Improved Blessed Strikes
features.description: Select a Blessed Strikes option using the "Choose Feature" button above.

features.name: Greater Divine Intervention
features.description:
When I use Divine Intervention, I can choose Wish when I select a spell.
If I do so, I can't use Divine Intervention again until I finish 2d4 Long Rests.

features.name: Druidic
features.description: I always have Speak with Animals prepared. I know Druidic. I can leave hidden messages in it. Druidic speakers understand, but others need a DC 15 Investigation check just to spot it.

features.name: Primal Order
features.description: Select a Primal Order using the "Choose Feature" button above.

addMod.text: I add my Wisdom modifier (minimum +1) to my Intelligence (Arcana) checks.
I add my Wisdom modifier (minimum +1) to my Intelligence (Nature) checks.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast known/prepared Druid cantrips/spells, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability. I can use a Druidic Focus as a Spellcasting Focus for them. I can swap out 1 cantrip whenever I gain a Druid level and change all my prepared Druid spells whenever I finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Wild Companion
features.description: As a Magic action, I can expend a spell slot or a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar without Material components. The familiar is Fey and disappears when I finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: (see 3rd page)

features.name: Druid Subclass
features.description: Choose a Druid Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Wild Resurgence
features.description: Once on each of my turns when I'm out of WS uses, I can expend a spell slot to regain one. Once per LR, I can expend a WS use to gain a 1st-level spell slot. Both require no action.

features.name: Elemental Fury
features.description: Select an Elemental Fury option using the "Choose Feature" button above.

features.name: Improved Elemental Fury
features.description: Select an Elemental Fury option using the "Choose Feature" button above.

features.name: Beast Spells
features.description: I can cast spells in Wild Shape, except spells with costly or consumed Material components.

features.name: Archdruid
features.description:
**Evergreen Wild Shape**. When I roll Initiative and have no Wild Shape uses, I regain one.
**Nature Magician**. Once per Long Rest, I can convert Wild Shape uses into a spell slot at a rate of 2 spell levels per expended Wild Shape use. This requires no action.
**Longevity**. For every ten years that pass, my body ages only one.

features.name: Helpful
features.description: I can use a bonus action to take the Help action

features.name: Sidekick
features.description:
Unlike other classes, a sidekick has preset ability scores and skill proficiencies
A sidekick gains 2 HD at 1st level, but doesn't get max HP for its 1st level
If the DM allows it, a race can be selected and have its racial traits applied
A sidekick does not get the benefits of a background, nor can it multiclass

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: I can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action

features.name: Expertise
features.description: I gain expertise with two skills I am proficient with

structuredData.skillstxt: Expertise with any two skill proficiencies

features.name: A Sidekick
features.description:
A sidekick can be any creature with challenge rating of 1/2 or lower
The Spellcaster and Expert classes can only apply to creatures that can speak a language
Fill out the stats block into the character sheet manually, the class adds to it
The sidekick's level is the same as the average level of the group
The hit dice of a sidekick are the same as those of the base creature, gaining +1 per level
A sidekick does not get the benefits of a background, nor can it take feats or multiclass

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description:
I gain proficiency with light armor and in five skills of my choice
If the base creature is a Humanoid or has a simple or martial weapon in its stat block,
select it using the "Choose Feature" button above, so I gain more bonus proficiencies

choices: Base creature is a Humanoid or has a simple or martial weapon in its stat block

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies: Saving Throws
features.description: Choose Dex, Int, or Cha save proficiency, using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Helpful
features.description: I can use a bonus action to take the Help action

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: I can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action

features.name: Expertise
features.description:
I gain expertise with two skills I am proficient with
At level 15th, I gain expertise with two more skills I am proficient with

structuredData.skillstxt: Expertise with any two skill proficiencies, two more at level 15th

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description:
Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1, up to a maximum of 20
I gain this at 4th level and again at 8th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level

features.name: Coordinated Strike
features.description:
I can use Helpful to aid an ally to attack a creature up to 30 ft away from me
If I do so, I add +2d6 damage on my next attack to that creature in the current turn

features.name: Evasion
features.description:
If an effect allows me to make a Dex save for half damage, I take no damage on a success
Also, I only take half damage on a failed save; I can't do this while incapacitated

features.name: Inspiring Help
features.description:
When I use the Help action, the creature that receives the help adds +1d6 to its d20 roll
If it was an attack roll that hits without the +1d6, it can add it to the damage instead
At 20th level, this bonus increases to 2d6

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.description: If I make an ability check where I add my proficiency bonus, rolls of 9 or lower are 10

features.name: Sharp Mind
features.description: Choose Int, Wis, or Cha save proficiency, using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description:
Choose a Fighting Style Feat using the "Choose Feature" button above.
I can swap this fighting style for another whenever I gain a Fighter level.

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: As a bonus action, I regain 1d10 + my Fighter level HP.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.description:
I gain mastery with a number of Simple/Martial weapons. Whenever I finish a Long Rest,
I can change one of these choices. Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select them.

features.name: Tactical Mind
features.description: If I fail an ability check, I can expend a Second Wind to add 1d10. If still fail, not expended.

features.name: Fighter Subclass
features.description: Choose a Fighter Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Tactical Shift
features.description: When I use Second Wind, I can move half my speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

features.name: Indomitable
features.description: I can reroll a failed saving throw and add my Fighter level, but must keep the new result.

features.name: Studied Attacks
features.description: If I miss an attack, I have Adv. on next attack vs. same creature before my next turn ends.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.description:
Monk weapons: Unarmed Strike, Simple Melee weapons, and Light Martial Melee weapons.
When wielding only Monk weapons and no armor or shield, I can use Dex instead of Str, use my Martial Arts die instead of the weapon's, and do an Unarmed Strike as a Bonus Action.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.description: Without armor and no shield, my AC is 10 + Dexterity modifier + Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.description: My speed increases while I'm not wearing armor or wielding a shield.

features.name: Uncanny Metabolism
features.description: When I roll initiative, I can regain all Focus Points and heal 1 Martial Arts die + Monk level.

features.name: Deflect Attacks

features.name: Monk Subclass
features.description: Choose a Monk Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Slow Fall
features.description: As a Reaction when I fall, I can reduce the damage I take from it by 5× my Monk level.

features.name: Empowered Strikes
features.description: I can deal Force damage with my Unarmed Strike instead of its normal damage type.

features.name: Evasion
features.description:
[if not Incapacitated]
When I make a Dex save to halve damage, I instead take none if I succeed and half if I fail.

features.name: Acrobatic Movement
features.description: If without armor or shield, I can move on vertical surfaces or across liquids during my turn.

features.name: Heightened Focus
features.description: [improves Focus Features]

features.name: Self-Restoration
features.description: At the end of each of my turns, I can remove the Charmed, Frightened, or Poisoned condition from myself. Forgoing food and drink doesn't give me levels of Exhaustion.

features.name: Deflect Energy
features.description: [improves Deflect Attacks: any damage type]

features.name: Perfect Focus
features.description: When I roll Initiative and I have less than 4 Focus Points, I regain them until I have 4.

features.name: Body and Mind
features.description: [+4 Dexterity and +4 Wisdom, up to max 25]

features.name: Mystic Order
features.description: Choose a Mystic Order that shapes the nature of your rage and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Psi Points
features.description: I use psi points to fuel my psionic disciplines, up to my psi limit per instance

features.name: Psionics
features.description: I can use psionic talents/disciplines that I know, using Intelligence as my psionic ability

features.name: Psychic Focus
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can choose one of my psionic disciplines and gain its focus benefit
I can only focus on one at a time; It stays until I focus on another, or I'm incapacitated

features.name: Mystical Recovery
features.description: As a bonus action after using psi points on a discipline, I can regain HP per point spent

features.name: Telepathy
features.description: I can telepathically speak to creatures I can see within 120 ft, if they know a language

features.name: Strength of Mind
features.description: After a short rest, I can change my Wisdom save proficiency to another ability score

features.name: Potent Psionics
features.description:
Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage
In addition, I add my Intelligence modifier to my psionic talent damage rolls

features.name: Consumptive Power
features.description:
Once per long rest, I can use my HP to fuel a psionic discipline instead of psi points
I lose the HP; My HP max is reduced with the same until I finish my next long rest

features.name: Psionic Mastery
features.description:
As an action, I can gain a pool of special psi points that last until I finish a long rest
I can use these, without psi limit, for disciplines that require an action or bonus action
I can use either these or psi points from my normal pool for a discipline, but not both
I can concentrate on all disciplines that use these special points at the same time
I lose concentration if I cast a discipline requiring concentration from my normal pool

features.name: Psionic Body
features.description:
I no longer age and I have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage
I'm immune to disease, poison damage, and the poisoned condition
If I die, I have a 55% chance of discorporating instead and returning 1d3 days later

I can also expend 5 HP from the pool to remove the Poisoned condition from the creature.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast prepared Paladin spells, using Cha as spellcasting ability. I can use a Holy Symbol as Spellcasting Focus for them. I can change 1 prepared spell whenever I finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.description: I gain mastery with two weapons and can change them whenever I finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Fighting Style

features.name: Paladin's Smite
features.description: I always have Divine Smite prepared. Once per Long Rest I can cast it without  a spell slot.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: I regain one CD use on a Short Rest. Effects use my Paladin spell save DC. See options below.

features.name: Divine Sense
features.description: As a Bonus Action, I can use 1 CD to detect, for 10 min or until Incapacitated, the location and type of Celestials, Fiends, Undead, and consecrated or desecrated places and objects.

features.name: Paladin Subclass
features.description: Choose a Paladin Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Faithful Steed
features.description: I always have Find Steed prepared. Once per Long Rest I can cast it without a spell slot.

features.name: Ambuscade
features.description:
When I roll initiative, I gain a special turn before others can act
During this bonus turn, I can only use the Attack or Hide action
I can't be surprised, but if I would be surprised I don't get the bonus turn

features.name: Skirmisher's Stealth
features.description:
At the start of my turn, I can choose a creature I'm hidden from
During that turn, I remain hidden from it, regardless of my actions
As a bonus action at the end of my turn, I can use the Hide action

features.name: Ranger Path
features.description:
Choose a Ranger Path you wish to follow and put it in the "Class" field
Choose Guardian, Seeker, or Stalker

features.name: Relentless Hunter
features.description: Taking damage can't break my concentration on Hunter's Mark.

features.name: Nature's Veil
features.description: As a Bonus Action, I can make myself Invisible until the end of my next turn.

features.name: Precise Hunter
features.description: [Hunter's Mark gives me Advantage on attacks]

features.name: Feral Senses
features.description: [I gain Blindsight 30 ft]

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.description: [Hunter's Mark damage die is now d10]

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description:
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select a favored enemy
Choose from beasts, fey, humanoids, monstrosities, or undead
I get a bonus to damage rolls with weapon attacks against the chosen favored enemy
I have adv. on Wis (Survival) to track and Int checks to recall info about them
I also learn one language of my choice, typically one associated with the favored enemy

features.name: Natural Explorer
features.description:
On my first turn in combat, I have adv. on attacks against those that did not yet act
I ignore difficult terrain; I have adv. on Initiative; I have benefits in travel, see page 3

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a Fighting Style Feat or Druidic Warrior using the "Choose Feature" button above.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast ranger spells that I know, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability

features.name: Primeval Awareness
features.description:
If I haven't attacked a beast within the last 10 min, I can communicate with it
As an action, I convey simple ideas, and read mood, intent, emotions, needs, etc.
By concentrating for 1 min, I know if any of my favored enemies are within 5 miles
Per group, I sense the number, general direction, distance, and type of favored enemy

features.name: Ranger Conclave
features.description:
Choose a Ranger Conclave you strive to emulate and put it in the "Class" field
Choose either Beast Conclave, Deep Stalker Conclave or Hunter Conclave

features.name: Greater Favored Enemy
features.description:
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select a greater favored enemy
Choose from aberrations, celestials, constructs, dragons, elementals, fiends, or giants
I get all the bonuses from Favored Enemy for this creature type as well
Additionally, I have adv. on saves vs. spells and abilities of this greater favored enemy

features.name: Fleet of Foot
features.description: I can take the Dash action as a bonus action

features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
features.description:
When I hide on my turn without moving, others take -10 Wis (Perception) to find me
This lasts until something reveals my presence, or until I (voluntarily) move/fall prone

features.name: Vanish
features.description: I can't be nonmagically tracked if I don't want to be and can Hide as a bonus action

features.name: Feral Senses
features.description:
When not blinded or deafened, I'm aware of invisible, non-hidden creatures in 30 ft
I don't have disadvantage when attacking creatures I am aware of but can't see

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.description: Once per turn, I can add Wis mod to the attack or damage roll after I see the die roll

features.description:
[with 2 skills I'm proficient with]

structuredData.skillstxt: Expertise with any two skill proficiencies, and two more at 6th level.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.description: Once per turn, I can deal extra damage with a Finesse or Ranged weapon attack if I have Adv. or if a non-Incapacitated ally is within 5 ft of the target and I don't have Disadv.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.description: I know Thieves' Cant so I can convey messages inconspicuously, and one other language.

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.description: I gain mastery with two weapons and can change them whenever I finish a Long Rest.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.description: As a Bonus Action on my turn, I can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

features.name: Rogue Subclass
features.description: Choose a Rogue Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Steady Aim
features.description: As a Bonus Action if I don't move during my turn, I can give myself Advantage on my next attack roll this turn. After I use this, my Speed becomes 0 until the end of the current turn.

features.name: Cunning Strike
features.description: When I deal Sneak Attack damage, I can add a Cunning Strike effect by forgoing a number of Sneak Attack damage dice. The effect occurs immediately after the damage is dealt.

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.description: As a Reaction, I can halve the damage of an attack roll from an attacker that I can see.

features.name: Evasion
features.description:
[if not Incapacitated]
When I make a Dex save to halve damage, I instead take none if I succeed and half if I fail.

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.description: I treat a roll of 9 or lower as a 10 for ability checks I make using a skill or tool proficiency.

features.name: Devious Strikes
features.description: [more Cunning Strike options]

features.name: Slippery Mind
features.description: [Wisdom and Charisma save proficiency]

features.name: Elusive
features.description: No attack roll can have Advantage against me unless I'm Incapacitated.

features.name: Stroke of Luck
features.description: If I fail a D20 Test, I can turn the roll into a 20.

features.name: Rune Lore
features.description:
I learn the basics of scribing runes, and can activate all properties of a master rune
The first rune I master is the one I found to qualify to become a rune scribe
To use any features of a master rune, I need to first attune to it just like a magic item
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add master runes to the third page

features.name: Runic Magic
features.description: I obtain spell slots as if gaining a level in a full spellcasting class, but don't learn spells

features.name: Runic Discovery
features.description:
I know a number of master runes which I can attune to, even if not in my possession
Attuning or de-attuning in this manner can be done over the course of a short rest

features.name: Living Rune
features.description:
I get 2 points that I can add to one or two of my ability scores as I see fit
When I finish a long rest, I can re-allocate these point(s) from a single score to another

features.name: Rune Mastery
features.description: One rune I'm attuned to doesn't count toward the limit of magic items I can attune to

features.name: Innate Sorcery
features.description:

 • The spell save DC of my Sorcerer spells increases by 1.
 • I have Advantage on spell attack rolls of my Sorcerer spells.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast Sorcerer cantrips/spells I know, using Cha as spellcasting ability. I can use Arcane Focus as Spellcasting Focus for them. I can swap 1 cantrip and 1 spell when I gain a level.

features.name: Font of Magic

 **1st‒level = 2 SP**

action: Font of Magic (SP to spell slot)

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: I can use Metamagic options I know to modify spells I cast. I can only use one Metamagic option on a spell unless noted otherwise. Whenever I gain a Sorcerer level, I can replace a Metamagic option with another. Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select them.

features.name: Sorcerer Subclass
features.description: Choose a Sorcerer Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
features.description: When I finish a Short Rest, I can regain expended Sorcery Points equal to half my level.

features.name: Sorcery Incarnate
features.description: [improves Innate Sorcery]

features.name: Arcane Apotheosis
features.description: [improves Innate Sorcery]

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: I always have Hunter's Mark prepared. I can cast it without a spell slot several times per LR.

features.name: Combat Maneuvers
features.description:
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add a Maneuver to the third page
I can use a Maneuver by expending a superiority die (only one Maneuver per attack)

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description:
I gain a number of superiority dice that I can use to fuel special Maneuvers
I regain all superiority dice after a short rest

features.name: Fighting Style
features.description: Choose a Fighting Style Feat or Druidic Warrior using the "Choose Feature" button above.

features.name: Poultices
features.description:
In 1 hour, I can create a number of poultices equal to my Wisdom modifier (min 1)
The number of poultices I can have with me can't exceed my Wisdom modifier (min 1)
I can applying a poultice in 1 minute, healing a creature; Poultices last for 24 hours

features.name: Primeval Awareness
features.description:
As an action, I can focus my awareness for 1 min, once per short rest
Out to 1 mile (6 in favored terrain), I sense if certain types of creatures are present
These types are: aberration, celestial, dragon, elemental, fey, fiend, and undead

features.name: Ranger Archetype
features.description:
Choose a Ranger Archetype you strive to emulate and put it in the "Class" field
Choose either Spell-less Beast Master or Spell-less Hunter

features.name: Natural Antivenom
features.description:
I have advantage on saves vs. poison and resistance to poison damage
When I use a poultice, in addition to healing, I cure one poison effect on the creature

features.name: Call Natural Allies
features.description:
While in an area that is my Favored Terrain, I can call on beasts within 1 mile to help
The DM determines the beasts: 1×CR 2, 2×CR 1, 4×CR 1/2, or 8×CR 1/4
They will fight alongside me, are friendly to me and my allies, and help up to 1 hour
After I use these feature, I can't use it in the same general area again for 24 hours

features.name: Relentless
features.description: I regain one superiority die if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Feral Senses
features.description: [I gain Blindsight 30 ft]

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.description: [Hunter's Mark damage die is now d10]

features.name: Magical Role
features.description: Choose the magical role of the sidekick, mage or healer, and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Sidekick
features.description:
Unlike other classes, a sidekick has preset ability scores and skill proficiencies
A sidekick gains 2 HD at 1st level, but doesn't get max HP for its 1st level
If the DM allows it, a race can be selected and have its racial traits applied
A sidekick does not get the benefits of a background, nor can it take feats or multiclass

features.name: Potent Cantrips
features.description: I add my spellcasting ability modifier to the damage I deal with any cantrip

features.name: A Sidekick
features.description:
A sidekick can be any creature with challenge rating of 1/2 or lower
The Spellcaster and Expert classes can only apply to creatures that can speak a language
Fill out the stats block into the character sheet manually, the class adds to it
The sidekick's level is the same as the average level of the group
The hit dice of a sidekick are the same as those of the base creature, gaining +1 per level
A sidekick does not get the benefits of a background, nor can it take feats or multiclass

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description:
I gain proficiency with light armor and two skills of my choice from the following list:
Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, Performance, Persuasion, and Religion
If the base creature is a Humanoid or has a simple or martial weapon in its stat block,
select it using the "Choose Feature" button above, so I gain more bonus proficiencies

choices: Base creature is a Humanoid or has a simple or martial weapon in its stat block

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies: Saving Throws
features.description: Choose Int, Wis, or Cha save proficiency, using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Spellcaster's Role
features.description: Choose the role of the sidekick, mage, healer, or prodigy, and put it in the "Class" field

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description:
Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1, up to a maximum of 20
I gain this at 4th level and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 18th level

features.name: Potent Cantrips
features.description: I add my spellcasting ability modifier to the damage I deal with any cantrip

features.name: Empowered Spells
features.description:
Select one of the eight schools of magic using the "Choose Feature" button above
Whenever I cast a spell from the selected school by expending a spell slot, I empower it
I add my spellcasting ability modifier to the damage or healing I roll for that spell

features.name: Focused Casting
features.description: Taking damage can't break my concentration on a spell

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: Select invocations using the "Choose Feature" button above. Whenever I gain a Warlock level, I can replace one invocation with another, if it isn't a prerequisite for any invocations I have.

extrachoices: Eldritch Smite (req: lvl 5+, Pact of the Blade)
Lifedrinker (req: lvl 12+, Pact of the Blade)
Thirsting Blade (req: lvl 5+, Pact of the Blade)
Investment of the Chain Master (req: lvl 5+, Pact of the Chain)
Gift of the Protectors (req: lvl 9+, Pact of the Tome)

features.name: Pact Magic
features.description: I can cast Warlock cantrips/spells I know, using Cha as spellcasting ability. I can use Arcane Focus as Spellcasting Focus for them. I can swap 1 cantrip and 1 spell when I gain a level.

features.name: Magical Cunning
features.description:
I can perform a 1 min esoteric rite to regain half my max number of Pact Magic spells slots.
I can perform a 1 min esoteric rite to regain half my max number of Pact Magic spells slots.

features.name: Warlock Subclass
features.description: Choose a Warlock Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Contact Patron
features.description: I always have Contact Other Plane prepared. Once per Long Rest, I can cast it without expending a spell slot and then automatically succeed on its saving throw.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum
features.description: I can choose one Warlock spell for each level above. I can cast each of these once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. Whenever I gain a Warlock level, I can change one pick.

features.name: Eldritch Master
features.description: [regain all slots with Magical Cunning]

features.name: Martial Role
features.description: Choose a Martial Role for the warrior using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Sidekick
features.description:
Unlike other classes, a sidekick has preset ability scores and skill proficiencies
A sidekick gains 2 HD at 1st level, but doesn't get max HP for its 1st level
If the DM allows it, a race can be selected and have its racial traits applied
A sidekick does not get the benefits of a background, nor can it take feats or multiclass

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: As a bonus action, I regain 1d10 + warrior level HP; I can use this once per short rest

features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: I score a critical hit with my weapon attacks on a roll of 19 and 20

features.name: A Sidekick
features.description:
A sidekick can be any creature with challenge rating of 1/2 or lower
Fill out the stats block into the character sheet manually, the class adds to it
The sidekick's level is the same as the average level of the group
The hit dice of a sidekick are the same as those of the base creature, gaining +1 per level
A sidekick does not get the benefits of a background, nor can it take feats or multiclass

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description:
I gain proficiency with all armor and two skills of my choice from the following list:
Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, and Survival
If the base creature is a Humanoid or has a simple or martial weapon in its stat block,
select it using the "Choose Feature" button above, so I gain more bonus proficiencies

choices: Base creature is a Humanoid or has a simple or martial weapon in its stat block

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies: Saving Throws
features.description: Choose Str, Dex, or Con save proficiency, using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Martial Role
features.description: Choose a Martial Role for the warrior using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Second Wind
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can regain hit points equal to 1d10 + warrior level
I can use this once per short rest (twice at 20th-level)

features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: I score a critical hit with my weapon attacks on a roll of 19 and 20

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description:
Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1, up to a maximum of 20
I gain this at 4th level and again at 8th, 12th, 14th, 16th, and 19th level

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description:
I can attack twice, instead of once, whenever I take the Attack action on my turn
This increases to three at 15th level
If I have the Multiattack action, I can use either that or extra attack on a turn, not both

additional: 1 attacks as an action on my turn

features.name: Battle Readiness
features.description: I have advantage on my Initiative rolls

features.name: Improved Defense
features.description: I gain a +1 bonus to AC

features.name: Indomitable
features.description:
I can reroll a failed saving throw, but must keep the new result
I can use this once per long rest (twice at 20th-level)

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: When I finish a Short Rest, I can recover half my level in spell slot levels (max level 5 slots).

features.name: Ritual Adept
features.description: I can cast any Ritual spell as a Ritual directly from my spellbook without having it prepared.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast Wizard cantrips/spells, using Intelligence as my spellcasting ability. I can use an Arcane Focus as a Spellcasting Focus for them. Whenever I finish a Long Rest, I can change 1 cantrip to another Wizard cantrip and all my prepared spells to spells in my spellbook. Whenever I gain a Wizard level, I add two spells for which I have spell slots to my spellbook.

features.name: Scholar
features.description: I gain Expertise in one of these skills in which I have proficiency: Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, or Religion. Use the "Choose Feature" button to select it.

structuredData.skillstxt: I gain Expertise in one skill: Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, or Religion.

features.name: Wizard Subclass
features.description: Choose a Wizard Subclass using the "Class" button/bookmark or type its name into the "Class" field.

features.name: Memorize Spell
features.description: When I finish a Short Rest, I can change one prepared Wizard spell to another in my book.

features.name: Spell Mastery
features.description: I pick a level 1 and a level 2 spell in my spellbook with a casting time of an action. I always have them prepared and can cast them at their lowest level without using a spell slot. Whenever I finish a Long Rest, I can replace 1 pick with another eligible spell.

features.name: Signature Spells
features.description: I pick two 3rd-level spells from my spellbook. I always have these spells prepared and I can cast each once per Short Rest without expending a spell slot.

features.name: Psionic Spells
features.description:
I learn additional spells, which do not count towards the number of spell I can know
Whenever I gain a sorcerer level, I can replace one of these with another of the same level
It must be a divination or enchantment spell on the sorcerer, wizard, or warlock spell list

features.name: Telepathic Speech
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can telepathic link myself with a creature within 30 ft that I can see
If we share a language, we can talk telepathically while in my Cha mod of miles (min 1)
This last for my level in minutes, until I'm incapacitated, I die, or I use this feature again

features.name: Psionic Sorcery
features.description:
I can expend sorcery points instead of a spell slot to cast a spell from my Psionic Spells
This costs the spell's level in sorcery points, but in doing so requires no other components
However, I do need to provide a material components if it is consumed by the spell

features.name: Psychic Defenses
features.description: I gain resistance to psychic damage and adv. on saves vs. being charmed or frightened

features.name: Revelation in Flesh
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can expend 1 or more sorcery points to transform for 10 minutes
For each sorcery point used, I gain one of the following benefits of my choice:
 • I can see any invisible creatures within 60 ft of me not behind total cover
 • I gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed and I can hover
 • I gain a swimming speed equal to twice my walking speed & I can breathe underwater
 • I can move, with equipment, through any space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing
   Also, I can spend 5 ft of movement to escape form a grapple or nonmagical restraints

features.name: Warping Implosion
features.description:
As an action, I can teleport to an unoccupied space I can see within 120 ft
All within 30 ft of where I left take 3d10 force damage and must make a Strength save
If failed, each is pulled towards the space I left, ending up in the nearest empty space
If successful, a creature takes only half damage and isn't pulled
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending 5 sorcery points (5 SP)

features.name: Invasive Thoughts
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can telepathic link myself with a creature within 30 ft that I can see
This lasts for 10 minutes, until I'm incapacitated or die, or I use this ability again
I can telepathically talk with the target; It can speak back if it understands a language

features.name: Psionic Spells
features.description: I learn additional spells, which do not count towards the number of spell I can know

features.name: Warped Being
features.description: My aberrant origin gives me an AC of 13 + my Dex mod when I am not wearing armor

features.name: Psionic Sorcery
features.description:
I can expend sorcery points instead of a spell slot to cast a spell from my Psionic Spells
This costs the spell's level in sorcery points, but the spell requires no other components

features.name: Psychic Defenses
features.description: I gain resistance to psychic damage and adv. on saves vs. being charmed or frightened

features.name: Revelation in Flesh
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can expend 1 or more sorcery points to transform for 1 minute
For each sorcery point used, I gain one of the following benefits of my choice:
• I gain a swimming speed equal to my walking speed and the ability to breathe water
• I gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed and I can hover
• I can move, with equipment, through any space as narrow as 1 inch without squeezing
  I can spend 5 ft of movement to escape form a grapple or from nonmagical restraints
• I am aware of the location of any hidden/invisible creatures within 60 ft of me

features.name: Warp Reality
features.description:
As an action, I can radiate a 20-ft radius aura of difficult terrain for 1 minute
Creatures that start their turn within the aura take 2d10 psychic damage
When creating it, I can choose any creatures I can see to be unaffected by this aura
As a bonus action, I can end this aura to teleport myself and others away
I teleport myself and any creature in the aura to a location I can see within 1 mile
An unwilling creature can succeed on a Charisma saving throw to avoid being teleported

features.name: Experimental Elixir
features.description:
When I finish a long rest I can produce a number of elixirs in empty flasks I touch
Also, as an action, I can expend a spell slot to create one elixir in a touched empty flask
I need alchemist supplies on my person to do this; An elixir lasts until my next long rest
For their effects, see the experimental elixir table on a Notes page; They work like potions

features.name: Tools Proficiency
features.description: [proficient with alchemist's supplies]

features.name: Alchemical Savant
features.description:
When I cast spells using alchemist's supplies as my spellcasting focus, I can enhance them
I add my Int mod to one roll of acid, fire, necrotic, or poison damage, or restoring HP

features.name: Restorative Reagents
features.description:
Drinking my experimental elixirs now also grants 2d6 + my Int mod in temp HP (min 1)
I can cast Lesser Restoration with alchemist's supplies without a spell slot (Int mod times)

features.name: Chemical Mastery
features.description:
I have resistance to acid and poison damage and immunity to being poisoned
I can cast Greater Restoration and Heal each once per long rest without a spell slot
I need alchemist's supplies as a focus for it, but the spells require no material components

features.name: Alchemist's Satchel
features.description:
I craft an Alchemist's Satchel, a magic item with which I can create concoctions
Whenever I reach in, it holds the material for the Alchemical Formula I want to use
If lost, I craft another by spending 8 hours a day for 3 days and 100 gp of materials

features.name: Alchemy Formulae
features.description:
I learn Alchemical Formulae that I can use if I have my Alchemist's Satchel within reach
I learn the Alchemical Acid and Fire formulae, and additional depending on my level
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select additional Alchemical Formulae

features.name: Formula: Alchemical Acid
features.description:
As an action, I can hurl a vial of acid at a creature or object within 30 ft
It shatters on impact and the target must succeed on a Dex save or take acid damage
An object automatically fails its saving throw and takes maximum damage

features.name: Formula: Alchemical Fire
features.description:
As an action, I can hurl a vial of volatile liquid at a creature/object/surface within 30 ft
It explodes and all within a 5-ft radius must succeed on a Dex save or take fire damage

features.name: Alchemical Homunculus
features.description:
When I end a long rest, I can use alchemist's supplies to create an alchemical homunculus
I determine its appearance; I can have only 1 at a time, making a new one kills the older
It obeys my commands, is friendly to my allies and I, and acts on my initiative, after me
Unless I use a bonus action to command it, it only takes the Dodge action on its turn
It can only do acidic spittle, alchemical salve, or take the Dash, Disengage, or Help action
Its HP maximum is equal to five times my artificer level + my Intelligence modifier
If it dies, I can, as an action within the hour, spend a spell slot to restore it to its full HP

features.name: Tools of the Trade
features.description: I can craft magical potions for half the usual gold and in a quarter of the usual time

features.name: Alchemical Mastery
features.description:
I can enhance the spell I cast when I use alchemist's supplies as my spellcasting focus
I then add my Int mod to one die roll for dealing acid or poison damage, or restoring HP

features.name: Alchemical Mastery: Lesser Restoration
features.description: I can cast Lesser Restoration without a spell slot if I use alchemist's supplies as a focus

features.name: Chemical Savant
features.description:
I always have resistance to acid and poison damage and immunity to being poisoned
Once per long rest, I can cast Greater Restoration without a spell slot or material comp.
To do so, I have to use alchemist's supplies as my spellcasting focus

features.name: Alchemical Homunculus
features.description:
When I end a long rest, I can use alchemist's supplies to create an alchemical homunculus
I determine its appearance; I can have only 1 at a time, making a new one kills the older
It obeys my commands, is friendly to my allies and I, and acts on my initiative, after me
Unless I use a bonus action to command it, it only takes the Dodge action on its turn
It can only do acidic spittle, alchemical salve, or take the Dash, Disengage, or Help action
Its HP maximum is equal to five times my artificer level + my Intelligence modifier
If it dies, I can, as an action within the hour, spend a spell slot to restore it to its full HP

features.name: Tools of the Trade
features.description: I can craft magical potions for half the usual gold and in a quarter of the usual time

features.name: Alchemical Mastery
features.description:
I can enhance the spell I cast when I use alchemist's supplies as my spellcasting focus
I then add my Int mod to one die roll for dealing acid or poison damage, or restoring HP

features.name: Alchemical Mastery: Lesser Restoration
features.description: I can cast Lesser Restoration without a spell slot if I use alchemist's supplies as a focus

features.name: Chemical Savant
features.description:
I always have resistance to acid and poison damage and immunity to being poisoned
Once per long rest, I can cast Greater Restoration without a spell slot or material comp.
To do so, I have to use alchemist's supplies as my spellcasting focus

features.name: Arcane Initiate
features.description: I gain proficiency with Arcana and two wizard cantrips that count as cleric cantrips

features.name: Channel Divinity: Arcane Abjuration
features.description:
As an action, one celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend within 30 ft must make a Wis save
If it fails and is able to see/hear me, it is turned for 1 min or until it takes damage
Turned: move away, never within 30 ft of me, no reactions or actions other than Dash
Turned: may Dodge instead of Dash when nowhere to move and unable to escape bonds
If its CR is low enough and it is not on its home plane, it is banished for 1 min instead
Banished: sent to home plane, reappearing where it was if the effect ends before 1 min

features.name: Spell Breaker
features.description:
When I restore HP to an ally with a 1st-level or higher spell, I can also end one spell
The chosen spell on the ally ends if it is equal or lower level to the spell slot level used

features.name: Potent Spellcasting
features.description: I add my Wisdom modifier to the damage I deal with my cleric cantrips

features.name: Arcane Mastery
features.description:
I add four wizards spells, a 6th, 7th, 8th, and 9th-level spell, to my domain spells
As any domain spell, these spells are automatically prepared and count as cleric spells

features.name: Arcane Archer's Lore
features.description:
I gain proficiency with either the Arcana or Nature skill
I also learn either the Prestidigitation or the Druidcraft cantrip

structuredData.skillstxt: Arcana or Nature

features.name: Arcane Shot
features.description:
I can unleash magical effects when I fire an arrow from a short- or longbow
I can use this once per turn as part of the Attack action, after an attack hits
I know a number of Arcane Shot Options and learn additional at certain levels
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add Arcane Shots Options to the third page

features.name: Curving Shot
features.description:
Once per turn when I miss with a magic arrow, I can use a bonus action to redirect it
I reroll the attack against a different target within 60 ft of the original target

features.name: Magic Arrow
features.description: Whenever I fire a nonmagical arrow from a short- or longbow, I can make it magical

features.name: Ever-Ready Shot
features.description: I regain one use of Arcane Shot if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Arcane Arrow
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can create one magical arrow that I can fire with a bow
A shot with the arrow counts as magical and does additional force damage on a hit
When I create the arrow, I can apply one of my known Arcane Shots on it
This arrow lasts until the end of my turn or until I hit or miss a target with it

features.name: Arcane Shot
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add Arcane Shots to the third page

features.name: Archer's Lore
features.description:
I gain proficiency with two skills
I can choose from: Arcana, Athletics, Nature, Perception, Stealth, or Survival

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose two from Arcana, Athletics, Nature, Perception, Stealth, and Survival

features.name: Conjure Arrows
features.description:
As an action, I can create up to 20 nonmagical arrows that remain for 10 minutes
The arrows vanish if I use this feature again with 10 minutes

features.name: Ever-Ready Arrow
features.description: I regain one use of Arcane Arrow one minute after I expend my last remaining use of it

features.name: Arcane Archer's Lore
features.description: I gain proficiency with either the Arcana or Nature skill

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one from: Arcana or Nature

features.name: Arcane Shot
features.description:
I can unleash magical effects when I fire a magic arrow from a short- or longbow
I can use this once per turn as part of the Attack action, after an attack hits
I know a number of Arcane Shot Options and learn additional at certain levels
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add Arcane Shots Options to the third page

features.name: Magic Arrow
features.description:
Whenever I fire a nonmagical arrow from a short- or longbow I can make it magical
This magical arrow gives a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls for the one attack

features.name: Curving Shot
features.description:
When I miss with a magic arrow, I can use a bonus action to redirect the attack
I reroll the attack against a different target within 60 ft of the original target

features.name: Ever-Ready Shot
features.description: I regain one use of Arcane Shot if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Mage Hand Legerdemain
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can direct my Mage Hand
With a Dex (Sleight of Hand) vs. Wis (Perception) checks, I can do so discreetly
I can make it invisible and perform the following tasks:
 • Stow/retrieve an object the hand is holding in a container worn/carried by another
 • Use thieves' tools to pick locks and disarm traps at range

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast known wizard cantrips/spells, using Intelligence as my spellcasting ability

features.name: Magical Ambush
features.description: When I cast a spell while hidden, the target(s) have disadvantage against that spell

features.name: Versatile Trickster
features.description: As a bonus action, gain adv. on attacks this turn on creature within 5 ft of Mage Hand

features.name: Spell Thief
features.description:
As a reaction, after a spell is cast at me, I can try to negate and steal it
The caster makes a save against my spell DC with his/her spellcasting ability
On failure, the caster forgets how to cast that spell for eight hours
If I have a spell slot of a high enough level for it, I learn how to cast it during this time

features.name: Artificial Mind
features.description:
When I end a long rest, I can use calligrapher's supplies on a tiny nonmagical object
It gain a magical keen mind; I can have only 1 at a time, creating more kills the older
See 3rd page for the telepathic advisor and manifest mind features of this magic item
As an action, I can use its information overload: a target in 5 ft must make an Int save
If fail, it takes psychic damage & the 1st attack vs. it before my next turn ends has adv.
If this deals damage, I can expend a spell slot to add damage of 1d8 + 1d8 per slot level

features.name: Tools of the Trade
features.description:
I gain proficiency with calligrapher's supplies and the forgery kit
I can craft magical scrolls for half the usual gold and in a quarter of the usual time

features.name: Mind Network
features.description:
I add my Int mod to artificer spells that deal psychic damage and information overload
With my artificial mind, I communicate telepathically with anyone carrying my infusions

features.name: Pure Information
features.description:
When I use a spell slot to boost information overload, its target must make another save
On a failed Intelligence saving throw it is stunned until the end of my next turn
As an action while my artificial mind is on my person, I can teleport (infoportation)
I teleport to an unoccupied space nearest to the spectral mind or an item infused by me
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a 2nd-level or higher spell slot (SS 2+)

features.name: Eldritch Cannon
features.description:
As an action, I can use woodcarver's or smith's tools to create an eldritch cannon in 5 ft
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a spell slot (SS 1+) to create one cannon
I decide its size (Small/Tiny), appearance, type: flamethrower, force ballista, or protector
It disappears after 1 hour, when reduced to 0 HP, or if I dismiss it as an action
As a bonus action when within 60 ft of it, I can activate it to move and do its action
I can't have multiple cannons; Select "Eldritch Cannon" on a companion page for its stats

features.name: Tools Proficiency
features.description: [proficient with woodcarver's tools]

features.name: Arcane Firearm
features.description:
[lasts until I use this feature again]After a long rest, I can use woodcarver's tools to enhance a wand, staff, or rod
If I use this as my spellcasting focus for an artificer spell, I add +1d8 to one damage

features.name: Explosive Cannon
features.description: My eldritch cannons deal +1d8 damage; As an action, I can detonate a cannon in 60 ft

features.name: Fortified Position
features.description:
[cannons grant half cover in 10 ft to allies]I can now have two cannons at the same time and activate both with one bonus action
I can create 2 eldritch cannons with the same action (still only one with a spell slot)

features.name: Arcane Turret
features.description:
As an action, I can use smith's tools to summon a Medium turret within 5 ft of me
I can do so a number of times per long rest for free, or by spending a spell slot
If I create more turrets than I can have active, the oldest one disappears
When I summon one, I decide what type it is: flamethrower, force ballista, or defender
It disappears after 10 minutes, when reduced to 0 HP, or if I dismiss it as an action
When within 60 ft of it, I can activate it as a bonus action, or detonate it as an action
See the companion page for how the different types of turrets operate

features.name: Tools of the Trade
features.description:
I can use rods, wands, and staffs as a spellcasting focus
I can craft magical wands for half the usual gold and in a quarter of the usual time

features.name: Wand Prototype
features.description:
When I finish a long rest, I can use woodcarver's tools to turn a wand into a magic item
I can only infuse a nonmagical wooden wand and it lasts until I finish my next long rest
I infuse it with an artificer cantrip, even one I don't know, with a 1 action casting time
As an action, I can use the wand to cast the cantrip, using my spellcasting ability
I also add my Intelligence modifier (min 1) to any damage rolls for that cantrip

features.name: Fortified Position
features.description: My allies and I have half cover while within 10 ft of an arcane turret I created

features.name: Arcane Turret
features.description:
As an action, I can use smith's tools to summon a Medium turret within 5 ft of me
I can do so a number of times per long rest for free, or by spending a spell slot
If I create more turrets than I can have active, the oldest one disappears
When I summon one, I decide what type it is: flamethrower, force ballista, or defender
It disappears after 10 minutes, when reduced to 0 HP, or if I dismiss it as an action
When within 60 ft of it, I can activate it as a bonus action, or detonate it as an action
See the companion page for how the different types of turrets operate

I also add my Intelligence modifier (min 1) to any damage rolls for that cantrip

features.name: Fortified Position
features.description: My allies and I have half cover while within 10 ft of an arcane turret I created

features.name: Assassinate
features.description:
I have adv. on attack rolls against creatures that have not taken a turn in combat yet
Any hit I score against a creature that is surprised is a critical hit

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I am proficient with disguise kits and poisoner's kits

features.name: Infiltration Expertise
features.description: I can create false identities in 7 days for 25 gp

features.name: Imposter
features.description:
After 3 hours of studying a person, I can mimic speech, writing, and behavior
I have advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks to maintain this ruse

features.name: Death Strike
features.description: When I hit a surprised creature, it must make a Con save or take double damage

structuredData.additional: Save DC: 8 + Dex mod + Proficiency bonus

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description: I gain a number of Superiority Dice (SD) that I can use to fuel special Maneuvers.

features.name: Maneuvers
features.description:
I can expend one Superiority Die to do a Maneuver I know, but only one per attack.
The save DC for my Maneuvers is 8 + my Prof. Bonus + my Str or Dex modifier (my choice).

features.name: Student of War
features.description: I gain proficiency with one type of Artisan's Tools and in one skill from the Fighter list. Use the "Choose Feature" button to select a skill.

features.name: Know Your Enemy
features.description: As a Bonus Action, I can learn the Immunities, Resistances, and Vulnerabilities of a creature I can see within 30 ft. I can do this once per Long Rest or by expending a Superiority Die.

features.name: Relentless
features.description: Once per turn when I do a Maneuver, I can use a d8 instead of expending a Superiority Die.

features.name: Battle Ready & Tool Proficiency
features.description:
I gain proficiency with martial weapons and smith's tools
I can use my Intelligence modifier instead of Strength or Dexterity for magic weapons

features.name: Steel Defender
features.description:
When I end a long rest, I can use smith's tools to create a steel defender
I determine its appearance; It obeys my commands and it acts on my initiative, after me
Unless I use a bonus action to command it, it only takes the Dodge action on its turn
It can take reactions and move on its turn even if I don't command it
I can't have multiple at once; Select "Steel Defender" on a companion page for its stats

features.name: Arcane Jolt
features.description:
Once per turn when my steel defender or magic weapon hits a target, I can have it:
 • Deal an extra +2d6 force damage to the target
 • Restore 2d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit
Once per turn when my steel defender or magic weapon hits a target, I can have it:
 • Deal an extra +2d6 force damage to the target
 • Restore 2d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

 • Restore 2d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

 • Restore 2d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

 • Restore 2d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

 • Deal an extra +2d6 force damage to the target
 • Restore 2d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit
Once per turn when my steel defender or magic weapon hits a target, I can have it:
 • Deal an extra +4d6 force damage to the target
 • Restore 4d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit
Once per turn when my steel defender or magic weapon hits a target, I can have it:
 • Deal an extra +4d6 force damage to the target
 • Restore 4d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit
Once per turn when my steel defender or magic weapon hits a target, I can have it:
 • Deal an extra +4d6 force damage to the target
 • Restore 4d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

 • Restore 4d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

 • Restore 4d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

 • Restore 4d6 HP to another target within 30 ft of the one that was hit

features.name: Improved Defender
features.description:
My defender's Deflect Attack now deals its attacker 1d4 + my Int mod force damage
My arcane jolt damage/healing increases to 4d6; My steel defender gains +2 AC

features.name: Iron Defender
features.description:
When I end a long rest, I can use smith's tools to create an iron defender
I determine its appearance; I can have only 1 at a time, making a new one kills the older
It obeys my commands, is friendly to my allies and I, and acts on my initiative, after me
Unless I use a bonus action to command it, it only takes reactions and the Dodge action
If commanded to, it can only take an action to bite, repair, Dash, Disengage, or Help
Its HP maximum is equal to five times my artificer level + my Int Mod + its Con mod

features.name: Tools of the Trade & Battle Ready
features.description:
I gain proficiency with leatherworker's tools, smith's tools, and martial weapons
I can craft magical armor for half the usual gold and in a quarter of the usual time
I can use my Intelligence modifier instead of Strength or Dexterity for magic weapons

features.name: Arcane Jolt
features.description:
The bite attack of my iron defender is considered magical
I can channel energy through the defender's bite attack and my magic weapon attacks
Once per turn when such an attack hits, I can have it do extra force damage or heal
If I choose to heal, I restore HP to a creature that I can see within 30 ft of the target

features.name: Improved Defender
features.description:
My iron defender's defensive pounce now also deals 1d4 + my Int mod in force damage
The damage and healing from arcane jolt increases from 2d4 to 4d4

features.name: Animal Companion
features.description: I call an animal by spending 8 hours and 50 gp; I can revive it with 8 hours and 25 gp

features.name: Companion's Bond
features.description: My companion gains several benefits, see the Companion's sheet

features.name: Coordinated Attack
features.description: If I take the Attack action, my companion can use its reaction to make a melee attack

features.name: Beast's Defense
features.description: While my companion can see me, it has advantage on all saving throws

features.name: Storm of Claws and Fangs
features.description: My companion can, as an action, make melee attacks vs. all creatures within 5 ft of it

features.name: Superior Beast's Defense
features.description: My companion can, as a reaction, halve an attack's damage from attacker that it sees

features.name: Ranger's Companion
features.description:
It adds my proficiency bonus to AC, attacks, damage, and save/skill proficiencies
Its hit point maximum equals four times my ranger level if higher than its normal HP
It takes a turn on my initiative; It takes the Dodge action unless I command it otherwise
As an action, I can have it take the Attack, Dash, Disengage, or Help action on its turn
I can still use Extra Attack while commanding it to Attack; No action to order to move

features.name: Exceptional Training
features.description:
My beast's attacks count as magical for overcoming resistances and immunities
As a bonus action, I can command it to take the Dash/Disengage/Help action on its turn

features.name: Bestial Fury
features.description: When I command my beast to use the Attack action, it can attack twice on its turn

features.name: Share Spells
features.description: When I cast a spell on myself, I can have it also affect my beast if it is within 30 ft

features.name: Ranger's Companion
features.description:
It adds my proficiency bonus to AC, attacks, damage, and save/skill proficiencies
Its hit point maximum equals four times my ranger level if higher than its normal HP
It takes a turn on my initiative; It takes the Dodge action unless I command it otherwise
As an action, I can have it take the Attack, Dash, Disengage, or Help action on its turn
I can still use Extra Attack while commanding it to Attack; No action to order to move

features.name: Exceptional Training
features.description:
My beast's attacks count as magical for overcoming resistances and immunities
As a bonus action, I can command it to take the Dash/Disengage/Help action on its turn

features.name: Bestial Fury
features.description: When I command my beast to use the Attack action, it can attack twice on its turn

features.name: Beastly Coordination
features.description: My companion can, as a reaction, halve an attack's damage from an attacker that I see

features.name: Brute Force
features.description: I do additional damage with weapons that I'm proficient with

features.name: Brutish Durability
features.description:
I add +1d6 to all my saving throws, including death saves
If the total of a death save is 20 or more, it counts as rolling a 20

features.name: Devastating Critical
features.description: Whenever I score a critical hit with a weapon, I add my fighter level to the damage

features.name: Survivor
features.description:
If I have less than half my max HP at the start of my turn, I heal myself
I regain HP equal to 5 + Constitution modifier (min 1); This doesn't work if I'm at 0 HP

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description:
I gain proficiency with Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion
Alternatively, I learn one language; Use the "Choose Feature" button above for this

choices: Skill proficiency: Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

skill-proficiency-animal-handling-histor.skillstxt: Choose one from: Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

features.name: Born in the Saddle
features.description:
I have advantage on saves to avoid falling off my mount, and land on my feet if I fail
Mounting or dismounting a creature costs me only 5 ft of movement instead of half

features.name: Unwavering Mark
features.description:
If I hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, I mark it until the end of my next turn
While it is within 5 ft of me, a marked target has disadv. on attacks not directed at me
If it damages anybody but me, I can make a special melee attack vs. it in my next turn
This takes a bonus action, but has adv. and adds half my fighter level to the damage
A mark ends early if I'm incapacitated, die, or somebody else marks the target

features.name: Warding Maneuver
features.description:
As a reaction when I or a creature within 5 ft is hit, I can try to fend off the strike
I add 1d8 to the target's AC; If the attack still hits, the target has resistance against it
I can only do this while wielding a melee weapon or a shield

features.name: Hold the Line
features.description:
Creatures provoke opportunity attacks when moving 5 ft or more while within my reach
If I hit an opportunity attack, the target's speed is reduced to 0 until the end of the turn

features.name: Ferocious Charger
features.description:
If I hit a creature after moving 10 ft in a straight line, it must make a Strength save
If failed, the target is knocked prone; I can do this only once per turn

features.name: Vigilant Defender
features.description:
I can make opportunity attacks without using my reaction
I can do this only once on every creature's turn, except on my own turn
I can't do this on the same turn that I use my normal reaction

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description:
I gain proficiency with two skills or one skill and any one tool
For skills I can choose from Animal Handling, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

1-skill-and-1-tool-proficiencies.skillstxt: Choose one from: Animal Handling, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

2-skill-proficiencies.skillstxt: Choose two from: Animal Handling, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

features.name: Born in the Saddle
features.description:
I have advantage on saves to avoid falling off my mount, and land on my feet if I fail
Mounting or dismounting a creature costs me only 5 ft of movement instead of half

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description:
I gain a number of superiority dice that I can use to fuel special maneuvers (see below)
I can use only one maneuver per attack; I regain all superiority dice after a short rest
• Use after rolling to influence/control an animal; I add the superiority die to the roll
• Use after rolling to hit; I add the superiority die to my attack roll
• Use on a mount, before rolling to hit with a lance; I add the die to the damage roll
   Also, the target must make a Str save (DC 8 + Prof + Str mod) or be knocked prone
• As a reaction when I'm hit or my mount is hit, I add the superiority die to AC
   If the attack still hits, I or my mount only take half damage from it

features.name: Ferocious Charger
features.description:
I can use two superiority dice, instead of just one, to increase the damage of my lance
If doing so, the target has disadvantage on its Str save to avoid being knocked prone

features.name: Improved Combat Superiority
features.description: My superiority dice turn into d10s at 10th level and into d12s at 18th level

features.name: Relentless
features.description: I regain one superiority die if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description:
I gain proficiency with Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion
Alternatively, I learn one language of my choice
