features.name: Adjust Density
features.description:
As an action, I can magically double or halve the weight of a creature I can see in 30 ft
If doubled, it has -10 ft speed and advantage on Strength checks and Strength saves
If halved, it has +10 ft speed, can jump twice as far, and disadv. on Str checks and saves
This lasts for 1 minute or until my concentration ends (like concentrating on a spell)

features.name: Gravity Well
features.description:
Whenever I cast a spell on a creature, I can move it 5 ft to an empty space of my choice
This only works if the target is willing, fails its save vs. the spell, or the spell attack hits it

features.name: Violent Attraction
features.description:
As a reaction when I or a creature I see in 60 ft hits a weapon attack, I can improve it
I increase the weapon's velocity, causing it to deal an extra 1d10 damage
As a reaction if a creature within 60 ft is damaged by a fall, I can increase it by 2d10

features.name: Event Horizon
features.description:
As an action, I can magically emit powerful gravitational magic that pulls on hostiles
Whenever a creature hostile to me starts it turn within 30 ft, it must make Str save
If failed, it takes 2d10 force damage and its speed is 0 until the start of its next turn
If successful, it takes half the damage and every foot it moves this turn costs 2 extra feet
This lasts for 1 minute or until my concentration ends (like concentrating on a spell)
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a 3rd-level or higher spell slot (SS 3+)

features.name: Brown Bear Spirit Companion
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have my brown bear spirit animal materialize or dismiss it
It has all the stats of a brown bear and adds my Wis mod to its attacks and saves
Its HP is half my ranger level or the total in its stat block, whichever is higher
It takes it turn right after my initiative and is under my complete control

features.name: Guardian's Shroud
features.description: When I call my spirit animal, I grant me or an ally I can see 2d6 + Wis mod temp HP

features.name: Arcane Magazine
features.description:
I craft a leather bag that holds my tools, ammunition, and materials for the weapon
I can use it to produce 40 rounds of ammo after a long rest or 10 after a short rest
If lost, I can create a new one as part of a long rest with 25 gp of materials

features.name: Master Smith
features.description: I gain proficiency with smith's tools and I learn the mending cantrip

features.name: Thunder Cannon
features.description:
I craft a magical firearm, my thunder cannon, with which I am proficient
If lost, I craft another by spending 8 hours a day for 3 days and 100 gp of materials

features.name: Thunder Monger
features.description: As an action, I can make an attack with my thunder cannon that does extra damage

features.name: Blast Wave
features.description:
As an action, I can make a special attack with my thunder cannon in a 15-ft cone
Creatures in the area must make a Str save or take damage and pushed back 10 ft

features.name: Piercing Round
features.description:
As an action, I can make a special attack with my thunder cannon in a 30-ft line
Creatures in the 5-ft wide line must make a Dex save or take damage

features.name: Explosive Round
features.description:
As an action, I can make a special exploding attack with my thunder cannon
A 30-ft radius sphere somewhere within range of the thunder cannon is affected
Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw or take 4d8 fire damage

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast cleric cantrips/spells I know, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability

I can cast cleric and druid cantrips/spells I know, using Wisdom as my spellcasting ability
I can use a holy symbol or druidic focus as a spellcasting focus for my spells
Whenever I gain a level, I can replace one cantrip/spell I know with another I'm allowed

In addition, the first time I hit it this turn, it takes an extra 1d6 force damage

I also sense to which plane the portal leads to; I can't sense details if obscured by magic

I gain one of the following features and can change my pick whenever I finish a Short Rest.
 ☐ **Colossus Slayer**. Once per turn when I hit a creature with a weapon, I can have the weapon deal it +1d8 damage if it's not at full HP.
 ☐ **Horde Breaker**. Once per turn when I attack with a weapon, I can make an extra attack with it against another within range and 5 ft of the first, that I didn't attack this turn.

features.name: Defensive Tactics
features.description:
I gain one of the following features and can change my pick whenever I finish a Short Rest.
 ☐ **Escape the Horde**. Opportunity Attacks have Disadvantage against me.
 ☐ **Multiattack Defense**. When a creature hits me with an attack, it has Disadvantage on further attacks against me this turn.

features.description: Once per turn when I deal damage to a creature marked by my Hunter's Mark, I can also deal the spell's extra damage to a different creature that I can see within 30 ft of the first.

features.name: Eye for Detail
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can do either of the following:
• Make a Wisdom (Perception) check to spot a hidden creature or object
• Make an Intelligence (Investigation) check to uncover or decipher clues

features.name: Insightful Fighting
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can decipher the tactics of another I can see that's not incapacitated
I have to make a Wisdom (Insight) check vs. the target's Charisma (Deception) check
If I succeed, I can use my sneak attack on it even if I don't have adv. (but not if disadv.)
This benefit lasts for 1 minute or until I successfully use Insightful Fighting again

features.name: Steady Eye
features.description:
I'm more perceptive when I don't move more than half my speed in the same turn
If so, I gain adv. on Wis (Perception) and Int (Investigation) checks during that turn

features.name: Unerring Eye
features.description:
As an action, I can sense magical deceptions within 30 feet of me, but not what it does
I learn the presence of illusions, shapechanged creatures, or magic designed to deceive

features.name: Eye for Weakness
features.description: While my Insightful Fighting is active, I add 3d6 to sneak attacks against that target

features.name: Ear for Deceit
features.description:
When using Wis (Insight) to sense if someone is lying, I can choose to use a fixed total
This total is 8 + Wis modifier + proficiency bonus (if proficient, or twice if expertise)

features.name: Eye for Detail
features.description:
I can use the bonus action granted by Cunning Action for the following as well:
• To make a Wisdom (Perception) check to spot a hidden creature or object
• To make an Intelligence (Investigation) check to uncover and decipher clues
• To use Insightful Fighting (see below)

features.name: Insightful Fighting
features.description:
As an action or bonus action, I can decipher the tactics of an active opponent I can see
I have to make a Wisdom (Insight) check vs. the target's Charisma (Deception) check
If I succeed, I can use sneak attack on the target regardless of advantage/disadvantage
This benefit lasts for 1 minute or until I successfully use Insightful Fighting again

features.name: Steady Eye
features.description: If not moving during my turn, I gain adv. on Wis (Perception) to find hidden things

features.name: Unerring Eye
features.description:

I learn the presence of illusions, shapechanged creatures, or magic designed to deceive

features.name: Eye for Weakness
features.description: While my Insightful Fighting is active, I add 2d6 to sneak attacks against that target

features.name: Born in the Saddle
features.description:
Mounting or dismounting a creature costs me only 5 ft of movement
I have advantage on saving throws made to avoid falling off my mount
If I fall off my mount for less than 10 ft while not incapacitated, I land on my feet

features.name: Implacable Mark
features.description:
If I hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, I mark it until the end of my next turn
A marked target has disadv. on any attacks vs. those that didn't mark it
I can attack the target I marked if it is within 5 ft of me and does one of the following:
• It moves at least 1 foot on its turn
• It makes an attack that it suffers disadv. on from being marked
This attack uses my reaction, has adv., and adds my fighter level as extra damage
I can still do this if I already used my reaction this round, but not this turn

features.name: Noble Cavalry
features.description:
I gain proficiency with two skills or one language
I can choose the skills from: Animal Handling, History, Insight, Persuasion, and Religion

choices: 2 Skill proficiencies: Animal Handling, History, Insight, Persuasion, or Religion

2-skill-proficiencies-animal-handling-hi.skillstxt: Choose two from: Animal Handling, History, Insight, Persuasion, or Religion

features.name: Hold the Line
features.description:
As a reaction when a creature within 5 ft of me moves at least 1 ft, I can attack it
This attack is made with a melee weapon attack and deals extra damage on a hit
If this hits, the attack reduces the target's speed to 0 until the end of this turn

features.name: Rapid Strike
features.description:
If I have adv. on an attack, I can forgo it to make an extra attack as a bonus action
This attack has to be with the same weapon against the same target

features.name: Defender's Blade
features.description:
I can do opportunity attacks if I already used my reaction this round, but not this turn
I gain a +1 bonus to AC when I'm wearing heavy armor

extraAC.text: I gain a +1 bonus to AC while I'm wearing heavy armor.

features.name: Blessings of Knowledge
features.description:
I learn two languages and gain proficiency and expertise with two skills
I can choose from the following: Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose two from Arcana, History, Nature, and Religion. You also gain expertise with these skills

features.name: Channel Divinity: Knowledge of Ages
features.description: As an action, I gain proficiency with a chosen skill or tool for 10 minutes

features.name: Channel Divinity: Read Thoughts
features.description:
As an action, one creature within 60 ft I can see must make a Wisdom save
If it fails, I can read its surface thoughts for 1 min, as long as it's within 60 ft of me
As an action, I can end this and cast Suggestion on it (it fails its save automatically)
If it succeeded on its save, I can't use this feature again on it until I finish a long rest

features.name: Potent Spellcasting
features.description: I add my Wisdom modifier to the damage I deal with my cleric cantrips

features.name: Visions of the Past
features.description:
I can see recent events of an object or area by concentrating and praying for 1 min
I can meditate this way for up to a number of minutes equal to my Wisdom score
• Object Reading (after meditating for 1 minute per owner):
   If an owner owned it in the last Wis score in days, I learn how that owner got/lost it
   I also learn the most recent significant event involving the object and the owner
• Area Reading (my immediate surroundings, up to a 50-foot cube):
   Going back my Wisdom score in days, per minute I meditate, I learn about one event
   This starts with the most recent event; It can be significant or just important to me

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with heavy armor

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.description:
Whenever a 1st-level or higher spell I cast restores HP to a creature, it heals more
The creature regains an additional 2 + spell level (SL) worth of hit points
Note that "X/SL" on the spell page means per spell slot level above the spell's normal level

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.description:
As an action, I can heal any creature within 30 ft of me up to half their maximum HP
I divide the number of hit points among the creatures as I see fit

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.description: When I restore HP to another with a spell, I regain 2 + the spell (slot) level in HP

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Supreme Healing
features.description: When I restore HP with a spell, I heal the maximum amount instead of rolling the dice

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.description: When a spell I cast with a spell slot restores HP, it restores extra 2 + slot level HP that turn.

features.name: Preserve Life
features.description: As a Magic action, I can expend a use 1 CD to heal Bloodied creatures within 30 ft (me included) up to half their HP maximum. I divide the HP among them as I see fit.

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.description: After I cast a spell with a spell slot that restores HP to another, I regain 2 + slot level HP.

features.name: Supreme Healing
features.description: When I restore HP with a spell or Channel Divinity, I don't roll dice but use their maximum.

features.name: Bonus Cantrip
features.description: I learn the Light cantrip if I didn't already know it

features.name: Warding Flare
features.description:
When a creature within 30 ft attacks me and I can see it, I can interpose divine light
As a reaction, I impose disadv. on the attacker's attack roll (unless it can't be blinded)

features.name: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn
features.description:
As an action, in 30 ft, magical darkness is dispelled and hostiles must make a Con save
Each takes radiant damage, saves for half, and negates with total cover

features.name: Improved Flare
features.description: I can also use my Warding Flare if another is attacked by a creature within 30 ft of me

features.name: Potent Spellcasting
features.description: I add my Wisdom modifier to the damage I deal with my cleric cantrips

features.name: Corona of Light
features.description:
As an action, I have an aura of 60 ft sunlight and 30 ft dim light for 1 min
Enemies in the sunlight have disadv. on saves vs. spells that deal fire or radiant damage

features.name: Lore Master
features.description:
I can use my Intelligence modifier for initiative instead of my Dexterity modifier
I get expertise with each Arcana, History, Nature, and Religion, if I'm proficient with it

addMod.text: I use my Intelligence modifier for initiative rolls instead of Dexterity.

features.name: Spell Secrets: Elements
features.description:
I can change the damage type of spells I cast using spell slots (so not cantrips)
I can swap out acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, radiant, or thunder damage

features.name: Spell Secrets: Saves
features.description: I can change the saving throw ability score to another for a spell I cast using a spell slot

features.name: Alchemical Casting
features.description:
When I cast a spell with a spell slot, I can expend one additional spell slot to augment it
 - 1st-level slot: one damage roll of the spell adds +2d10 force damage
 - 2nd-level slot: if the range of the spell is at least 30 ft, it becomes 1 mile
 - 3rd-level slot: the spell's save DC increases by 2

features.name: Prodigious Memory
features.description: As a bonus action, I can replace one of my prepared spells with another from my book

features.name: Master of Magic
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can call to mind one spell of my choice from any class' spell list
This spell must be of a level I have spell slots for and that I don't already have prepared
I can then cast it using the normal spellcasting rules, including expending a spell slot
It counts a wizard spell; I can only cast the spell during the same turn I call it to mind

features.name: Lunar Embodiment
features.description:
When I finish a long rest, I can choose a lunar phase: Full, New, or Crescent Moon
I can cast the spells of the chosen lunar phase each once per long rest without a spell slot
○ Full: Faerie Fire
● New: Dissonant Whispers
◖ Crescent: Sanctuary

● New: Dissonant Whispers, Darkness
◖ Crescent: Sanctuary, Blindness/deafness

features.name: Moon Fire
features.description: I know the Sacred Flame cantrip and can use it on 2 creatures within 5 ft of each other

features.name: Lunar Boons
features.description:
Each lunar phase is additionally associated with spells of the following schools of magic:
○ Full: Abjur & Conj		● New: Evoc & Necro	       ◖ Crescent: Div & Trans
I can reduce the sorcery point needed for Metamagic of spells of my current phase by 1

features.name: Waxing and Waning
features.description: As a bonus action, I can spend 1 sorcery point to change my lunar phase

features.name: Lunar Empowerment
features.description:
[passive benefits for current phase]○ Full: I shed bright light in a 10-ft radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft
        Myself and creatures I choose inside this bright light have advantage on saves
● New: Adv. on Stealth checks; If I'm in dim light or darkness, attacks have disadv. vs me
◖ Crescent: I have resistance to Necrotic and Radiant damage

features.name: Lunar Phenomenon
features.description:
As a bonus action, or as part of changing phase, I can use a power of the (new) phase:
○ Full: Chosen creatures within 30 ft of me must make a Constitution save or be blinded
   This lasts until their next turn ends; I also heal one creature within 30 ft for 3d8 HP
● New: Chosen creatures within 30 ft of me must make a Dexterity save
   If failed, they take 3d10 Necrotic damage and have 0 speed until their next turn ends
   Also, I become invisible until the end of my next turn, or until I attack or cast a spell
◖ Crescent: I can magically teleport to an unoccupied space I can see within 60 ft
   I gain resistance to all damage until the start of my next turn
I can use each phase's bonus action 1/LR, or by spending 5 sorcery points to use it again

structuredData.additional: per phase: 1× per long rest or 5 SP

◖ Crescent: I have resistance to Necrotic and Radiant damage

● New: Chosen creatures within 30 ft of me must make a Dexterity save

  Also, I become invisible until the end of my next turn, or until I attack or cast a spell
◖ Crescent: I can magically teleport to an unoccupied space I can see within 60 ft

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: I can cast wizard cantrips/spells I know, using Intelligence as my spellcasting ability

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast wizard cantrips/spells I know, using Intelligence as my spellcasting ability
I can use an arcane focus as a spellcasting focus for my spells
Whenever I gain a level, I can replace one cantrip/spell I know with another I'm allowed

features.name: Master of Intrigue
features.description:
I gain proficiency with disguise kits, forgery kits, one gaming set, and two languages
I can mimic speech patterns and accents if I've heard them for at least 1 minute

features.name: Master of Tactics
features.description:
I can use the Help action as a bonus action
This even works if the ally attacks a target within 30 ft of me that can see or hear me

features.name: Insightful Manipulator
features.description:
By spending 1 minute observing/interacting outside of combat I can learn capabilities
The DM tells me if the target is my equal, superior, or inferior in regard to two things:
 - Intelligence score    - Wisdom score    - Charisma score    - Class levels (if any)

features.name: Misdirection
features.description:
As a reaction, I can redirect an attack meant for me to a creature within 5 ft of me
This only works if the creature is providing me with cover against the attack

features.name: Soul of Deceit
features.description:
My thoughts can't be read by telepathy or similar means; I can project false thoughts
For that, I must pass a Cha (Deception) vs. Wis (Insight) check to fool the mind reader
Magic always determines I'm truthful; I can't be magically compelled to tell the truth

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description:
I gain proficiency with two skills or one skill and any one tool
For skills I can choose Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Nature, or Perception

1-skill-and-1-tool-proficiencies.skillstxt: Choose one from: Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Nature, or Perception

2-skill-proficiencies.skillstxt: Choose two from: Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Nature, and Perception

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description:
I gain a number of superiority dice that I can use to fuel special maneuvers (see below)
I can use only one maneuver per attack; I regain all superiority dice after a short rest
• Use after rolling to hit; I add the superiority die to my attack roll
• Use after damaging a creature; I add the superiority die to the damage roll
   Also, the attack imposes disadvantage on any concentration save resulting from it
• Use after Int/Wis/Cha save, before knowing success/fail; add the die to the save total
• Use with Wis (Perception) to detect hidden or Wis (Insight) to see if lying to me
   After rolling but before knowing if success/fail; I add the superiority die to the check

features.name: Hunter's Mysticism
features.description:
I can cast Detect Magic as a ritual and Protection from Evil & Good once per long rest
I gain the ability to speak one of the following languages: Abyssal, Celestial, or Infernal

features.name: Monster Slayer
features.description:
Whenever I use a superiority die, I can choose to expend two, adding both to the roll
If the target is an aberration, fey, fiend, or undead, both dice deal maximum damage

features.name: Improved Combat Superiority
features.description: My superiority dice turn into d10s at 10th level and into d12s at 18th level

features.name: Relentless
features.description: I regain one superiority die if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Hunter's Sense
features.description:
As an action, I learn vulnerabilities/immunities/resistances of a target I see within 60 ft
If it is protected from divination magic, I sense it has none of these

features.name: Monster Slayer Magic
features.description: I get bonus spells known, which do not count against the number of spells I can know

features.name: Slayer's Prey
features.description:
As a bonus action, I designate a creature I see within 60 ft; This lasts until I do this again
My first hit to the target with a weapon attack on each of my turns does +1d6 damage

features.name: Supernatural Defense
features.description:
I add 1d6 to saving throws the current target of my Slayer's Prey forces me to make
In addition, I also add 1d6 to checks to escape that target's grapple

features.name: Magic-User's Nemesis
features.description:
As a reaction when I see someone within 60 ft casting a spell or teleporting, I can foil it
The target must make a Wisdom save or have its spell or teleport fail and be wasted

features.name: Slayer's Counter
features.description:
As a reaction when the target of my Slayer's Prey has me make a save, I can attack it
I can make one weapon attack; If this hits, I automatically succeed on the saving throw

features.name: Slayer's Eye
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can study a creature within 120 ft that I can see
I learn its vulnerabilities, immunities, resistances, and the effects damaging it can have
My first weapon hit on it each turn does +1d6 damage, until I study another or rest

features.name: Slayer's Mysticism
features.description: I get bonus spells known, which do not count against the number of spells I can know

features.name: Supernatural Defense
features.description: I add 1d6 to saves I make against abilities of the current target of my Slayer's Eye

features.name: Relentless Slayer
features.description:
As a reaction, I can stop the target of my Slayer's Eye from escaping, if within 30 ft
If I win a contested Wis check, it wastes it action to teleport/transform/plane shift

features.name: Slayer's Counter
features.description:
As a reaction when the target of my Slayer's Eye has me make a save, I can attack it
I can make one weapon attack; If this hits, I automatically succeed on the saving throw

features.name: Acolyte of Nature
features.description: I learn a druid cantrip and proficiency with a skill: Animal Handling, Nature, Survival

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one from Animal Handling, Nature, or Survival

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with heavy armor

features.name: Channel Divinity: Charm Animals and Plants
features.description:
As an action, all beasts and plants within 30 ft that I can see must make a Wis save
If failed, each is charmed and friendly to allies and me for 1 min or until damaged

features.name: Dampen Elements
features.description:
As a reaction, if an ally in 30 ft or I takes acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder damage,
I can grant resistance against that instance of damage

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Master of Nature
features.description: As a bonus action, I can command creatures that are charmed by my Channel Divinity

features.name: Channel Divinity: Conquering Presence
features.description:
As an action, all creatures of my choice within a 30-ft radius must make a Wisdom save
If failed, a target is frightened for 1 minute; It can save again at the end of each turn

features.name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike
features.description: When I make an attack roll, I can add a +10 bonus to the roll after seeing the d20 roll

features.name: Aura of Conquest
features.description:
Creatures that are frightened of me have their speed reduced to 0 while in my aura
They also take psychic damage whenever they start theirs turn within my aura

features.name: Scornful Rebuke
features.description:
Whenever I'm hit with an attack while I'm not incapacitated, the attacker takes damage
This is psychic damage equal to my Charisma modifier (minimum of 1)

features.name: Invincible Conqueror
features.description:
As an action, I can gain the following benefits for 1 minute:
 - I have resistance to all damage
 - I can make an additional attack as part of my Attack action
 - My melee weapons score critical hits on a roll of 19 or 20

features.name: Channel Divinity: Conquering Strike
features.description:
I can use my channel divinity to break a foe's will that I hit with my melee weapon
The target must make a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute
The target can repeat this save at the end of each or its turn to end the effect

features.name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike
features.description: When I make an attack roll, I can add a +10 bonus to the roll after seeing the d20 roll

features.name: Aura of Conquest
features.description: While I'm not incapacitated, enemies in range have disadv. on saves vs. being frightened

features.name: Implacable Spirit
features.description: I can't be charmed

features.name: Invincible Conqueror
features.description:
As an action, I can gain the following benefits for 1 minute:
• I have resistance all damage
• I can make an additional attack as part of my Attack action
• My melee weapons score critical hits on a roll of 19 or 20

features.name: Channel Divinity: Conquering Presence
features.description:
As an action, all creatures of my choice within 30-ft radius must make a Wisdom save
If failed, a target is frightened for 1 minute; It can save again at the end of each turn

features.name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike
features.description: When I make an attack roll, I can add a +10 bonus to the roll after seeing the d20 roll

features.name: Aura of Conquest
features.description:
Enemies that are frightened of me have their speed reduced to 0 while in my aura
They also take psychic damage whenever they start theirs turn within my aura

features.name: Scornful Rebuke
features.description:
Whenever I'm hit with an attack while I'm not incapacitated, the attacker takes damage
This is psychic damage equal to my Charisma modifier (minimum of 0)

features.name: Invincible Conqueror
features.description:
As an action, I can gain the following benefits for 1 minute:
 - I have resistance to all damage
 - I can make an additional attack as part of my Attack action
 - My melee weapons score critical hits on a roll of 19 or 20

features.name: Channel Divinity: Sacred Weapon
features.description:
As an action, for 1 minute, I add my Cha modifier to hit for one weapon I'm holding
It also counts as magical and emits bright light in a 20-ft radius and equal dim light

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Unholy
features.description:
As an action, all fiends/undead within 30 ft that can hear me must make a Wis save
If one of them fails this save, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage
Turned: move away, never within 30 ft of me, no reactions or actions other than Dash
Turned: may Dodge instead of Dash when nowhere to move and unable to escape bonds

features.name: Aura of Devotion
features.description: While I'm conscious, allies within range and I can't be charmed

features.name: Purity of Spirit
features.description: I am always under the effect of a Protection from Evil and Good spell

features.name: Holy Nimbus
features.description:
As an action, I shine with a 30-ft radius bright light and equal dim light for 1 minute
If an enemy starts its turn in the bright light, it takes 10 radiant damage
For the duration, I have advantage on saves vs. spells cast by fiends and undead

features.name: Sacred Weapon
features.description:
When I take the Attack action, I can expend 1 CD to imbue a held Melee weapon.
I add my Charisma mod (min +1) to attacks with it, I can have it deal Radiant or its normal damage on each hit, and it emits Bright Light in a 20-ft radius and Dim Light 20 ft beyond that.
This lasts for 10 min or until I end it (no action), use this again, or drop the weapon.

features.name: Aura of Devotion
features.description: While within my Aura of Protection, my allies and I have Immunity to being Charmed.

features.name: Smite of Protection
features.description: After I cast Divine Smite, allies and I in my Aura have Half Cover until my next turn starts.

features.name: Holy Nimbus
features.description:
As a Bonus Action, I can give my Aura of Protection these benefits for 10 minutes:
 • **Holy Ward**. I have Advantage on saving throws I'm forced to make by a Fiend or Undead.
 • **Radiant Damage** (Cha mod + Prof Bonus) is dealt to enemies starting its turn in the aura.
 • **Sunlight**. The aura is filled with Bright Light that is sunlight.
I can end it for free. I can do this once per Long Rest or by using a level 5 spell slot (SS 5+).

features.name: Channel Divinity: Inspiring Smite
features.description:
As a bonus action after dealing damage with Divine Smite, I can grant temporary HP
I distribute the temporary HP how I choose across creatures within 30 ft, including me

features.name: Channel Divinity: Peerless Athlete
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can get adv. on Str (Athletics) & Dex (Acrobatics) checks for 10 min
In that time, I also add +10 ft to jumps, and double what I can carry, push, drag, & lift

features.name: Aura of Alacrity
features.description: If I'm not incapacitated, allies starting their turn in range gain bonus speed for that turn

features.name: Glorious Defense
features.description:
As a reaction when I or another in 10 ft is hit with an attack roll, I can grant bonus AC
I must be able to see the attacker; I add my Cha mod (min 1) to the AC for that attack
If it misses, I can do a weapon attack vs. the attacker, if in reach, as part of this reaction

features.name: Living Legend
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can empower myself with legends, gaining the following for 1 min:
 • My otherworldly presence grants me advantage on Charisma checks
 • Once on each of my turns when I miss with a weapon attack, I can have it hit instead
 • As a reaction when I fail a saving throw, I can reroll it, but must use the new roll
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a 5th-level or higher spell slot (SS 5+)

features.name: Channel Divinity: Legendary Strike
features.description: As a bonus action, my weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 for 1 min

features.name: Channel Divinity: Peerless Athlete
features.description: As a bonus action, I gain adv. on Str (Athletics) and Dex (Acrobatics) checks for 10 min

features.name: Mighty Deed
features.description:
When I score a critical hit or reduce a target to 0 HP, I can bolster morale or demoralize
Up to my Cha mod (min 1) of creatures I can see in 30 ft suffer the same chosen effect:
 • All creatures gain temp HP equal to 1d6 + my Charisma modifier (min 1 temp HP)
 • All creatures must make a Wis save or be frightened of me until my next turn starts

features.name: Glorious Defense
features.description:
As a reaction when a creature I can see hits me with an attack roll, I can gain bonus AC
I add my Cha mod (min 1) to my AC for that attack, potentially causing it to miss me
If it misses, I can make one weapon attack against the attacker as part of this reaction

features.name: Living Myth
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can gain the following benefits for 1 minute:
 • I have advantage on all Charisma checks
 • Once on each of my turns when I miss with a weapon attack, I can cause it to hit
 • As a reaction when I fail a saving throw, I can choose to succeed instead

features.name: Channel Divinity: Emissary of Peace
features.description: As a bonus action, I grant myself +5 on Charisma (Persuasion) checks for 10 minutes

features.name: Channel Divinity: Rebuke the Violent
features.description:
As a reaction after a creature within 30 ft attacks and damages another, I can rebuke it
It takes the same damage as it dealt but as radiant damage, with a Wis save to halve it

features.name: Aura of the Guardian
features.description:
As a reaction when an ally within my aura takes damage, I instead take the damage
This damage can't be reduced in any way; Other effects might still apply to my ally

features.name: Protective Spirit
features.description: At the end of my turn when I'm below half HP and not incapacitated, I regain HP

features.name: Emissary of Redemption
features.description:
When taking damage from a creature, I take only half and it takes the other half
This stops working on any that I attack or force to make a save, until I have a long rest

features.name: Armor of Peace
features.description: When not wearing armor or wielding a shield, my AC is 16 + my Dexterity modifier

features.name: Channel Divinity: Emissary of Peace
features.description: As a bonus action, I gain +5 to my next Charisma (Persuasion) check in the next min

features.name: Channel Divinity: Rebuke the Violent
features.description:
As a reaction when a hostile within 10 ft damages another in melee, I can rebuke it
It takes the same damage as it dealt but as radiant damage, with a Wis save to halve it

features.name: Warrior of Reconciliation
features.description:
I can charm a creature when I reduce it to 0 HP with a simple, bludgeoning weapon
It is peaceful, docile and only does what I command it to, but it can't cause harm
For 1 min, until I'm incap., or I or allies attack it or have it save; after it is unconscious

features.name: Aura of the Guardian
features.description:
As a reaction when an ally within 10 ft takes damage, I instead take the damage
This damage can't be reduced in any way; Other effects might still apply to my ally

features.name: Protective Spirit
features.description: At the end of my turn when I'm below half HP and not incapacitated, I regain HP

features.name: Emissary of Redemption
features.description:
When taking damage from a creature, I take only half and it takes the other half
This stops working on any that I attack or force to make a save, until I have a long rest

features.name: Channel Divinity: Nature's Wrath
features.description:
As an action, a creature I can see within 10 ft must make a Str/Dex save (its choice)
If it fails this save, it is restrained until it succeeds on a save at the end of its turn

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Faithless
features.description:
As an action, all fey/fiends within 30 ft that can hear me must make a Wisdom save
If one fails, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage and must show true form
Turned: move away, never within 30 ft of me, no reactions or actions other than Dash
Turned: may Dodge instead of Dash when nowhere to move and unable to escape bonds

features.name: Aura of Warding
features.description: Allies within range and I have resistance to damage from spells

features.name: Undying Sentinel
features.description:
If dropped to 0 hit points and not killed outright, I can choose to stay at 1 hit point
Additionally, I suffer no drawbacks of old age and can't be aged magically

features.name: Elder Champion
features.description:
As an action, I assume the form of a force of nature for 1 minute and gain benefits:
 • At the start of each of my turns, I regain 10 hit points
 • I can cast paladin spells with a casting time of 1 action as a bonus action instead
 • Enemies within 10 ft have disadv. on saves vs. my paladin spells and channel divinity

features.name: Channel Divinity: Champion Challenge
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have any chosen creatures within 30 ft of me make a Wis save
If failed, a target is unable to willingly move more than 30 ft away from me
The effect ends if I'm incapacitated, die, or it is moved more than 30 ft away from me

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Tide
features.description:
As a bonus action, any chosen creatures within 30 ft that can hear me regains HP
Each regain 1d6 + my Charisma modifier HP, up to half of its total HP

features.name: Divine Allegiance
features.description:
When a creature within 5 feet of me takes damage, I can substitute my HP for it
The creature takes no damage and I take all of it; this damage can't be prevented

features.name: Unyielding Spirit
features.description: I have advantage on saving throws against effects that paralyze or stun

features.name: Exalted Champion
features.description:
As an action, I gain the following benefits for 1 hour or until I'm incapacitated:
 • Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons
 • My allies within 30 ft of me and I have advantage on Wisdom and Death saves

features.name: Channel Divinity: Abjure the Extraplanar
features.description:
As an action, all aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, fiend in 30 ft must make Wis save
Succeeds if it can't hear me; On fail, turned for 1 minute or until it takes any damage
Turned: move away, never within 30 ft of me, no reactions or actions other than Dash
Turned: may Dodge instead of Dash when nowhere to move and unable to escape bonds

features.name: Channel Divinity: Watcher's Will
features.description: As an action, Cha mod of creatures I see in 30 ft adv. on Int/Wis/Cha saves for 1 min

features.name: Aura of the Sentinel
features.description: If I'm not incapacitated, chosen creatures in range and I add my Prof Bonus to Initiative

addMod.text: I can add my Proficiency Bonus to initiative rolls.

features.name: Vigilant Rebuke
features.description:
As a reaction when I or another I can see succeeds a Int, Wis, or Cha save, I can rebuke
The creature that forced the saving throw takes 2d8 + my Charisma mod force damage

features.name: Mortal Bulwark
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can gain the following benefits for 1 minute:
 • Truesight 120 ft; Adv. on attacks vs. aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, and fiends
 • When I hit and damage a creature with an attack, I can banish it if it fails a Cha save
   It's banished to its native plane if not there now; It's immune for 24 hours on a success
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a 5th-level or higher spell slot (SS 5+)

features.name: Channel Divinity: Abjure the Extraplanar
features.description:
As an action, elementals, fey, fiends, and aberrations within 30 ft must make a Wis save
Succeeds if it can't hear me; On fail, turned for 1 minute or until it takes any damage
Turned: move away, never within 30 ft of me, no reactions or actions other than Dash
Turned: may Dodge instead of Dash when nowhere to move and unable to escape bonds

features.name: Channel Divinity: Watcher's Will
features.description: As an action, Cha mod of creatures I see in 30 ft adv. on Int/Wis/Cha saves for 1 min

features.name: Aura of the Sentinel
features.description: If I'm not incapacitated, chosen creatures in range and I add my Cha mod to Initiative

addMod.text: I can add my Charisma modifier (min +1) to initiative rolls.

features.name: Vigilant Rebuke
features.description:
As a reaction when I or another I can see saves against a spell, I can damage the caster
Has to succeed save within 30 ft of me vs. unwanted spell; 2d8 + Cha mod force damage

features.name: Mortal Bulwark
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can gain the following benefits for 1 minute:
 • Truesight out to 120 ft and adv. on attacks vs. elementals, fey, fiends, and aberrations
 • I can force creatures I hit and damage with an attack to make a Charisma save
   If failed, the target is banished to its native plane of existence if it's not currently there
   If successful, the creature can't be banished by this feature for 24 hours

features.name: Channel Divinity: Conjure Duplicate
features.description:
As an action, I create 1 illusory duplicate of myself within 30 ft of me for 1 min (conc)
As a bonus action, I can move it up to 30 ft to a space I can see within 120 ft of me
I can cast spells as though I was in its space, but still have to use my own senses
I have advantage on attacks if the target is within 5 ft of the duplicate and me

features.name: Channel Divinity: Poison Strike
features.description:
As a bonus action, I imbue one weapon or piece of ammunition with poison upon touch
This poison lasts for 1 minute and will affect the next time I hit a target with it
The target takes 2d10 + my paladin level poison damage immediately after the hit
I automatically roll 20 on the 2d10 if I have advantage on the attack roll

features.name: Cull the Herd
features.description: I have adv. on melee attacks against creatures that have an ally of it within 5 ft of it

features.name: Treacherous Strike
features.description:
As a reaction when a creature within 5 ft misses me, I can redirect the attack
If it can be charmed, it rerolls the attack on a target of my choice within 5 ft of it

features.name: Blackguard's Escape
features.description:
As a reaction after I am hit by an attack, I can teleport up to 60 ft to a spot I can see
In doing this, I also become invisible (as the spell) until the end of my next turn

features.name: Channel Divinity: Abjure Enemy
features.description:
As an action, one creature within 60 ft that I can see me must make a Wisdom save
If failed, it is frightened and its speed is 0 despite bonuses; if success, its speed is halved
This lasts for 1 minute or until it takes damage; Undead/fiends have disadv. on save

features.name: Channel Divinity: Vow of Enmity
features.description:
As a bonus action, I utter a vow against a creature I can see within 10 ft
I get adv. on attacks against it for 1 minute or until it drops to 0 HP or falls unconscious

features.name: Relentless Avenger
features.description:
After I hit with an opportunity attack, I can move 1/2 my speed in the same reaction
This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks

features.name: Soul of Vengeance
features.description:
When an enemy I have an active Vow of Enmity against makes an attack, I can react
As a reaction, I can make a melee weapon attack against it if it is within range

features.name: Avenging Angel
features.description:
As an action, I gain a flying speed of 60 ft and a 30 ft aura of menace for 1 hour
When a creature first enters or starts its turn in the aura, it must make a Wis save
If failed, for 1 min or until it takes damage, it is frightened and attacks vs. it have adv.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Control Undead
features.description:
As an action, one undead (CR < paladin level) I can see in 30 ft must make a Wis save
If failed, it must obey my commands for 24 hours or until I use this on another

features.name: Channel Divinity: Dreadful Aspect
features.description:
As an action, anyone I choose within 30 ft that can see me must make a Wisdom save
If failed, it is frightened for 1 min or until it succeeds a save at the end of its turns
It can't save at the end of its turn if it's still within 30 ft of me

features.name: Aura of Hate
features.description:
Fiends/undead within range and I add my Cha mod as bonus on melee weapon damage
Multiple Auras of Hate don't stack; only the strongest applies

features.name: Supernatural Resistance
features.description: I have resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage from nonmagical weapons

features.name: Dread Lord
features.description:
As an action, I gain a 30-ft aura of gloom that reduces bright light to dim for 1 min
If frightened of me, foes starting their turn in the aura take 4d10 psychic damage
Attacks vs. my allies and me inside the aura have disadvantage if attackers need sight
As a bonus action, I can make a melee spell attack vs. a target inside the aura
If this attack hits, it does 3d10 + Charisma modifier necrotic damage

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I learn a language of my choice and gain proficiency with calligrapher's tools

features.name: Extract Name
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have a creature I can see within 60 ft make a Wisdom save
If failed, it is charmed by me until my next turn ends and I mentally learn its true name
If successful, I know that my magic failed and can't use this feature again on it

features.name: Fateful Naming
features.description:
I add Bane and Bless to my spellbook and they count as wizard spells for me
These are always prepared, but don't count against the number of spells I can prepare
I can cast either spell without using a spell slot by speaking the true name of a target

features.name: Resonant Utterance
features.description:
When I use a spell slot to cast a wizard spell, I can use one resonant that I know
The resonant will only work if I speak the true name of a creature targeted by the spell

features.name: Resonants
features.description:
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add Resonants to the third page
Whenever I gain a wizard level, I can replace a Resonant I know with another

features.name: Relentless Naming
features.description:
When I speak the true name of a creature when I cast a damage dealing spell at it,
I can have that spell deal force or psychic damage instead of its normal damage type

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with heavy armor, and either the Intimidation or Persuasion skill

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one from Intimidation or Persuasion

features.name: Voice of Authority
features.description:
Whenever I use a spell slot to cast a spell on an ally, it can use its reaction to attack
The ally makes one weapon attack against a target of my choice that I can see
If the spell targets multiple allies, I can choose which one can make the attack

features.name: Channel Divinity: Order's Demand
features.description:
As an action, all chosen targets in 30 ft that can see or hear me must make a Wis save
If failed, it is charmed by me until the end of my next turn or it takes any damage
Also, I can choose to have a charmed target drop what its holding when it fails its save

features.name: Embodiment of the Law
features.description:
When I cast an enchantment spell using a spell slot, I can reduce its casting time
If the spell normally has a casting time of an action, I can now cast it as a bonus action

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Order's Wrath
features.description:
If I deal my Divine Strike damage to a creature, it is cursed until my next turn starts
The next time it is hit by a weapon attack from my allies, it takes +2d8 psychic damage

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with heavy armor

features.name: Voice of Authority
features.description:
Whenever I use a spell slot to cast a spell on an ally, it can use its reaction to attack
The ally makes one weapon attack against a target of my choice that I can see
If the spell targets multiple allies, I can choose which one can make the attack

features.name: Channel Divinity: Order's Demand
features.description:
As an action, all chosen targets in 30 ft that can see or hear me must make a Wis save
If failed, it is charmed by me until the end of my next turn or it takes any damage
Also, I can choose to have any of the charmed targets to fall prone on a failed save

features.name: Order's Dominion
features.description:
When I cast an enchantment spell using a spell slot, I regain one expended spell slot
The regained slot must be lower level than the one used, and no higher than 5th-level

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Order's Wrath
features.description:
If I deal my Divine Strike damage to a creature, it takes extra damage from my allies
The first time each turn that it is hit with a weapon attack, it takes 2d8 force damage

features.name: Awakened Spellbook
features.description:
My spellbook gains sentience and grants me the following benefits while I am holding it:
 • I can use the book as a spellcasting focus for my wizard spells
 • When I cast a wizard spell using a spell slot, I can temporarily replace its damage type
   The new type must appear in my spellbook in a spell of the same level as the spell slot
 • Once per long rest, I can ritual cast a wizard spell without 10 min extra casting time
I can replace it over a short rest, transferring its spells and sentience to a blank book

features.name: Wizardly Quill
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can magically create a Tiny quill with the following properties:
 • It doesn't require ink and produces ink in the color of my choice when writing with it
 • I require only 2 minutes per spell level to transcribe spells into my spellbook with it
 • As a bonus action, I can use it to erase a text written with it if within 5 ft of the text
The quill disappear if I create another or if I die

features.name: Manifest Mind
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have the mind of my awakened spellbook manifest within 60 ft
The spellbook needs to be on my person to do this; The mind is a Tiny spectral object
The mind is intangible, doesn't occupy a space, hovers, and sheds dim light in 10 ft
It can hear, see, has 60 ft darkvision, and telepathically shares with me what it perceives
As a bonus action, I can dismiss it or move it up to 30 ft to an empty space I can see
It can pass through creatures; It stops manifesting if it's over 300 ft from me or I die
It also stop manifesting if Dispel Magic is cast on it or the awakened spellbook is no more
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a spell slot (SS 1+) to manifest it again

features.name: Manifest Mind: Cast Spell
features.description: I can have wizard spells I cast on my turn originate from the mind while its manifested

features.name: Master Scrivener
features.description:
When I finish a long rest, I can write a spell in my awakened spellbook on a blank paper
It must be a level 1 or 2 spell with 1 action casting time; My spellbook must be in 5 ft
As an action, I can use this scroll to cast the spell on it at one higher level than normal
Only I can use the scroll; The scroll turns blank again when I use it or finish a long rest
Also, using my Wizardly Quill, the gold and time I need to craft spell scrolls is halved

features.name: One with the Word
features.description: [see 3rd page "Notes" section]

features.name: Armor Training
features.description: I gain proficiency with medium armor and shields.

features.name: Bonus Disciplines
features.description: I know two additional psionic disciplines, chosen from the avatar disciplines

features.name: Avatar of Battle
features.description: Allies within 30 ft of me gain +2 on initiative rolls while I'm not incapacitated

features.name: Avatar of Healing
features.description:
Allies within 30 ft of me that get healed through a psionic discipline, get extra healing
They add my Intelligence modifier to the HP regained, as long as I'm not incapacitated

features.name: Avatar of Speed
features.description: Allies within 30 ft of me can use Dash as a bonus action while I'm not incapacitated

features.name: Awakened Talent
features.description:
I gain proficiency with two skills of my choice, taken from the following list:
Animal Handling, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose two from: Animal Handling, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, and Persuasion

features.name: Bonus Disciplines
features.description: [+2 awakened disciplines]

features.name: Psionic Investigation
features.description:
By concentrating on an object I'm holding for 10 minutes, I learn the object's history
I see/hear its surroundings the previous hour and know who hold it in the last 24 hours
Also, for the next 24 hours, I can use an action to locate it and see its surroundings

features.name: Psionic Surge
features.description:
I can end my psychic focus to impose disadv. on a save vs. a discipline or talent I use
Once I do this, I can't regain psychic focus in any discipline until I can use this again

features.name: Spectral Form
features.description:
As an action, I can become ghostly and move through objects and creatures for 10 min
I also have resistance to all damage and move at half speed; I can end it as an action

features.name: Bonus Disciplines
features.description: I know two additional psionic disciplines, taken from the immortal disciplines

features.name: Immortal Durability
features.description:
My hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to my mystic level
If not wearing armor or wielding a shield, my AC is 10 + my Dex mod + my Con mod

features.name: Psionic Resilience
features.description: At the start of each turn, I gain my Intelligence modifier in temporary HP (min 0)

features.name: Surge of Health
features.description:
As a reaction when I take damage, I can halve that damage, but end my psychic focus
Once I do this, I can't regain psychic focus in any discipline until I can use this again

features.name: Immortal Will
features.description: If I end my turn at 0 HP, I can use 5 psi points to regain mystic level + Con mod in HP

features.name: Bonus Disciplines
features.description: I know two additional psionic disciplines, taken from the nomad disciplines

features.name: Breadth of Knowledge
features.description:
After I finish a long rest, I gain two proficiencies in chosen language, tool, or skill
These proficiencies last until I finish my next long rest

features.name: Memory of One Thousand Steps
features.description:
As a reaction when hit by an attack, I can teleport away, causing the attack to miss
I can teleport to any empty space that I had occupied since the start of my last turn

features.name: Superior Teleportation
features.description: When I use a psionic discipline to teleport, I can increase its distance by up to 10 ft

features.name: Effortless Journey
features.description:
Once during my turn, I can teleport instead of moving, up to my movement speed 
I subtracting the distance teleported from my remaining speed

features.name: Martial Training
features.description: I gain proficiency with medium armor and martial weapons

features.name: Soul Knife
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can create or dismiss my soul knives on both my fists
As a bonus action, I can parry with these to get +2 AC until the start of my next turn

features.name: Hone the Blade
features.description:
I can spend psi points to give my soul knives a bonus to attack and damage for 10 min
2 psi points: +1; 5 psi points: +2; 7 psi points: +4

features.name: Consumptive Knife
features.description: Whenever I slay an enemy with a soul knife attack, I immediately regain 2 psi points

features.name: Phantom Knife
features.description: As an action, I can make one attack with my soul knife, treating the target's AC as 10

features.name: Bonus Disciplines
features.description: [+2 wu jen disciplines]

features.name: Hermit's Study
features.description:
I gain proficiency with two skills of my choice, taken from the following list:
Animal Handling|Arcana|History|Insight|Medicine|Nature|Perception|Religion|Survival

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose two from: Animal Handling, Arcana, History, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, and Survival

features.name: Elemental Attunement
features.description:
If a target's resistance reduces damage of one of my psionic disciplines, I can bypass it
With 1 extra psi point for the discipline (psi limit permitting), the resistance is ignored

features.name: Arcane Dabbler
features.description:
I know 3 wizard spells (1-3 level); When I gain a mystic level, I can swap one of these
As a bonus action, I can use psi points to make spell slots; Last until my next long rest
2 PP: 1st-level; 3 PP: 2nd-level; 5 PP: 3rd-level; 6 PP: 4th-level; 7 PP: 5th-level

features.name: Elemental Mastery
features.description:
As a reaction when I take damage to which I have resistance, I can ignore that damage
I gain immunity to that damage type until the start of my next turn

features.name: Ancestral Protectors
features.description:
While raging, the first creature I hit with an attack on my turn becomes distracted
While distracted, it has disadvantage on attack rolls that don't target me
In addition, everybody but me counts as having resistance to all of the target's attacks
This lasts until the start of my next turn, or until my rage ends

features.name: Spirit Shield
features.description:
As a reaction while raging when an ally I see within 30 ft is damaged, I can reduce it
My guardian spirits reduce the damage by an amount equal to the roll of the dice

features.name: Consult the Spirits
features.description:
I can cast either Clairvoyance or Augury, without a spell slot or material components
Augury consults ancestral spirits; Clairvoyance summons an invisible ancestral spirit
Wisdom is my spellcasting ability for these spells

features.name: Vengeful Ancestors
features.description: When using Spirit Shield, the attacker takes the reduced amount as force damage

features.name: Ancestral Protectors
features.description:
As a bonus action while raging, I can choose a creature within 5 ft of me that I can see
The creature has disadvantage on attack rolls that don't target me
If it takes the Disengage action within 5 feet of me, its speed is halved for its turn
This lasts until the start of my next turn or my rage ends, whichever comes

features.name: Ancestral Shield
features.description:
While I'm raging, I can transfer my resistance to an ally I can see within 30 ft of me
As a reaction when an ally takes bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage
My ally keeps the resistance, and I lose it, until the start of my next turn

features.name: Consult the Spirits
features.description: I can consult my ancestral spirits to give myself advantage on a Int or Wis check

features.name: Vengeful Ancestors
features.description:
While I'm raging, I can have my vengeful ancestors attack for 2d8 force damage
As a reaction when I or an ally I can see within 30 feet of me is damaged in melee

features.name: Ancestral Protectors
features.description:
While raging, the first creature I hit with an attack on my turn becomes distracted
While distracted, it has disadvantage on attack rolls that don't target me
In addition, everybody but me counts as having resistance to all of the target's attacks
This lasts until the start of my next turn, or until my rage ends

features.name: Spirit Shield
features.description:
As a reaction while raging when an ally I see within 30 ft is damaged, I can reduce it
My guardian spirits reduce the damage by an amount equal to the roll of the dice

features.name: Consult the Spirits
features.description: Through consulting my ancestral spirits, I can cast Clairvoyance without a spell slot

features.name: Vengeful Ancestors
features.description: Whenever I use Spirit Shield to reduce damage, the attacker takes the reduced damage

features.name: Battlerager Armor
features.description:
I gain proficiency with spiked armor both as an armor and as a weapon
As a bonus action while raging, I can attack once with my armor spikes
With my spiked armor I do 3 piercing damage when I use my Attack action to grapple

features.name: Reckless Abandon
features.description: If I use Reckless Attack during rage, I also gain temporary HP equal to my Con mod

features.name: Battlerager Charge
features.description: As a bonus action while raging, I can use the Dash action

features.name: Spiked Retribution
features.description:
When I'm hit in melee by an attacker within 5 ft, it takes 3 piercing damage
This only works while I'm wearing spiked armor, in rage, and I'm not incapacitated

features.name: Form of the Beast
features.description:
When I enter my rage, I can transform to gain a bite, tail, or claws attack for that rage
On a hit with the bite attack once on each of my turns, I can heal my Prof Bonus in HP
This only works if I have less than half my hit points when I hit with this bite attack
With the claws I can make one extra attack when I attack with it in my Attack action
As a reaction with the tail when I'm hit, I can add 1d8 to my AC for that attack
This only works if the hit is from an attack roll made a creature I can see within 30 ft

features.name: Bestial Soul
features.description:
When I finish a short rest, I can choose one of the following benefits until my next rest:
 • Swimming speed equal to my walking speed and I can breathe underwater
 • Climb speed (same as walking) and no check to climb difficult surfaces or upside down
 • Once per turn when I jump, I can extend it by the result of an Athletics check in feet

features.name: Infectious Fury
features.description:
In rage, when I hit a creature with my natural weapon, I can have it make a Wis save
If it fails (DC 8 + my Prof Bonus + my Con mod) it suffers one effect of my choice:
 • It uses its reaction to make a melee attack against one creature I can see of my choice
 • It takes 2d12 psychic damage

features.name: Call the Hunt
features.description:
When I enter rage, I can choose my Con mod of willing creatures I can see within 30 ft
Once on each of their turns, if they hit an attack, they can have it deal +1d6 damage
This lasts as long as I rage; I gain 5 temporary HP per creature that accepts this benefit

features.name: Form of the Beast
features.description:
When I enter my rage, I can transform to gain a bite, tail, or claws attack for that rage
The bite attack allows me to regain my Con mod in HP on a hit once on my turn
The claws attack allows me to make one extra attack when I use it in my Attack action

features.name: Bestial Soul
features.description:
When I finish a short rest, I can choose one of the following benefits until my next rest:
 • Swimming speed equal to my walking speed and I can breathe underwater
 • Climb speed (same as walking) and no check to climb difficult surfaces or upside down
 • Once per turn when I jump, I can extend it by the result of an Athletics check in feet

features.name: Infectious Fury
features.description:
In rage, when I hit a creature with my natural weapon, I can have it make a Wis save
If it fails (DC 8 + my Prof Bonus + my Con mod) it suffers one effect of my choice:
 • It uses its reaction to make a melee attack against one creature I can see of my choice
 • It takes 2d12 psychic damage

features.name: Call the Hunt
features.description:
When I enter rage, I can choose my Con mod of willing creatures I can see within 30 ft
The targets gain the Reckless Attack feature and I have adv. on saves vs. being frightened
I also gain 5 temporary hit points per creature that accepts this benefit

features.name: Frenzy
features.description: If I use Reckless Attack in Rage, my 1st Strength attack hit on my turn deals extra damage.

features.name: Mindless Rage
features.description: While Raging, I'm immune to being Charmed or Frightened. These end when I enter Rage.

features.name: Retaliation
features.description: As a Reaction when a creature within 5 ft damages me, I can make a melee attack vs. it.

features.name: Intimidating Presence
features.description: As a Bonus Action, I can have any creature of my choice within 30 ft make a Wisdom save or be Frightened of me for 1 minute (DC 8 + Str mod + Prof B.). They can repeat this save at each of their turn's end. I can do this once per Long Rest or by expending a Rage use.

features.name: Giant Power
features.description: I learn Giant, and the Druidcraft or Thaumaturgy cantrip with Wis as spellcasting ability

I gain +5 ft reach, and I can become Large along with what I'm wearing, if there is room

features.name: Elemental Cleaver
features.description:
When I rage, I can infuse a weapon I'm holding with acid, cold, fire, thunder, or lightning
While raging, its damage type changes to the chosen type and it deals +1d6 damage,
it gains the thrown (20/60 ft) property, and reappears instantly after a thrown attack
As a bonus action, I can change the chosen type; The bonuses only function for me

features.name: Mighty Impel
features.description:
[DC 8 + Prof Bonus + Str mod]As a bonus action while raging, I can hurl a Medium or smaller creature within my reach
I move it to an empty space I can see within 30 ft; Unwilling can save to avoid this
If it doesn't end this movement on a surface that can support it, it falls and lands prone

features.description:
While raging, my reach increases by 10 ft, and my size can increase to Huge
Mighty Impel works on Large creatures; Elemental Cleaver increases to +2d6 damage

While raging, its damage type changes to the chosen type and it deals +1d6 damage,
it gains the thrown (20/60 ft) property, and reappears instantly after a thrown attack

features.name: Mighty Impel
features.description:
[DC 8 + Prof Bonus + Str mod]As a bonus action while raging, I can hurl a Medium or smaller creature within my reach
I move it to an empty space I can see within 30 ft; Unwilling can save to avoid this
If it doesn't end this movement on a surface that can support it, it falls and lands prone

features.name: Demiurgic Colossus
features.description:
While raging, my reach increases by 10 ft, and my size can increase to Huge
Mighty Impel works on Large creatures; Elemental Cleaver increases to +2d6 damage

features.name: Storm Aura
features.description:
While raging, I emanate a 10-ft radius aura, but not through total cover
The aura's features activate when I enter my rage or as a bonus action while raging
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select the type of aura

features.name: Storm Soul
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select the effect

features.name: Shielding Storm
features.description: In rage, creatures of my choice within my Storm Aura also gain Storm Soul resistance

features.name: Raging Storm
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select the effect

features.name: Storm Aura
features.description:
While raging, I emanate a 10-ft radius aura that shapes the environment around me
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select the aura

features.name: Storm Soul
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select the effect

features.name: Shield of the Storm
features.description: While I'm raging, allies within my aura gain the benefits of my Storm Soul feature

features.name: Raging Storm
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select the effect

features.name: Spirit Seeker
features.description: I can cast Beast Sense and Speak with Animals as rituals (PHB 217 & 277)

features.name: Totem Spirit
features.description: Choose Bear, Eagle, Elk, Wolf, or Tiger Spirit using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Aspect of the Beast
features.description: Choose Bear, Eagle, Elk, Wolf, or Tiger Aspect using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Spirit Walker
features.description: I can cast Commune with Nature as a ritual

features.name: Totemic Attunement
features.description: Choose Bear, Eagle, Elk, Wolf, or Tiger Attunement using the "Choose Feature" button

features.name: Lingering Magic
features.description:
I can cast Detect Magic without spell slots or components, using Con for spellcasting
When I do so, I faintly glow a color corresponding to the school of magic I detect

features.name: Wild Surge
features.description: Whenever I enter my rage, I have to roll on the Wild Surge table (see Notes page)

features.name: Magic Reserves
features.description:
As an action, I can touch a creature and roll a die to channel magic into it
The target regains an expended spell slot of a level equal to or less then the die roll
If it has no expended spell slots of that level, it gains 5× the die roll in temp HP instead
Regardless of what happens, I take force damage equal to five times the die roll

features.name: Arcane Rebuke
features.description:
As a reaction when I have to make a save while raging, the magic in my soul lashes out
This causes the creature forcing me to make the save, if any, to take 3d6 force damage

features.name: Chaotic Fury
features.description:
As a bonus action while raging, I can reroll the effect on the Wild Surge table
This replaces the current wild surge effect with a new one

features.name: Divine Fury
features.description:
While raging, the first creature I hit with a weapon attack in my turn gets extra damage
This is necrotic or radiant damage equal to 1d6 + half my barbarian level
Choose a damage type using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Warrior of the Gods
features.description: Spells restoring me to life (not undeath or anything else) don't require material comp.

features.name: Fanatical Focus
features.description:
When I fail a saving throw while raging, I can reroll it and must use the new roll
I can use this ability only once per rage

features.name: Zealous Presence
features.description:
As a bonus action, I choose up to 10 creatures within 60 ft that can hear my battle cry
These creatures gain adv. on attacks and saves until the start of my next turn

features.name: Rage Beyond Death
features.description:
While raging, having 0 hit points doesn't knock me unconscious
I still must make death saves, and I suffer the normal effects of taking damage
I only die due to failed death saves if my rage ends while I'm at 0 HP

features.name: Divine Fury
features.description:
While raging, I can become cloaked in an aura of divine power until my rage ends
Choose a damage type using the "Choose Feature" button above

features.name: Warrior of the Gods
features.description: Spells restoring me to life (not undeath or anything else) don't need material comp.

features.name: Zealous Focus
features.description:
As a reaction when I fail a saving throw while raging, I can instead succeed on it
Doing so immediately ends my rage and I can't rage again until I finish a short rest

features.name: Zealous Presence
features.description:
As an action, I howl in fury and unleash a battle cry infused with divine energy
Allies within 60 ft of me gain adv. on attacks and saves until the start of my next turn

features.name: Rage Beyond Death
features.description:
While raging, having 0 hit points doesn't knock me unconscious
I still must make death saves, and I suffer the normal effects of taking damage
However, if I would die due to failing death saves, I don't die until my rage ends

features.name: Magic Awareness
features.description:
As an action, I can open my awareness to the presence of concentrated magic
Until my next turn ends, I know the location of any spell or magic item within 60 ft
I also learn the school of magic of a spell; This doesn't reveal anything behind total cover

features.name: Wild Surge
features.description: Whenever I enter my rage, I roll on the Wild Magic table (see Notes page)

features.name: Bolstering Magic
features.description:
As an action, I can touch a creature or myself and confer one of the following benefits:
 • For 10 minutes, they can add 1d3 to any attack roll and ability check
 • Roll 1d3. They regain an expended spell slot of a level equal to or lower than the roll
A creature that receives the second benefit can't receive it again until after a long rest

features.name: Unstable Backlash
features.description:
As a reaction in rage when taking damage or failing a save, I can lash out with magic
I roll on the Wild Magic table and immediately apply the roll, replacing my current effect

features.name: Controlled Surge
features.description:
Whenever I roll on the Wild Magic table, I can roll two dice and choose which to use
If I roll the same on both dice, I can instead choose any effect on the Wild Magic table

features.name: Emboldening Bond
features.description:
As an action, I can magically bond my Prof Bonus of willing creatures I can see in 30 ft
I can be one of the bonded creatures; The bond lasts for 10 min or until I use this again
While within 30 ft of another, a bonded target can add +1d4 to a save, attack, or check
Each creature can add the +1d4 only once per turn

features.name: Implement of Peace
features.description: I gain proficiency in the Insight, Performance, or Persuasion skill (my choice)

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one from: Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

features.name: Channel Divinity: Balm of Peace
features.description:
As an action, I can move up to my speed without provoking opportunity attacks
During this move, I can heal each creature that I come within 5 ft of once
I restore a number of hit points equal to 2d6 + my Wisdom modifier (minimum 1 HP)

features.name: Protective Bond
features.description:
My Emboldening Bond now also helps those bonded to protect each other if within range
When one is about to take damage, another bonded can use its reaction to teleport closer
They teleport to an empty space within 5 ft of the first and take all the damage instead
From 17th-level, they count as having resistance for this damage, thus take only half

additional: the bonded must be within 30 ft

features.name: Potent Spellcasting

features.name: Expansive Bond

Emboldening and Protective Bond work when the bonded are within 60 ft of each other
Protective Bond now also grants resistance when used to take damage for another

features.description:

The token of its life essence appears in my free hand; The DM determines its appearance
While a soul trinket is on my person, I have advantage on death and Constitution saves
As an action, I can destroy one of my soul trinkets and ask its associated spirit a question
Its spirit appears and answers concisely in a language it knew; Trinket can be anywhere

features.name: Ghost Walk
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can assume a spectral form with 10 ft flying speed and can hover
Attacks vs. me have disadv.; I can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain
This lasts 10 min; I take 1d10 force damage if I end my turn inside a creature or object
I can assume this form once per long rest, or by destroying one of my soul trinkets (ST)

features.description:

features.description:
Whenever I finish a short or long rest, I can gain one skill or tool proficiency of my choice
This proficiency lasts until I use this feature again to gain a different proficiency

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one skill or tool; I can change the choice whenever I finish a short or long rest
