The token of its life essence appears in my free hand; The DM determines its appearance
While a soul trinket is on my person, I have advantage on death and Constitution saves
As an action, I can destroy one of my soul trinkets and ask its associated spirit a question
Its spirit appears and answers concisely in a language it knew; Trinket can be anywhere

features.name: Ghost Walk
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can assume a spectral form with 10 ft flying speed and can hover
Attacks vs. me have disadv.; I can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain
This lasts 10 min; I take 1d10 force damage if I end my turn inside a creature or object
I can assume this form once per long rest, or by destroying one of my soul trinkets (ST)

features.name: Death Knoll
features.description: Wails from the Grave now also deals damage to the target of the original sneak attack

features.name: Ignite
features.description: As an action, I can magically ignite a flammable object by touching it with my hand

features.name: Mantle of Flame
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can wreathe myself in fire for 1 minute, gaining these benefits:
 - I shed bright light in a 30-ft radius and dim light for an additional 30 ft
 - I deal my Charisma modifier in fire damage to all that touch me
 - I also deal this damage to all that hit me with a melee attack from within 5 ft
 - When I roll for fire damage on my turn, I add my Charisma damage to the result

features.name: Phoenix Spark
features.description:
As a reaction when I am reduced to 0 HP, I can draw on the phoenix to stay at 1 HP
All creatures within 10 ft of me take half my sorcerer level + my Cha mod fire damage
If I have Mantle of Flame active, this damage is my sorcerer level + twice my Cha mod
If I use this feature, my Mantle of Flame immediately ends

features.name: Nourishing Fire
features.description:
When I cast a spell using a spell slot that includes a fire damage roll, I regain HP
The HP regained is equal to the spell slot level + my Charisma modifier

features.name: Form of the Phoenix
features.description:
While my Mantle of Flame is active, I gain the following additional benefits:
- I have a flying speed of 40 ft and can hover
- I have resistance to all damage
- If I use my Phoenix Spark, it deals an extra 20 fire damage to each creature

features.name: Guardian magic
features.description: I get bonus spells known, which do not count against the number of spells I can know

features.name: Guardian Soul
features.description:
As a bonus action, I transform to or from a guardian form, changing me as follows:
• I grow to Large size, all my movement is reduced to 5 ft, and I get +5 ft reach
• I gain half my ranger level in temporary HP at the start of each of my turns
This ends when I'm incapacitated; When it ends, I lose all temporary HP I got from it

features.name: Piercing Thorns
features.description: Once each turn, a hit from my weapon attack can deal 1d6 extra piercing damage

features.name: Ancient Fortitude
features.description:
When I assume my guardian form, my HP & max HP increase by twice my ranger level
When I leave the form, my max HP reverts back, and any excess HP I have is lost

features.name: Rooted Defense
features.description: While in guardian form, the ground within 30 ft of me is difficult terrain for hostiles

features.name: Guardian Aura
features.description:
While I'm in my guardian form, I heal allies that start their turn within 30 ft of me
They heal half my ranger level if they are below half HP and not undead or constructs

features.name: Guardian magic
features.description: I get bonus spells known, which do not count against the number of spells I can know

features.name: Guardian Soul
features.description:
As a bonus action, I transform to or from a guardian form, changing me as follows:
• I grow to Large size, all my movement is reduced to 5 ft, and I get +5 ft reach
• I gain half my ranger level in temporary HP at the start of each of my turns

features.name: Piercing Thorns
features.description: Once each turn, a hit from my weapon attack can deal 1d6 extra piercing damage

features.name: Ancient Fortitude
features.description:
When I assume my guardian form, my HP & max HP increase by twice my ranger level
When I leave the form, my max HP reverts back, and any excess HP I have is lost

features.name: Rooted Defense
features.description: While in guardian form, the ground within 30 ft of me is difficult terrain for hostiles

features.name: Guardian Aura
features.description:
While I'm in my guardian form, I heal allies that start their turn within 30 ft of me
They heal half my ranger level if they are below half HP and not undead or constructs

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description:
I can cast bard and warlock cantrips/spells I know, using Cha as my spellcasting ability
I can use an arcane focus or musical instrument as a spellcasting focus for my spells
Whenever I gain a level, I can replace one cantrip/spell I know with another I'm allowed

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with heavy armor

features.name: Shield of the Faithful
features.description:
As a reaction, when someone within 5 ft of me is attacked, I impose disadv. on the roll
To do this, I must be able to see both the attacker and the target

features.name: Channel Divinity: Radiant Defense
features.description:
As an action, I channel blessed energy into an ally that I can see within 30 ft of me
The first time the ally is hit within the next minute, the attacker takes radiant damage

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.description: When I restore HP to another with a spell, I regain 2 + the spell (slot) level in HP

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Indomitable Defense
features.description:
I gain resistance to two of: bludgeoning, necrotic, piercing, radiant, or slashing damage
Whenever I finish a short or long rest, I can change the damage types chosen
As an action, I can transfer both resistances to one creature I touch
As a bonus action, I can transfer the resistances back to myself
Otherwise, the creature keeps this resistance until the end of my next short or long rest

features.name: Psionic Energy Dice
features.description:
I gain twice my proficiency bonus of psionic energy dice (PsiD) that fuel my psionics
I regain all expended psionic energy dice after a long rest
As a bonus action once per short rest, I can regain one expended psionic energy die

features.name: Psionic Power: Protective Field
features.description:
As a reaction when I or a creature I can see within 30 ft takes damage, I can reduce it
I reduce the damage by the roll of the one psionic energy die I expend + my Int mod

features.name: Psionic Power: Psionic Strike
features.description:
Once on each of my turns after I hit a target in 30 ft and damage it with a weapon,
I can expend a psionic energy die to deal it the die roll + my Int mod in force damage

features.name: Psionic Power: Telekinetic Movement
features.description:
As an action, I can move a Large or smaller loose object or one willing creature in 30 ft
I must be able to see the target and can move it up to 30 ft to an empty space I can see
If it is a Tiny object, I can also move it to or from my hand; I can't move myself this way
I can do this once per short rest, or by expending a psionic energy die (PsiD)

features.name: Telekinetic Adept: Psi-Powered Leap
features.description:
As a bonus action, I gain a flying speed of twice my walking speed until the turn ends
I can do this once per short rest, or by expending a psionic energy die (PsiD)

features.name: Telekinetic Adept: Telekinetic Thrust
features.description:
When I deal damage with my Psionic Strike, I can have the target make a Strength save
If failed, I knock the target prone or move it up to 10 ft in any direction horizontally

features.name: Guarded Mind
features.description:
I can expend a psionic energy die to end all effects on me causing charmed or frightened
I can do this if at the start of my turn; I also gain resistance to psychic damage

features.name: Bulwark of Force
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can choose up to my Int mod of creatures (min 1) I can see in 30 ft
This can include me; Each chosen gains half cover for 1 minute or until I'm incapacitated
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a psionic energy die (PsiD)

features.name: Telekinetic Master
features.description:
I can cast Telekinesis, requiring no spell slot or components, with Int spellcasting ability
As a bonus action while concentrating on this spell, I can make one weapon attack
I can cast Telekinesis once per long rest, or by expending a psionic energy die (PsiD)

features.name: Psionic Devotion
features.description:
I learn one cantrip: Friends, Mage Hand, or Message; Use "Choose Feature" button above
While my psionic focus is on me, I can cast it as a bonus action without components

features.name: Psionic Focus
features.description:
I learn to channel psionic energy through an object special to me, my psionic focus
It allows me to reroll a roll of 1 on any psychic or force damage die for my wizard spells
I can use this as my spellcasting focus; If lost, I can recreate it by meditating for 1 hour

features.name: Thought Form
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can use my psionic focus to transform my body into luminous energy
I chose the shape (my size); It sheds 5-ft radius dim light; My equipment melds into it
My psionic focus hovers within the energy; In this form, I have the following benefits:
 • Spells I cast require no verbal, somatic, or material components without a gold cost
 • I have resistance to psychic and nonmagical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage
This lasts for 10 minutes or until I'm incapacitated, die, or use a bonus action to end it

features.name: Empowered Psionics
features.description: I add my Int modifier to one target of my wizard spells that do psychic or force damage

features.name: Mental Discipline
features.description:
I learn one spell: Dominate Person, Scrying, or Telekinesis; Use "Choose Feature" button
I can cast the spell without a spell slot once per long rest (and normally with a spell slot)

features.name: Thought Travel
features.description:
While in my thought form, I gain a fly speed equal to my walking speed and I can hover
I can then also move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain
I take 1d10 force damage if I end my turn inside an object
If I end my thought form while inside an object, I'm shunted to the nearest empty space
I then take 1d10 force damage for every 5 ft traveled

features.name: Psionic Armament
features.description:
When I finish a long rest, I can choose to augment my defenses or strikes until the next
 • As a reaction, augmented defenses allow me to reduce the damage taken by 1d10
   I can reduce the damage taken by myself or by a creature that I can see within 30 ft
 • Once per turn, augmented strikes adds +1d4 psychic damage to my weapon attack

features.name: Telekinetic Hand
features.description: I learn the Mage Hand cantrip, can cast it without components, and can make it invisible

features.name: Strength of Mind
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have a creature I can see within 20 ft make a Strength save
It takes 2d6 + Int mod psychic damage & moves 15 ft away or towards me (my choice)
If its save succeeds, it takes half damage and isn't moved; DC 8 + Prof Bonus + Int mod

features.name: Telekinetic Bulwark
features.description:
When I take the Attack action, I can forgo one of the attacks to project psionic power
Myself and my allies within 10 ft of me gain half cover and adv. on Strength saves
This 10-ft radius bastion around me lasts for 1 minute or until I'm incapacitated
I regain the usage of this feature after I use my second wind feature

features.name: Agonizing Strikes
features.description:
When I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can deal an extra +2d10 psychic damage
The target also has to make a Constitution save (DC 8 + my Prof Bonus + my Int mod)
If it fails, it falls prone and has disadv. on its next ability check until my next turn starts

features.name: Psychic Dreadnaught
features.description:
As a reaction when I take damage, I can give myself the following benefits for 1 minute:
 • At the start of each of my turns, I regain 10 hit points
 • My walking speed increases by +10 ft
 • If I'm prone, I can stand up by spending 5 ft of movement
These benefits also end when I'm incapacitated

features.name: Rallying Cry
features.description: When I use Second Wind, I also heal three allies within 60 ft that can see or hear me

features.name: Royal Envoy
features.description:
I gain proficiency with the Persuasion skill and I gain expertise with the Persuasion skill
If already proficient, I can choose Animal Handling, Insight, Intimidation, or Performance

structuredData.skillstxt: Persuasion proficiency and expertise; If already proficient, choose one from Animal Handling, Insight, Intimidation, or Performance

features.name: Inspiring Surge
features.description:
When I use my Action Surge, I can inspire an ally within 60 ft that can see or hear me
The ally can then use its reaction to make one melee or ranged weapon attack

features.name: Bulwark
features.description:
When I use Indomitable to reroll a Int, Wis, or Cha save, I can extend it to an ally
The ally can reroll its failed saving throw against the same effect and take the result
It only works if not incapacitated and the ally is within 60 ft and can see or hear me

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I gain proficiency with smith's tools and I learn to speak, read, and write Giant

features.name: Giant's Might
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can imbue myself with giant magic for 1 minute and gain benefits:
 • Space permitted, I grow to a larger size category along with everything I'm wearing
 • I have advantage on my Strength check and saves
 • My weapon and unarmed strike attacks deal extra damage

features.name: Rune Carver
features.description:
I learn how to use magic runes to enhance my gear that I can wear or hold in my hand
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select a rune and add it to the third page
When I finish a long rest, I can inscribe each rune I know upon a different item I touch
Each item can hold only one rune and remains there until I finish a long rest
Runes inscribed on a carried object grant both a passive and a limited-use active effect
Whenever I gain a fighter level, I can swap a rune I know for another
The DC for a rune's abilities is 8 + my Proficiency bonus + my Constitution modifier

features.name: Runic Shield
features.description:
As a reaction when I see a creature within 60 ft get hit by an attack, I can protect it
The attacker must reroll its attack roll and use the new roll

features.name: Great Stature
features.description:
My runes permanently make me grow; I add 3d4 inches to my length
In addition, the extra weapon damage I deal with Giant Might increases to 1d8

features.name: Master of Runes
features.description: I can now invoke each of my runes twice per short rest instead of once

features.name: Runic Juggernaut
features.description:
Giant's Might now adds +1d10 weapon damage, and can make me grow up to Huge
While I'm Huge, my reach increases by 5 ft

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I gain proficiency with smith's tools and I learn to speak, read, and write Giant

features.name: Giant Might
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can imbue myself with giant magic for 1 minute and gain benefits:
 • Space permitted, I grow to Large size along with everything I'm wearing
 • Advantage on Strength check and saves; My weapon attacks deal extra damage

features.name: Rune Magic
features.description:
I learn how to use runes to enhance my weapons, armor, and shields
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select a rune and add it to the third page
When I finish a long rest, I can inscribe each rune I know upon a different item I touch
Each item can hold only one rune and remains there until I finish a long rest
Runes inscribed on a carried object grant both a passive and a limited-use active effect
Whenever I gain a fighter level, I can swap a rune I know for another
The DC for a rune's abilities is 8 + my Proficiency bonus + my Intelligence modifier

features.name: Defensive Runes
features.description:
As a reaction when I see a creature get hit by an attack within 60 ft, I can grant it AC
The creature adds 1 + my Int mod (min 2) to its AC for the attack; I learn another rune

features.name: Great Stature
features.description:
My runes permanently make me grow; I add 3d4 inches to my length
In addition, my Giant Might adds more weapon damage and I learn another rune

features.name: Rune Magic Mastery
features.description: I can use each of my runes twice instead of once per short rest and I learn another rune

features.name: Blessing of the All Father
features.description: When I use Giant Might, I can have it also affect a willing ally that I can see within 60 ft

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description:
I gain proficiency with History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion
Alternatively, I learn one language; Use the "Choose Feature" button above for this

choices: Skill proficiency: History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

skill-proficiency-history-insight-perfor.skillstxt: Choose one from: History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion

features.name: Fighting Spirit
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can give myself advantage on weapon attacks and temporary HP
This advantage on weapon attack rolls lasts until the end of my current turn

features.name: Elegant Courtier
features.description:
I can add my Wisdom modifier to any Charisma (Persuasion) checks I make
I gain proficiency with Wis saves, or if I'm already proficient, either Int or Cha saves

addMod.text: I can add my Wisdom modifier to any Charisma (Persuasion) checks I make.

features.name: Tireless Spirit
features.description: I regain one use of Fighting Spirit if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Rapid Strike
features.description:
With the Attack action, I can forgo advantage on one attack to make one extra attack
This extra attack is part of the same action; I can do this only once per turn

features.name: Strength Before Death
features.description:
If I'm reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, I can delay falling unconscious
I then immediately take a bonus turn, interrupting the current turn
While I'm at 0 HP, I suffer damage normally and die if I have 3 failed death saves
If I'm still at 0 HP at the end of this bonus turn, I fall unconscious

features.name: Fighting Spirit
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can give myself benefits that last until the end of my next turn
I then gain adv. on my attacks and resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage

features.name: Elegant Courtier
features.description:
I can add my Wis modifier to any Cha check to persuade anyone of a high social station
I gain proficiency with either one language or the History, Insight, or Persuasion skill

choices: Skill proficiency: History, Insight, or Persuasion

skill-proficiency-history-insight-or-per.skillstxt: Choose one from: History, Insight, or Persuasion

features.name: Unbreakable Will
features.description: I gain proficiency with Wis saves, or if I'm already proficient, either Int or Cha saves

features.name: Rapid Strike
features.description:
If I have adv. on an attack, I can forgo it to make an extra attack as a bonus action
This attack has to be with the same weapon against the same target

features.name: Strength Before Death
features.description:
If I take damage that would reduce me to 0 HP, I can delay that damage
I then immediately take a bonus turn, interrupting the current turn
I don't take the delayed damage until the bonus turn ends and can affect that damage

features.name: Abjuration Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy abjuration spells into my spellbook

features.name: Arcane Ward
features.description:
Whenever I cast an 1st-level or higher abjuration spell, I make/heal a ward
I make it at max HP; When I cast again, it heals two HP per spell level
It stays active at 0 HP and doesn't go away until my next long rest
If I take damage, the ward takes the damage instead, but excess damage carries over

features.name: Projected Ward
features.description: As a reaction, my Arcane Ward can absorb damage done to a creature within 30 ft

features.name: Improved Abjuration
features.description: When I cast an abjuration spell requiring an ability check, I add my proficiency bonus

features.name: Spell Resistance
features.description: I have adv. on spell saves and resistance to damaging spells

features.name: Conjuration Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy conjuration spells into my spellbook

features.name: Minor Conjuration
features.description:
As an action, I can conjure an object up to 3 ft on each side and no more than 10 lbs
It must be of a form of a nonmagical object I have seen and is created within 10 ft
The object disappears after 1 hour, if it takes or deals damage, or when I use this again

features.name: Benign Transposition
features.description:
As an action, I can teleport to a place within 30 ft that I can see
Instead, I can swap places with a willing Small/Medium creature in 30 ft that I can see
I can do this again after a long rest or casting a 1st-level or higher conjuration spell

features.name: Focused Conjuration
features.description: While I am concentrating on a conjuration spell, it can't be broken by taking damage

features.name: Durable Summons
features.description: Any creature I summon or create with a conjuration spell has 30 temporary hit points

features.name: Divination Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy divination spells into my spellbook

features.name: Portent
features.description:
After a long rest, I roll dice and keep the results to be used before my next long rest
A result can replace an attack/save/ability check made by me or a creature I can see
I choose to switch them before the dice to be replaced are rolled; Max once per turn

features.name: Expert Divination
features.description: When I cast a divination spell, I recover a spell slot of a lower level than the one I cast

features.name: The Third Eye
features.description:
As an action, I gain one of the following until my next short or long rest:
Darkvision 60ft, see the Ethereal Plane 60ft, read any language, or see invisibility 10ft

features.name: Greater Portent
features.description: I can roll 3d20 instead of 2d20 when using my Portent feature

features.name: Enchantment Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy enchantment spells into my spellbook

features.name: Hypnotic Gaze
features.description:
As an action, a seen enemy within 5 ft must make a Wis save or be charmed
This doesn't work if it can't see/hear me; It's also incapacitated and reduced to 0 speed
This lasts until the end of my next turn, but I can use an action to extend the duration
It also ends if it takes damage, can't see or hear me, or is more than 5 ft from me
On success or once it ends, I can't use this on it again until after a long rest

features.name: Instinctive Charm
features.description:
As a reaction, when someone I can see in 30 ft attacks me, it must make a Wis save
If failed, it must instead attack the closest creature within range (not me or self)
On a success, the target is immune to this until after my long rest; This is a charm effect

features.name: Split Enchantment
features.description:
When I cast an enchantment spell with only one target, I can target a second in range
This does not apply to cantrips

features.name: Alter Memories
features.description:
When I cast an enchantment spell that charms, I can have one target be unaware of it
Also, once before that spell ends, I can have that target forget time while affected
It must make an Intelligence save or lose up to 1 + Charisma modifier hours of memory

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy evocation spells into my spellbook

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.description:
If I cast an evocation spell affecting others I can see, I can protect 1 + the spell's level
The chosen automatically succeed on their saving throws vs. the spell
They also take no damage if the spell would normally deal half damage on a save

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.description: Any cantrips I cast still deal half damage on a successful save

features.name: Empowered Evocation
features.description: I can add my Int modifier to a single damage roll of any wizard evocation spell I cast

features.name: Overchannel
features.description:
When I cast a 5th-level or lower wizard spell that damages, it can deal max damage
Except the first time I do this after a long rest, I suffer 2d12 necrotic dmg per spell lvl
Every time I do it after that, before a long rest, I take another 1d12 necrotic damage
This necrotic damage surpasses my resistances/immunities; I can't overchannel cantrips

features.name: Illusion Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy illusion spells into my spellbook

features.name: Improved Minor Illusion
features.description:
I gain the knowledge of the Minor Illusion cantrip (or another if I already knew it)
When I cast it, I can create both a sound and an image with a single casting

features.name: Malleable Illusion
features.description: After I cast an illusion spell that lasts 1 min or longer, I can use an action to change it

features.name: Illusory Self
features.description: As a reaction, when I'm attacked, I can impose an illusion that makes the attack miss

features.name: Illusory Reality
features.description:
As a bonus action, after I cast a 1st-level or higher illusion spell, I can make it real
One inanimate, nonmagical object that is part of the illusion becomes real for 1 minute
The object can't be something that directly harms someone

features.name: Arcanomechanical Armor
features.description:
After a long rest, I can transform a studded leather armor into arcanomechanical armor
This is a magic light armor that gives AC 12 + Dex mod and force resistance, if attuned
Only I can attune to it; Creating a new one removes the magic from the previous

features.name: Reckless Casting
features.description:
As an action, I can attempt to cast a random spell or cantrip by rolling a d10 on a table
On a roll of 10, I roll again twice on that table and cast both results
However, if I then roll 10 on either dice, the whole casting fails and the action is wasted
If I choose cantrip, I roll on the table once and cast the result
If I choose a spell, I expend a spell slot and roll twice on the table for the slot's level
I can then choose which of the results I use; Use 5th-level table for spell slots over level 5

features.name: Tools of the Inventor
features.description: I gain proficiency with light armor and two tools of my choice

features.name: Alchemical Casting
features.description:
I can manipulate spells cast while wearing and attuned to my Arcanomechanical Armor
By expending an additional 1st or 2nd-level spell slot, I do the following:
• 1st: I can substitute acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage for another type
• 2nd: I increase the spells damage, if any, by 2d10 force damage against one target

features.name: Prodigious Inspiration
features.description: As a bonus action, I can replace a prepared spell with another from my spellbook

features.name: Controlled Chaos
features.description:
When I expend a spell slot to cast a spell using Reckless Casting, it is more powerful
I can roll on the table that is one level higher than the spell slot expended

features.name: Grim Harvest
features.description:
Once per turn, when I kill something with a 1st-level or higher spell, I regain hit points
The number of hit points regained is 2× the spell's level (or 3× with necromancy spells)
This doesn't occur for constructs/undead

features.name: Necromancy Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy necromancy spells into my spellbook

features.name: Undead Thralls
features.description:
I add Animate Dead to my spellbook and can have an additional target when casting it
Undead created by my necromancy spells have the following benefits:
They add my proficiency bonus to damage and my wizard level to their HP maximums

features.name: Inured to Undead
features.description: I have resistance to necrotic damage and my hit point maximum can't be reduced

features.name: Command Undead
features.description:
As an action, an undead within 60 ft that I can see must make a Charisma save
If its Int is > 7, it has adv. on the save; If its Int is > 11, it repeats the save every hour
If failed, it becomes friendly to me and obeys my commands until I use this on another
On success, it becomes permanently immune to my further attempts

features.name: Minor Alchemy
features.description:
I can transform an object of wood/stone/iron/copper/silver into another of those
For each 10 min I spend, I can transform up to 1 cubic foot of the material
It reverts back when I lose concentration or after 1 hour

features.name: Transmutation Savant
features.description: I halve the gp and time needed to copy transmutation spells into my spellbook

features.name: Transmuter's Stone
features.description:
In 8 hours, I can create a transmuter's stone that gives its wielder one of the following:
 • Darkvision 60 ft
 • 10 ft increase to speed while unencumbered
 • Proficiency in Constitution saving throws
 • Resistance to either acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage
The benefit is chosen at creation; I can have only one active stone at a time
I can change the benefit when I cast a 1st-level or higher transmutation spell with it

features.name: Shapechanger
features.description:
I add Polymorph to my spellbook; I can cast it on myself without using a spell slot
When I do that, I can only transform into a beast with a challenge rating of 1 or lower

features.name: Master Transmuter
features.description:
As an action, I can destroy my transmuter's stone and do one of the four following:
##• Major Transformation##.
  In 10 minutes, I transmute one nonmagical object up to 5 cubic foot into another
  This new, nonmagical object must be of similar size and mass and equal or less value
##• Panacea##.
  One touched has all curses, diseases, and poisons removed and is healed to max HP
##• Restore Life##.
  I cast Raise Dead without using spell slots or needing to have it in my spellbook
##• Restore Youth##.
  A touched creature's apparent age is reduced by 3d10 years (to a minimum of 13)

features.name: Skirmisher
features.description:
As a reaction when a hostile ends its turn within 5 ft of me, I can move half my speed
This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity

features.name: Survivalist
features.description: I gain proficiency and expertise with the Nature and Survival skills

features.name: Superior Mobility
features.description: I gain +10 ft to my walking speed (and swimming/climbing speed, if applicable)

features.name: Ambush Master
features.description:
I gain advantage on Initiative rolls
The first creature I hit in the first round of combat becomes an easy target
Until the start of my next turn, all attacks against the target have advantage

features.name: Sudden Strike
features.description:
With the Attack action, I can make one additional attack as a bonus action
This attack can benefit from my Sneak Attack even if I already used it this turn
However, I still can't use Sneak Attack on a single target more than once per turn

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description:
I gain proficiency with three skills or two skills and Thieves' Tools; For skills choose from:
Acrobatics, Athletics, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Stealth, and Survival

choices: 2 Skill proficiencies and Thieves' Tools proficiency

2-skill-proficiencies-and-thieves-tools-.skillstxt: Choose two from: Acrobatics, Athletics, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Stealth, or Survival

3-skill-proficiencies.skillstxt: Choose three from: Acrobatics, Athletics, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Stealth, or Survival

features.name: Combat Superiority
features.description:
I gain a number of superiority dice that I can use to fuel special maneuvers (see below)
I can use only one maneuver per attack; I regain all superiority dice after a short rest
• Use after rolling an Athletics, Nature, Perception, Stealth, or Survival check
   I add half the superiority die to the roll (rounding up)
• Use after rolling to hit; I add the superiority die to my attack roll
• As a reaction when I'm hit while wearing light/medium armor, I add the die to AC
   If the attack still hits, I only take half damage from it

features.name: Improved Combat Superiority
features.description: My superiority dice turn into d10s at 10th level and into d12s at 18th level

features.name: Relentless
features.description: I regain one superiority die if I have no more remaining when I roll initiative

features.name: Skirmisher
features.description:
As a reaction when a hostile ends its turn within 5 ft of me, I can move half my speed
This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity

features.name: Survivalist
features.description: I gain proficiency and expertise with the Nature and Survival skills

features.name: Superior Mobility
features.description: I gain +10 ft to my walking speed (and swimming/climbing speed, if applicable)

features.name: Ambush Master
features.description:
As a bonus action in the first combat round with a surprised foe, I can lead the ambush
If I do so, allies who can see me gets +5 to their initiative roll, up to my initiative value
Also, each ally gains +10 ft to its speed that lasts until the end their next turn

features.name: Sudden Strike
features.description:
With the Attack action, I can make one additional attack as a bonus action
This attack can benefit from my Sneak Attack even if I already used it this turn
However, I still can't use Sneak Attack on a single target more than once per turn

features.name: Curse of the Sea
features.description:
I can curse a target that I hit with a cantrip or that fails its save against my cantrip
This lasts until the end of my next turn or until I curse another target like this
Once per turn when I cast a spell, I can trigger an active curse, if a condition is met
 - If spell dealt cold damage to it, its has -15 ft speed until the end of my next turn
 - If the spell dealt lightning damage to it, that damage is increased with my Cha mod
 - If the spell moved the target, it is moved an additional 15 ft
Only one of these effects can be applied, even if the spell meets multiple conditions
If the spell triggering the curse is a cantrip, the target stays cursed for another round

features.name: Soul of the Sea
features.description: I can breathe underwater and I have a swim speed equal to my walking speed

features.name: Watery Defense
features.description:
I gain resistance to fire damage
I can protect myself when an attack deals bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage
As a reaction when that happens, I reduce the damage by my sorcerer level + Charisma
I can then also move up to 30 ft without provoking opportunity attacks

features.name: Shifting Form
features.description:
I gain the ability to enter a liquid state while moving, squeezing through small spaces
When I move on my turn, I take half damage from opportunity attacks
I can move through any enemy's space, but can't willingly end my move in that space
On my turn, I can move through any opening of at least 3 inches in diameter
I can't end my move in a space smaller than one size category smaller than I am

features.name: Water Soul
features.description:
I no longer need to eat, drink, or sleep; Critical hits against me become normal hits
I gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage

features.name: Giant Eagle Spirit Companion
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have my giant eagle spirit animal materialize or dismiss it
It has all the stats of a giant eagle and adds my Wis mod to its attacks and saves
Its HP is half my ranger level or the total in its stat block, whichever is higher
It takes it turn right after my initiative and is under my complete control

features.name: Seeker's Eye
features.description:
When I call my spirit animal, I can choose a creature that I can see
Until the end of my next turn, all attacks against the target have advantage

features.name: Eyes of the Dark
features.description:
I have 60 ft darkvision and can cast Darkness by spending 1 sorcery point
I can see through any darkness spell I cast using this ability

features.name: Strength of the Grave
features.description:
When damage reduces me to 0 HP, that isn't radiant damage or a critical hit,
I can make a Constitution save (DC 5 + damage taken) to drop to 1 HP instead

features.name: Hound of Ill Omen
features.description:
As a bonus action, I target a creature I can see and summon a hound within 30 ft of it
The hound has all the stats of a medium sized dire wolf with the following exceptions:
• At the start of its turn, it automatically knows where the target is
• It can only move towards and make (opportunity) attack against the target
• It can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain
• It takes 5 force damage if it ends its turn inside an object
The target has disadvantage on saves vs. my spells while the hound is within 5 ft of it

features.name: Shadow Walk
features.description:
As a bonus action when I'm in dim light or darkness, I can teleport up to 120 ft
The destination has to be unoccupied, within line of sight, and in dim light or darkness

features.name: Shadow Form
features.description:
As a bonus action, I transform into a shadow form for 1 minute
While transformed, I have resistance to all damage types except force damage
Also, I can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain
I take 5 force damage if I end my turn inside an object

features.name: Eyes of the Dark
features.description: I gain 120 ft darkvision

features.name: Strength of the Grave
features.description:
When damage reduces me to 0 HP, that isn't radiant damage or a critical hit,
I can make a Charisma save (DC 5 + damage taken) to drop to 1 HP instead

features.name: Darkness
features.description:
I learn Darkness, which doesn't count against my number of spells known
I can also cast it by spending 2 sorcery points and then I can see through it normally

features.name: Hound of Ill Omen
features.description:
As a bonus action, I summon a hound within 30 ft of a creature I see within 120 ft
The hound has all the stats of a dire wolf with the following exceptions:
• It is medium size and counts as a monstrosity not a beast
• It starts with a number of temporary hit points equal to half my sorcerer level
• At the start of its turn, it automatically knows where the (hidden) target is
• It can only move towards and make (opportunity) attack against the target
• It can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain
• It takes 5 force damage if it ends its turn inside an object
The target has disadvantage on saves vs. my spells while the hound is within 5 ft of it
It disappears if reduced to 0 HP, if the target is reduced to 0 HP, or after 5 minutes

features.name: Shadow Walk
features.description:
As a bonus action when I'm in dim light or darkness, I can teleport up to 120 ft
The destination has to be unoccupied, within line of sight, and in dim light or darkness

features.name: Umbral Form
features.description:
As a bonus action, I transform into a shadow form for 1 minute
While transformed, I have resistance to all damage except force and radiant damage
Also, I can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain
I take 5 force damage if I end my turn inside an object
This ends early if I end it as a bonus action, I die, or I'm incapacitated

features.name: Steady Aim
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can carefully aim my ranged weapon on a target I can see in range
Until the end of my turn, my attacks with this weapon on that target get to:
Ignore half and three-quarter cover; Add 2 + half fighter level damage per hit

features.name: Careful Eyes
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can take the Search action
I gain proficiency with one skill, Perception, Investigation, or Survival

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one from: Perception, Investigation, or Survival

features.name: Close-Quarters Shooting
features.description:
I don't have disadvantage when making a ranged attack while within 5 ft of a hostile
A hostile within 5 ft that I hit with a ranged attack on my turn, can't take reactions
This lasts until the end of my turn

features.name: Rapid Strike
features.description:
If I have adv. on an attack, I can forgo it to make an extra attack as a bonus action
This attack has to be with the same weapon against the same target

features.name: Snap Shot
features.description: I can make one more ranged attack with my Attack action on my first turn of combat

features.name: Psionic Energy Dice
features.description:
I gain twice my proficiency bonus of psionic energy dice (PsiD) that fuel my psionics
I regain all expended psionic energy dice after a long rest; See psionic powers on page 3
As a bonus action once per short rest, I can regain one expended psionic energy die

features.name: Psychic Blades
features.description:
As part of an Attack action, I can manifest a psychic blade from a free hand to attack
It vanishes immediately after making the attack and leaves no mark on its target
As a bonus action after this attack, I can manifest and attack with another psychic blade
To do this, my other hand needs to be free as well and this blade does only 1d4 damage

features.name: Soul Blades
features.description: My psi-suffused soul grants me more psionic powers, see the 3rd page "Notes" section

features.name: Psychic Veil
features.description:
As an action, I can become invisible along with what I'm wearing or carrying for 1 hour
I can end it (no action); It also ends if I damage a creature or force one to make a save
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a psionic energy die (PsiD)

features.name: Rend Mind
features.description:
When I use my psychic blade to deal sneak attack damage to a target, I can have it save
It must make a Wisdom save (DC 8 + Prof Bonus + Dex mod) or be stunned for 1 min
It can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns to end being stunned
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending three psionic energy dice (3 PsiD)

features.name: Psionic Enhancement
features.description:
When I finish a long rest, I can choose one of these benefits until my next long rest:
 • Talk telepathically with those I can see in 30 ft; Can respond if they know a language
 • Increase my walking speed by 5 ft
 • Increase my maximum and current HP with my Intelligence modifier plus rogue level

features.name: Psychic Blade
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can create a magical blade from one or both of my hands
Disappear if I'm incapacitated, leave my hand (not thrown), or I dismiss it (no action)

features.name: Terrifying Blade
features.description:
When I damage a creature with my psychic blade, it must make a Wisdom saving throw
If it fails, it is frightened of me until my the start of my next turn
If it succeeds, it is immune to this for 24 hours; DC 8 + my Prof Bonus + my Int mod

features.name: Psychic Veil
features.description:
As an action, I can become invisible along with everything I'm wearing or carrying
This ends after 10 minutes, if I make an attack, or if I force a creature to make a save

features.name: Rend Mind
features.description:
As an action, I can deal 12d6 psychic damage to a creature I can see within 30 ft
It also makes an Int save or is stunned until my next turn starts; Half damage on success
It has disadv. on the save if I'm hidden from it; DC 10 + my Prof Bonus + my Int mod
I must have a psychic blade manifested to do so and one vanishes when I use this feature

features.name: Dire Wolf Spirit Companion
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have my dire wolf spirit animal materialize or dismiss it
It has all the stats of a dire wolf and adds my Wis mod to its attacks and saves
Its HP is half my ranger level or the total in its stat block, whichever is higher
It takes it turn right after my initiative and is under my complete control

features.name: Stalker's Fangs
features.description:
When I call my spirit animal, I can choose a creature that I can see
The target's next weapon attack hit deals 2d6 + Wis mod extra slashing damage

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I gain proficiency with shields, simple weapons and martial weapons

features.name: Metal Magic
features.description: My affinity for metal allows me to select from a broader range of spells

features.name: Stone's Durability
features.description:
My hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to my sorcerer level
As an action, I can gain an AC of 13 + Constitution modifier + shield
This AC lasts until I don armor, I'm incapacitated, or use a bonus action to end it

features.name: Stone Aegis
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can grant an aegis to an ally I can see within 60 ft of me
The aegis reduces any bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage taken by the target
This aegis lasts for 1 minute, until I use it again, or until I'm incapacitated
As a reaction when the protected ally is attacked with a melee attack, I can teleport
I can do this only if the attacker is within 60 ft of me and I can see it
I teleport to an empty space next to it and make one melee weapon attack against it
If this attack hits, the attack deals extra force damage

features.name: Stone's Edge
features.description:
Once per casting of a spell that deals damage, I can choose one creature damaged by it
That creature takes extra force damage equal to half my sorcerer level

features.name: Earth Master's Aegis
features.description: My Stone's Aegis can now affect up to three creatures

features.name: Tempestuous Magic
features.description:
As a bonus action, before or after casting a 1st-level or higher spell, I can fly 10 ft
This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks as whirling gust of air surround me

features.name: Wind Speaker
features.description: I can speak, read, and write Primordial (and its dialects Aquan, Auran, Ignan, Terran)

features.name: Heart of the Storm
features.description:
I have resistance to lightning and thunder damage
When I start casting a 1st-level or higher spell that deals lightning or thunder damage,
I deal lightning or thunder damage to creatures of my choice that I can see within 10 ft

features.name: Storm Guide
features.description:
As an action, I can stop rain around me in 20-ft radius; bonus action for it to resume
As a bonus action, I can choose the direction of wind around me in a 100-ft radius
This lasts until the end of my next turn and doesn't alter the wind's speed

features.name: Storm's Fury
features.description:
As a reaction when hit by a melee attack, I can deal lightning damage to the attacker
The attacker must also make a Strength save or be pushed up to 20 ft away from me

features.name: Wind Soul
features.description:
I have immunity to lightning and thunder damage and gain magical 60 ft fly speed
As an action, I reduce my fly speed to 30 ft and give allies 30 ft fly speed for 1 hour
I can do this once per short rest for up to 3 + my Charisma modifier allies within 30 ft

features.name: Gathered Swarm
features.description:
I'm bonded to a swarm of nature spirits crawling in my space; I choose their appearance
Once on each of my turns, I can have it assist me after I hit a creature with an attack:
 • The target takes an extra 1d6 piercing damage from the swarm
 • The target must make a Strength save or be moved 15 ft horizontally by the swarm
 • The swarm moves me 5 ft horizontally
I get to choose the direction whenever the target or I'm moved by the swarm
I'm bonded to a swarm of nature spirits crawling in my space; I choose their appearance
Once on each of my turns, I can have it assist me after I hit a creature with an attack:
 • The target takes an extra 1d6 piercing damage from the swarm
 • The target must make a Strength save or be moved 15 ft horizontally by the swarm
 • The swarm moves me 5 ft horizontally
I get to choose the direction whenever the target or I'm moved by the swarm
