features.name: Swarmkeeper Magic
features.description:
I learn Mage Hand; When cast, its hand takes the form of my swarming nature spirits
I get bonus spells known, which do not count against the number of spells I can know

features.name: Writhing Tide
features.description: As a bonus action, I can fly on my swarm for 1 minute: 10 ft flying speed and can hover

features.name: Mighty Swarm
features.description:
[improves Gathered Swarm, see above]
   Now 1d8 damage, knocks prone on failed save, or grants me half cover until next turn

features.name: Swarming Dispersal
features.description:
As a reaction when I take damage, I can gain resistance to that damage and teleport
I vanish into my swarm and teleport to an unoccupied space within 30 ft that I can see

features.name: Gathered Swarm
features.description:
I constantly have a swarm of fey spirits crawling in my space, they look like Tiny beasts
As a bonus action, I can agitate that swarm for 1 minute, empowering my attacks
Once per turn when I hit with a weapon attack, I can have it deal extra force damage
In addition, the creature hit is moved 5 ft towards or away from me (my choice)

features.name: Swarmkeeper Magic
features.description:
I learn Mage Hand; When I cast it, the hand takes the form of swarming nature spirits
I get bonus spells known, which do not count against the number of spells I can know

features.name: Writhing Tide
features.description:
Whenever I activate Gathered Swarm, I gain one additional benefit of my choice:
 • I gain +10 ft walking speed and I can take the Disengage action as a bonus action
 • I gain climb speed equal to walk speed & need no check for difficult surfaces or ceilings
 • I gain a 10 ft fly speed and I can hover

features.name: Fancy Footwork
features.description:
Enemies I make a melee attack against in my turn can't use opportunity attacks on me
This lasts until the end of my current turn

features.name: Rakish Audacity
features.description:
I don't need advantage to sneak attack if my target is the only one within 5 ft of me
I still can't sneak attack if I have disadv.; I add my Charisma modifier to initiative rolls

addMod.text: I can add my Charisma modifier to initiative rolls.

features.name: Panache
features.description:
As an action, I can beguile a creature that hears and understands me, for 1 minute
It must succeed a Wis (Insight) check opposed by my Cha (Persuasion) or be affected as:
• A hostile target gains disadv. on attacks and can't do opportunity attacks vs. not-me
  This effect ends if an ally attacks or casts a spell vs. it, or if it and I are 60 ft apart
• Targets that are not hostile are charmed and regard me as a friendly acquaintance
  This effect ends if me or an ally do anything harmful to it

features.name: Elegant Maneuver
features.description: As a bonus action, I can gain adv. on my next Dex (Acrobatics) or Str (Athletics) check

features.name: Master Duelist
features.description: Once per short rest, when I miss with an attack roll, I can roll again with advantage

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I gain proficiency with sidearms and hacking tools

features.name: Technological Savant
features.description:
I can use a single tablet computer (or similar) instead of a spellbook
Spells copied into this device cost half the normal amount of gp

features.name: Program Spell
features.description:
I can cast a spell into a device of at least smartphone-level of computing power
Variables of the spell are chosen at time of casting; I can have only one active at a time
As an action within the next 48 hours, the spell can be cast from the device
I can't activate a concentration spell in this way if I am concentrating on another spell

features.name: Online Casting
features.description:
I can cast a spell, that is not area-of-effect, through networked electronic devices
If the spell requires sight/hearing, the audio/visual must be transmitted electronically
The spell's range is determined from me to my device plus from the target to its device

features.name: Chained Device
features.description:
I can use a held/worn tablet computer to concentrate on a spell I cast instead of me
If the device is separated from me, turned off, or broken, the effect is lost

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor

features.name: Wrath of the Storm
features.description:
As a reaction, when a creature I can see within 5 ft hits me, I can thunderously rebuke
It takes 2d8 lightning or thunder damage (my choice) that a Dex save can halve

features.name: Channel Divinity: Destructive Wrath
features.description: Instead of rolling, I can do maximum damage when I do lightning or thunder damage

features.name: Thunderbolt Strike
features.description: When I deal lightning damage to a Large or smaller foe, I can push it up to 10 ft away

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Stormborn
features.description: Whenever I'm not underground or indoors, I have a fly speed equal to my current speed

features.name: Fey Presence
features.description:
As an action, all creatures in a 10-ft cube around me must make a Wisdom save
If failed, they're all charmed or frightened (my choice) until the end of my next turn

features.name: Misty Escape
features.description:
As a reaction, when I take damage, I can turn invisible and teleport up to 60 ft
I stay invisible until the start of my next turn or until I attack or cast a spell

features.name: Beguiling Defenses
features.description:
As a reaction, when a creature tries to charm me, I can turn the charm back on it
It must make a Wis save or be charmed by me for 1 minute or until taking damage
I am immune to being charmed

features.name: Dark Delirium
features.description:
As an action, a creature within 60 ft must make a Wis save or be charmed/frightened
This lasts for 1 minute or until my concentration is broken or it takes damage
During this time, it can't see or hear anything but the illusion, me, and itself

features.name: Bonus Cantrips
features.description: I learn the Light and Sacred Flame cantrips, not counting for the number I can know

features.name: Healing Light
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can heal a creature I can see within 60 ft by expending dice
I can expend up to my Charisma modifier (min 1) of dice from my pool at a time
The target heals HP equal to the roll of the dice; I regain all expended dice on a long rest

features.name: Radiant Soul
features.description:
I add my Cha modifier once to the fire or radiant damage of cantrips and spells I cast
This bonus only applies to one target; Also, I have resistance to radiant damage

features.name: Celestial Resilience
features.description:
When I finish a short or long rest, I and up to five allies gain temporary hit points
I get my warlock level + Cha mod, while my allies get half my warlock level + Cha mod

features.name: Searing Vengeance
features.description:
At the start of my turn when I would make a death save, I can instead spring back up
I recover HP equal to half my current HP maximum, and can then stand up if I choose
When I do, creatures of my choice within 30 ft take 2d8 + Cha mod in radiant damage
Damaged creatures are blinded until the end of my current turn

features.name: Bonus Cantrips
features.description: I know the Light and Sacred Flame cantrips

features.name: Healing Light
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can heal a creature on touch by expending dice from my pool
I can expend up to my Charisma modifier (min 1) of dice at a time
The target heals HP equal to the roll of the dice; I regain all expended dice on a long rest

features.name: Radiant Soul
features.description:
I add my Cha modifier to cantrips/spells I cast that deal fire or radiant damage
Additionally, I have resistance to radiant damage

features.name: Radiant Resilience
features.description:
When I finish a short or long rest, I and up to five allies gain temporary hit points
I get my warlock level + Cha mod, while my allies get half my warlock level + Cha mod

features.name: Searing Vengeance
features.description:
At the start of my turn when I would make a death save, I can instead spring back up
I can stand up and recover HP equal to half my current HP maximum
Also, creatures of my choice within 30 ft of me take 2d8 + Cha mod in radiant damage
Damaged creatures are blinded until the end of my current turn

features.name: Gift of the Sea
features.description: I have a swimming speed of 40 ft and I can breathe underwater

features.name: Tentacle of the Deeps
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can summon or move a spectral tentacle and make an attack with it
I can summon it to a space within 60 ft that I can see or move an existing one 30 ft
I make melee spell attacks with 10 ft reach with it that deal cold damage
Creatures hit by the tentacle suffer 10 ft speed reduction until the start of my next turn
The 10-ft long tentacle lasts for 1 minute or until I summon another

features.name: Guardian Coil
features.description:
As a reaction when I or a creature I see in 10 ft of my tentacle is damaged, it can help
The tentacle interposes itself, reducing the damage of the attack for that creature

features.name: Oceanic Soul
features.description:
I gain resistance to cold damage now that I'm even more at home in the depths
While I'm fully submerged, others who are as well can understand my speech and I theirs

features.name: Grasping Tentacles
features.description:
I learn Evard's Black Tentacles; Once per long rest, I can cast it without using a spell slot
It counts as a warlock spell for me, but not towards the number of spell I can know
Whenever I cast it, I gain temporary hit points equal to my warlock level
Moreover, damage can't break my concentration on this spell

additional: 10 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
11 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
12 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
13 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
14 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
15 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
16 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
17 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
18 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
19 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS
20 temp HP; 1× per long rest no SS

features.name: Fathomless Plunge
features.description:
As an action, I can teleport myself and up to 5 willing creatures I can see within 30 ft
We reappear up to 1 mile away, inside or within 30 ft of a body of water I've seen

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.description: When I reduce a hostile to 0 HP, I gain Cha mod + warlock level temporary HP (min 1)

features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
features.description: When I make an ability check or saving throw, I can add 1d10 after rolling the d20

features.name: Fiendish Resilience
features.description:
After a short or long rest, I can choose one damage type to become resistant to
This lasts until I choose another type; Magical and silver weapons ignore this resistance

features.name: Hurl Through Hell
features.description:
When I hit a creature with an attack, I can instantly transport it through lower planes
It returns at the end of my next turn and takes 10d10 psychic damage if not a fiend

features.name: Choose Genie Kind
features.description: Use the "Choose Feature" button above to choose the kind of genie your patron is

features.name: Genie's Vessel
features.description:
My patron gifts me a magical vessel, a Tiny object, granting me a measure of its power
I choose the vessel's appearance; I can use it as my spellcasting focus for warlock spells
The vessel's AC is my spell save DC and it has my warlock level + Proficiency Bonus in HP
If it is destroyed or lost, I can get a replacement with a 1-hour ceremony during a rest

features.name: Genie's Vessel: Bottled Respite
features.description:
As an action, I can vanish and enter the extradimensional space inside my genie's vessel
The vessel stays in its location; The space inside is a 20-ft high, 20-ft radius cylinder
As a bonus action, I can exit my vessel; I exit it early if I die or the vessel is destroyed
I can remain inside for twice my Proficiency Bonus in hours; Objects can be left inside

features.name: Genie's Wrath
features.description:
I can deal bonus damage on my attacks, its type depending on my patron's genie kind
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to choose the kind of genie your patron is

features.name: Elemental Gift
features.description:
I gain resistance to a damage type depending on my patron's genie kind
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to choose the kind of genie your patron is
As a bonus action, I can gain a flying speed of 30 ft and I can hover, for 10 minutes

features.name: Sanctuary Vessel
features.description:
When I enter my vessel I can have up to 5 willing creatures I can see in 30 ft join me
As a bonus action, I can eject any number of creatures from my genie's vessel
Everyone is ejected when I leave it, I die, or if the vessel is destroyed
Anyone who remains in the vessel for at least 10 min gains the benefits of a short rest
Also, HD spend as part of this short rest has my Proficiency Bonus added to the roll

features.name: Limited Wish
features.description:
As an action, I can cast a 6th-level or lower spell with a casting time time of one action
This can be any spell; It doesn't require any costly components, it simply takes effect

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I am proficient with hacking tools and know the On/Off cantrip

features.name: Information Surge
features.description:
As an action, I can cause a computerized device within 30 ft to make an Int save
If the device is held/used by a creature, that creature makes the saving throw
If the device is not held/used, it makes a save with a +0 modifier and disadvantage
On a failed save, the device stops functioning until the end of my next turn

features.name: Wire Walk
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can teleport through a hardwired network to a point I can see
Both where I start and end must be a device, cable, or socket connected to the network

features.name: Personal Encryption
features.description:
I have adv. on saves vs. scrying, thought detection, and magics for learning my location
If the effect doesn't let me a save, the user has disadv. on checks to use it on me, if any

features.name: Technovirus
features.description:
As an action, I make a melee spell attack to infect someone with a techno-organic virus
The target takes 8d10 psychic damage, or half that with a successful Con save
If it failed its save, I can use an action to cast Command on it while it remains infected
It makes its save vs. this Command with disadvantage and I can cast it at any range
It is infected until my next long rest; The virus can be removed with Lesser Restoration

features.name: Awakened Mind
features.description: I can telepathically speak to creatures I can see within 30 ft if they know a language

features.name: Entropic Ward
features.description:
As a reaction, when I'm attacked, I can impose disadvantage to that attack roll
If it misses me, I have adv. on my next attack vs. the attacker during my next turn

features.name: Thought Shield
features.description:
No one can read my mind unless I allow it; I have resistance to psychic damage
When I take psychic damage, the dealer of the psychic damage takes the same amount

features.name: Create Thrall
features.description:
As an action, I can charm an incapacitated humanoid by touch
While it is charmed, I can communicate with it telepathically if it is on the same plane
This lasts until the charm is removed (can be by Remove Curse) or I use this again

features.name: Hex Warrior
features.description:
I gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons
When I finish a long rest, I can imbue one weapon I touch with my will
Until my next long rest, I can use it with Charisma instead of Strength or Dexterity
I have to be proficient with the weapon and it can't have the two-handed property
This benefit also works with every weapon from Pact of the Blade, with no restriction

features.name: Hexblade's Curse
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can curse a creature I can see within 30 ft of me for 1 minute
• I add my proficiency bonus to damage rolls against the cursed target
• My attack rolls against the curse target score a critical hit on a roll of 19 and 20
• If the target dies while cursed, I regain HP equal to my warlock level + Cha mod
The curse ends after 1 minute, when the target dies, I die, or I'm incapacitated

features.name: Accursed Specter
features.description:
When I slay a humanoid, I can curse its soul and have it rise as a specter from its corpse
It has the stats of a specter with temporary hit points equal to half my warlock level
It rolls initiative and has its own turns, obeying my verbal commands
It gains a bonus to attack rolls equal to my Charisma modifier (min +0)
The specter remains until the end of my next long rest, at which point it vanishes

features.name: Armor of Hexes
features.description:
As a reaction when a Hexblade's Curse recipient hits me with an attack, I can roll a d6
On a result of 4 or higher, the attacks misses me instead, regardless of its d20 roll

features.name: Master of Hexes
features.description:
When the target of my Hexblade's Curse dies, I can curse another I can see within 30 ft
I can't do this while incapacitated and I don't regain HP from the death of the previous

features.name: Hex Warrior
features.description:
I gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons
With one-handed melee weapons I can use Charisma instead of Strength or Dexterity

features.name: Hexblade's Curse
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can curse a creature I can see within 30 ft of me for 1 minute
 - I add my proficiency bonus to damage rolls against the cursed target
 - My attack rolls against the curse target score a critical hit on a roll of 19 and 20
 - If the target dies while cursed, I regain HP equal to my warlock level + Cha mod

features.name: Shadow Hound
features.description:
My shadow becomes a hound of pure darkness; Truesight reveals its nature
As a bonus action, I can have it slip into the shadow of another I can see within 60 ft
I know the distance/direction to the target; I ignore 1/2, 3/4 cover of the target
My shadow returns to me if I use a bonus action to do so, I become incapacitated, 
a spell is used to stop it, or if one of us moves to another plane of existence

features.name: Armor of Hexes
features.description: Targets affected by my hexblade's curse have a 50% of missing me with any attack roll

features.name: Master of Hexes
features.description:
I no longer need to rest to be able to use my Hexblade's Curse again
However, when I curse a new target, the curse immediately ends on the previous target

features.name: Grasp of the Deep
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can summon or move a spectral tentacle and make an attack with it
I can summon it to a space within 60 ft that I can see or move an existing one 30 ft
I make melee spell attacks with 10 ft reach with it that deal cold or lightning damage
Creatures hit by the tentacle suffer 10 ft speed reduction until the start of my next turn
The 10-ft long tentacle lasts for 1 minute or until I summon another

features.name: Scion of the Deep
features.description:
I can communicate telepathically with any aberration, beast, elemental, or monstrosity
The creature must be within 120 ft of me and have an innate swimming speed

features.name: Fathomless Soul
features.description:
[cold resistance]
   I have a swimming speed equal to my walking speed; I can breathe both air and water

features.name: Guardian Grasp
features.description:
As a reaction when a creature in 10 ft of my tentacle takes damage, I can have it help
One creature takes only half damage and my spectral tentacle vanishes

features.name: Devouring Maw
features.description:
As an action, I can summon a 10-ft radius translucent maw within 60 ft for 1 minute
Creatures in the maw as it appear must Str save or be restrained, can repeat as action
Creatures starting their turn in the maw take 3d6 cold or lightning damage (my choice)
If a creature is in the maw at the start of my turn, I gain my warlock level in temp HP

features.name: Unleash the Depths
features.description:
As an action, I can choose one of the following effects to occur within 30 ft of me:
• Teleport myself and up to 5 willing creatures I can see within 30 ft of the chosen point
  The destination must be within 100 miles and visited by me within the last 24 hours
• 5 creatures within 30 ft of the chosen point that I can see are attacked by tentacles
  The targets take 6d10 cold or lightning damage (my choice) and are knocked prone
  Each can make a Dexterity save to halve the damage and avoid being knocked prone

features.name: Collector's Vessel
features.description:
My patron gives me a magical vessel, a Tiny object which I can use as a spellcasting focus
If I lose it, I can perform a 1-hour ceremony during a rest to receive a replacement
As an action while holding it, I can create a tether to a willing target I can see in 100 ft
This lasts for 1 hour, until I do this again, or the tethered target is reduced to 0 HP
It also ends when the tethered target ends its turn further than 100 ft from me
While the tether lasts, I add my Cha mod (min +1) to my Wis (Perception) checks
Also, I can have spells I cast originate from the tethered creature's space

features.name: Elemental Resistance
features.description:
When I finish a long rest, I can gain acid, cold, fire, or lightning resistance (my choice)
This lasts until I finish my next long rest; A creature tethered to my vessel also gains this

features.name: Genie's Entertainment
features.description:
As an action, I can have a creature I can see within 90 ft make a Charisma save
If failed, it is drawn into my vessel and teleported to my patron's court for 1 minute
In there it is stunned but unharmed; At the end of each of its turns it can save to return

features.name: Protective Wish
features.description:
As a reaction when I or my tethered creature is hit by an attack, we can swap places
As we both teleport to each others location, the one hit by the attack switches as well

features.name: Collector's Call
features.description:
As an action, I can implore my patron if I make a Persuasion check vs. my spell save DC
If I fail, the use is wasted; If I succeed, I can choose one of the following effects:
 • A creature I can see in 60 ft heals 8d6 HP and 1 disease or condition affecting it ends
   This condition can be blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, paralyzed, or poisoned
 • A creature I can see in 60 ft has disadv. on attacks & saves until my next turn starts
 • I can cast Legend Lore without using material components
I can regain a use of this by sacrificing 500 gp of nonmagical treasure to my patron

features.name: Sentinel Raven
features.description:
I gain the services of a spirit in the form of a raven (using the stats of a raven)
It always obeys my commands, rolls its own initiative, and can be slain
While it's within 100 ft, I can telepathically speak with it and see/hear what it does
While it's on my shoulder, I gain Darkvision 30 ft and add my Cha mod to Perception
While it's on my shoulder, it can't be targeted, take damage, or take actions
It vanishes if it is more than 5 miles away from me, it dies, or if I die
If it dies, I gain advantage on all attack rolls against its killer for 24 hours
After a short rest, I can recall it to me regardless of its location or if it died

addMod.text: While my sentinel raven is perched on my shoulder, I can add my Charisma modifier to Perception.

features.name: Soul of the Raven
features.description:
As a bonus action, when my raven is perched on my shoulder, I can merge our bodies
I become tiny and replace my speed with the raven's (10 ft, fly 50 ft)
I can then use my action only to Dash, Disengage, Dodge, Help, Hide, or Search
While merged, I still get all the benefits of my raven being perched on my shoulder
I can end this as an action

features.name: Raven's Shield
features.description: I can't be frightened, have advantage on death saves, and resistance to necrotic damage

features.name: Queen's Right Hand
features.description: I can cast Finger of Death once per long rest

features.name: Bolts from the Grave
features.description:
Immediately after I use my cunning action, I can unleash bolts of necrotic energy
This is a ranged spell attack with 30 ft range, which I'm proficient with, using Dexterity
If it hits, it deals my sneak attack damage, provided I didn't use sneak attack this turn

features.name: Revived Nature
features.description:
I have resistance to poison damage and adv. on saves against disease and being poisoned
I don't need to eat, drink, breathe, or sleep; I must spend 4 hours inactive for a long rest
I'm motionless during this inactive state, remain semiconscious, and can hear as normal

features.name: Tokens of Past Lives
features.description: I gain a chosen skill or tool proficiency and can change it whenever I finish a long rest

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one skill or tool; I can change the choice whenever I finish a long rest

features.name: Connect with the Dead
features.description:
I can cast Speak with Dead without a spell slot or material components using Intelligence
Doing this gives me a random proficiency (roll 1d3) that lasts until I finish my next rest:
[1] language of my choice; [2] skill or tool of my choice; [3] saving throw of my choice

features.name: Audience with Death
features.description:
I have adv. on death saves; Whenever I make one, I can ask a question to a death entity
It answers truthfully with "yes", "no", or "unknown", using the knowledge of all that died
When at 0 HP and healed or stabilized, I can change any of my traits/ideals/bonds/flaws

features.name: Shielding Aurora
features.description:
As a bonus action, I create a whirling aurora of brilliant energy around me
It lasts until the end of my next turn and grants me resistance to all damage
Any hostile ending its turn in 10 ft of me get Warlock level + Cha mod radiant damage

features.name: Astral Refuge
features.description:
As an action, I can step into an astral refuge, coming back at the end of the turn
While in the astral refuge, I can take two actions to cast spells targeting just me

features.name: Far Wanderer
features.description: I no longer need to breathe, and I gain resistance to fire damage and cold damage

features.name: Astral Sequestration
features.description:
With a 5 minutes ritual, I can shift myself and ten willing creatures to the Astral Plane
While sequestered an Astral Plane, we gain the full benefits of a short rest
After this rest, we return to the same space as before, without any time having passed

features.name: Form of Dread
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can transform for 1 minute and gain the following benefits:
 • I gain temporary hit points equal to 1d10 + my warlock level
 • I am immune to the frightened condition
 • Once per turns when I hit an attack, I can force the target to make a Wis save
   If the target fails this save, it is frightened of me until the end of my next turn

features.name: Grave Touched
features.description:
I no longer need to eat, drink, or breathe
Once per turn if I damage a creature with an attack, I can change its type to necrotic
While I'm in my Form of Dread, I can roll one extra damage die for this necrotic damage

features.name: Necrotic Husk
features.description:
I have resistance to necrotic damage, or immunity while I'm in my Form of Dread
As a reaction when reduced to 0 HP, I can drop to 1 HP instead and erupt with energy
Each creature of my choice within 30 ft takes 2d10 + my warlock level necrotic damage
After this, I gain 1 level of exhaustion and must complete 1d4 long rests to do so again

features.name: Spirit Projection
features.description:
As an action, I can project my spirit from my body, leaving it suspended and unconscious
This lasts 1 hour or until my concentration is broken; Damage and effects affect both
When it ends, I can have my spirit return to my body or my body teleport to my spirit
My spirit has my abilities, but no gear; While projecting I gain the following benefits:
 • My spirit and body gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage
 • My conjuration/necromancy spells need no verbal, somatic, non-costly material comp.
 • I gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed and can hover
 • Move through creatures/objects as difficult terrain; 1d10 force damage if end turn in
 • While in my Form of Dread, once per turns when I deal necrotic damage, I can heal
   I regain hit points equal to half the amount of necrotic damage dealt

features.name: Form of Dread
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can transform for 1 minute and gain the following benefits:
 • I gain temporary hit points equal to 1d10 + my warlock level
 • I am immune to the frightened condition
 • Once per turns when I hit an attack, I can force the target to make a Wis save
   If the target fails this save, it is frightened of me until the end of my next turn

features.name: Grave Touched
features.description:
I no longer need to eat, drink, or breathe
When I damage a creature with an attack, I can change the damage type to necrotic
While I'm in my Form of Dread, I can roll one extra damage die for this necrotic damage

features.name: Mortal Husk
features.description:
I have resistance to necrotic damage, or immunity while I'm in my Form of Dread
When I'm reduced to 0 HP, I can cause my body to explode and I revive with 1 HP after
Each creature of my choice within 30 ft takes 2d10 + my warlock level necrotic damage
After this, I gain 1 level of exhaustion and must complete 1d4 long rests to do so again

features.name: Spirit Projection
features.description:
As an action, I can project my spirit from my body, leaving it suspended and unconscious
This lasts 1 hour or until my concentration is broken; Damage and effects affect both
When it ends, I can have my spirit return to my body or my body teleport to my spirit
My spirit has my abilities, but no gear; While projecting I gain the following benefits:
 • My spirit and body gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage
 • My conjuration/necromancy spells need no verbal, somatic, non-costly material comp.
 • I gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed and can hover
 • Move through creatures/objects as difficult terrain; 1d10 force damage if end turn in
 • While in my Form of Dread, once per turns when I deal necrotic damage, I can heal
   I regain hit points equal to half the amount of necrotic damage dealt

features.name: Among the Dead
features.description:
I learn the Spare the Dying cantrip and gain advantage on saving throws vs. diseases
If an undead targets me directly with an attack or spell, it must make a Wisdom save
On a fail, it must choose a new target or forfeit its attack or harmful spell
On a success or if I attack or cast a harmful spell on it, it is immune for 24 hours

features.name: Defy Death
features.description:
I regain 1d8 + my Constitution modifier in HP when I succeed on a Death saving throw
I also regain this amount whenever I use Spare the Dying to stabilize a creature

features.name: Undying Nature
features.description:
I can hold my breath indefinitely; I don't require food, water, or sleep (I still need rest)
I age more slowly, only 1 year for every 10 years that pass; I can't be magically aged

features.name: Indestructible Life
features.description: As a bonus action, I can regain HP and reattach severed body parts

features.name: Radiant Soul
features.description:
I add my Cha modifier to cantrips/spells I cast that deal fire or radiant damage
I have resistance to radiant damage and know the Light and Sacred Flame cantrips

features.name: Searing Vengeance
features.description:
When I would make a death saving throw, I can instead spring back to my feet
I immediately stand up and recover HP equal to half my current HP maximum
Also, all hostiles within 30 ft of me take 10 + Charisma modifier in radiant damage
Damaged creatures are blinded until the end of my next turn

features.name: Radiant Resilience
features.description:
When I finish a short or long rest, I and up to five allies gain temporary hit points
I get my warlock level + Cha mod, while my allies get half my warlock level + Cha mod

features.name: Healing Light
features.description:
As a bonus action, I touch a creature and heal it by expending dice from my pool
I subtract the number of d6's used from my pool; I can expend up to 5d6 at a time
The target heals HP equal to the roll of the dice; I regain expended uses with a long rest

features.name: Fast Hands
features.description: As a Bonus Action, I can **Use an Object**: take the Utilize action, or take the Magic action to activate a magic item requiring that action. As a Bonus Action, I can make a Dexterity (**Sleight of Hand**) check to pick a lock or disarm a trap with Thieves' Tools, or pick a pocket.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.description: I gain a Climb Speed equal to my Speed. I can determine my jump distance using Dexterity.

features.name: Supreme Sneak
features.description: [extra Cunning Strike option]

features.name: Use Magic Device
features.description:
I can have **Attunement** with up to four magic items at once.
When I use a magic item property with **Charges**, on a roll of 6 on 1d6 none are expended.
I can use **Spell Scrolls** with Intelligence as my spellcasting ability. If the spell is 2nd-level or higher, I need to make an Int (Arcana) check (DC 10 + spell level) or the scroll disintegrates.

features.name: Thief's Reflexes
features.description: I can take a second turn during the first round of any combat, at my Initiative minus 10.

features.name: Bladesong
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can start the bladesong for 1 minute; I can dismiss it at any time
It stops when I wear a shield, medium or heavy armor, or attack with two hands
While the bladesong is active I have the following benefits:
 • Intelligence modifier (min 1) to AC
 • Base walking speed increases by 10 foot
 • Advantage on Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks
 • Intelligence modifier (min 1) to concentration saves for maintaining conc. on a spell

features.name: Training in War and Song
features.description: I gain proficiency with light armor, a one-handed melee weapon, and Performance

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description:
I can attack twice instead of once when I take the Attack action on my turn
Moreover, I can cast one of my cantrips in place of one of those attacks

features.name: Song of Defense
features.description:
As a reaction while my bladesong is active, I can expend a spell slot to reduce damage
The damage I take is reduced by 5 for every level of the spell slot I expend

features.name: Song of Victory
features.description: While my bladesong is active, I add my Int mod (min 1) to melee weapon attack damage

features.name: Runes of Understanding
features.description:
I always have Comprehend Languages prepared and can cast it without using a spell slot
It doesn't count against the number of spells I can prepare

features.name: Runic Empowerment
features.description:
When I cast a spell using a spell slot, I can invoke one of the following runes:
 • Life Rune: Me or a creature I can see within 30 ft gains 5 temp HP per spell slot level
 • War Rune: A creature I can see within 30 ft is marked until the end of my next turn
   Attack rolls against it gain a bonus equal to half the spell slot level, rounded up
 • Wind Rune: Until my next turn starts, my speed increases by 5 ft per spell slot level
   Additionally, my movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks

features.name: Sigils of Warding
features.description:
As a reaction when I fail a Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution save, I can call on a rune
I expend a use of my Runic Empowerment feature and succeed on the save instead

features.name: Rune Maven
features.description:
Whenever I use Arcane Recovery, I also regain uses of Runic Empowerment
I regain a number of uses equal to half my Intelligence modifier, rounded up (min 1)

features.name: Engraved Enmity
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can have a creature I can see within 60 ft make a Wisdom save
If failed, it is marked by an enmity rune for 1 min, or until I lose my concentration
A glowing energy mote hovers over the marked and it suffers the following effects:
 • The marked has disadvantage on saving throws against spells I cast
 • The glow makes the marked visible even if invisible, and they can't become invisible
 • When marking and as a bonus action on subsequent turns, I can curse the creature
   The next time an ally hits the cursed with an attack, it also takes 1d8 force damage
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a 3rd-level or higher spell slot (SS 3+)

features.name: Infuse Potions
features.description:
I can produce magic potions if I spend 10 minutes and expend a spell slot
I can not regain the spell slot until the potion is consumed or a week has passed

features.name: Infuse Scrolls
features.description:
I can produce a scroll after a short rest if I spend 10 minutes and my Arcane Recovery
I subtract the spell's level from the levels worth of slots I regain using Arcane Recovery
This reduction applies till the scroll is used and I finish a long rest

features.name: Infuse Weapons and Armor
features.description:
I can spend 10 minutes to produce a magic weapon, armor, a shield, or ammunition
The item retains its magic for 8 hours and the spell slot I expend is:
2nd: +1 ammunition (20 pieces), 3rd: +1 weapon or +1 shield, 4th: +1 armor,
5th: +2 weapon or +2 ammunition (20 pieces), 6th: +3 armor.

features.name: Superior Artificer
features.description: I can create one additional scroll, potion, weapon, or armor when I use Infuse

features.name: Master Artificer
features.description:
I can produce a variety of magic items from Tables A and B from the DMG
It takes 1 week for such an item and I cannot do it again for a month

features.name: Blessing of the Trickster
features.description:
As an action, a willing creature I touch (not me) has adv. on Dex (Stealth) checks
This lasts for 1 hour or until I use it again

features.name: Channel Divinity: Invoke Duplicity
features.description:
As an action, I create illusory duplicates of myself within 30 ft of me for 1 min (conc)
As a bonus action, I can move them 30 ft to space(s) I can see within 120 ft of me
I can cast spells as though I were in a duplicate's space, using my own senses
I have advantage on attacks if the target is within 5 ft of a duplicate and me

features.name: Channel Divinity: Cloak of Shadows
features.description: As an action, I become invisible until the end of my next turn or I attack/cast a spell

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Improved Duplicity
features.description:
When I use Invoke Duplicity, I make four illusory duplicates instead of one
I can move any number of the illusory duplicates as part of the same bonus action

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor

features.name: Eyes of Night
features.description:
I gain darkvision out to a range of 300 ft; As an action, I can grant others this as well
I can grant it for 1 hour to my Wis mod (min 1) of willing targets I can see within 10 ft
I can do this once per long rest, or by expending a spell slot (SS 1+)

features.name: Vigilant Blessing
features.description:
As an action, I can grant myself or a creature I touch adv. on the next initiative roll
This benefit ends immediately after the roll or when I use this feature again

features.name: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary
features.description:
As an action, I can use my holy symbol to create a 30-ft radius sphere around myself
It moves with me, is filled with dim light, and lasts for 1 min or until I'm incapacitated
When a creature, including me, ends its turn inside the sphere, I can grant it a benefit:
 • I grant it temporary hit points equal to 1d6 + my cleric level
 • I end one effect on it causing it to be charmed or frightened
From 17th-level onwards, me and my allies have half cover while inside the sphere

features.name: Steps of Night
features.description:
As a bonus action when I'm in dim light or darkness, I can magically grant myself flight
I gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed for 1 minute

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Twilight Shroud
features.description: Me and my allies have half cover while in the sphere created by my Twilight Sanctuary

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor

features.name: Eyes of Night
features.description:
I gain Darkvision with unlimited range and can give this benefit to allies
As an action, I can grant this to chosen creatures I can see within 10 ft for 10 minutes

features.name: Vigilant Blessing
features.description:
As an action, I can grant myself or a creature I touch adv. on the next initiative roll
This benefit ends immediately after the roll or when I use this feature again

features.name: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary
features.description:
As an action, I can use my holy symbol to create a 30-ft radius sphere around myself
It moves with me, is filled with dim light, and lasts for 1 min or until I'm incapacitated
When a creature, including me, ends its turn inside the sphere, I can grant it a benefit
It either gains 1d8 temp HP or one effect causing it to be charmed or frightened ends

features.name: Steps of the Brave
features.description:
I have adv. on saves against being frightened
As a bonus action while I'm in dim light or darkness, I can give myself a fly speed
This fly speed is equal to my walking speed and lasts until the end of my next turn

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Midnight Shroud
features.description:
When I use a spell slot to cast Darkness, I can choose my Wis mod of creatures I can see
The chosen creatures can see through the Darkness; I can be one of the chosen creatures

features.name: Emboldening Bond
features.description:
As an action, I can magically bond two willing targets I can see in 30 ft (can be me)
While within 30 ft of the other, a bonded target can add +d4 to a save, attack, or check
This can only be added once per turn; The bond lasts for 1 hour or until I use this again
I can do this once per long rest, after which I can do so by expending a spell slot (SS 1+)

While within 30 ft of the other, a bonded target can add +d4 to a save, attack, or check
This can only be added once per turn; The bond lasts for 1 hour or until I use this again
I can do this once per long rest, after which I can do so by expending a spell slot (SS 1+)

While on the same plane, a bonded target can add +d4 to a save, attack, or check
This can only be added once per turn; The bond lasts for 1 hour or until I use this again
I can do this once per long rest, after which I can do so by expending a spell slot (SS 1+)

I can do this once per long rest, after which I can do so by expending a spell slot (SS 1+)

This can only be added once per turn; The bond lasts for 1 hour or until I use this again
I can do this once per long rest, after which I can do so by expending a spell slot (SS 1+)

While on the same plane, a bonded target can add +d4 to a save, attack, or check
This can only be added once per turn; The bond lasts for 1 hour or until I use this again
I can do this once per long rest, after which I can do so by expending a spell slot (SS 1+)

features.name: Channel Divinity: Shared Burden
features.description:
As a reaction when a creature I can see in 30 ft takes damage, I can divide that damage
I then choose a number of willing creatures that I can see equal to my Wis mod (min 1)
I distribute the damage over these and the original target, each taking at least 1 damage
Damage resistances and vulnerabilities are only applied after the damage is distributed

features.name: Protective Bond
features.description:
My emboldening bond now also allows the two bonded to shield each other of damage
When the other takes damage, one can use its reaction to give it resistance to all damage
This resistance lasts until the end of the current turn

additional: the bonded must be within 30 ft

features.name: Potent Spellcasting
features.description: I add my Wisdom modifier to the damage I deal with my cleric cantrips

features.name: Enduring Unity
features.description:
The 30 ft restriction no longer applies to my emboldening and protective bond features
My emboldening bond now also empowers a bonded if the other is reduced to 0 HP
If that happens, the bonded creature above 0 HP gains the following benefits:
 • Advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws; Resistance to all damage
 • As an action, it can touch its bonded partner to expend and roll HD to heal
These benefits lasts for 1 minute or until the downed creature regains at least 1 HP

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: I gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor

features.name: War Priest
features.description: When I use the Attack action, I can make a weapon attack as a bonus action

features.name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike
features.description: When I make an attack roll, I can add a +10 bonus to the roll after seeing the d20 roll

features.name: Channel Divinity: War God's Blessing
features.description:
As a reaction, when a creature within 30 ft makes an attack roll, I can bless its attack
The creature then adds a +10 bonus to the roll; I can do this after seeing the d20 roll

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: Once per turn, when I hit a creature with a weapon attack, I can do extra damage

features.name: Avatar of Battle
features.description: I have resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage from nonmagical weapons

features.name: Arcane Deflection
features.description:
As a reaction when I'm hit by an attack, I can gain +2 to my AC against that attack
As a reaction when I fail a save, I can gain +4 bonus to that saving throw
After I do either, I can't cast spells other than cantrips until the end of my next turn

features.name: Tactical Wit
features.description: I gain a bonus to my initiative rolls equal to my Intelligence modifier

addMod.text: I can add my Intelligence modifier to initiative rolls.

features.name: Power Surge
features.description:
I have a pool of stored power surges that I can use to empower my damaging spells
I gain a power surge whenever I successfully end a spell with Dispel Magic or Counterspell
This pool can store a number of power surges equal to my Intelligence modifier (min 1)
It resets to 1 power surge after a long rest or when I have 0 surges left after a short rest
When I deal damage with a wizard spell, I can spend a power surge to do extra damage
One target takes half my wizard level in force damage; I can do this only once per turn

features.name: Durable Magic
features.description: While I'm maintaining concentration on a spell, I gain +2 to AC and all saving throws

features.name: Deflecting Shroud
features.description:
When I use my Arcane Deflection feature, magical energy arcs from me to creatures
Up to 3 targets I can see within 60 ft of me take half my wizard level in force damage

features.name: Arcane Deflection
features.description:
As a reaction when I'm hit by an attack, I can gain +2 to my AC against that attack
As a reaction when I fail a Con save, I can gain +4 bonus to that saving throw
After I do either, I can't cast spells other than cantrips until the end of my next turn

features.name: Tactical Wit
features.description: I gain a bonus to my initiative rolls equal to my Intelligence modifier

addMod.text: I can add my Intelligence modifier to initiative rolls.

features.name: Power Surge
features.description:
When multiple targets have to save vs. one of my spells, I can have it do more damage
On the turn I cast the spell, I can roll 2 additional damage dice for it

features.name: Durable Magic
features.description: While I'm maintaining concentration on a spell, I gain +2 to AC and all saving throws

features.name: Deflecting Shroud
features.description:
When I use my Arcane Deflection feature, magical energy arcs from me
Any creatures of my choice within 10 ft of me take half my level in force damage

features.name: Shadow Arts
features.description: I gain +60 ft Darkvision. I know the Minor Illusion cantrip, using Wis as spellcasting ability.

features.name: Shadow Step
features.description: As a Bonus Action while in Dim Light or Darkness, I can teleport up to 60 ft to an empty spot I can see in Dim Light or Darkness. I then gain Adv. on my next melee attack this turn.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.description:
Whenever I hit a Flurry of Blows attack, I can impose one of the following effects:
 • **Addle**. The target can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of its next turn.
 • **Push**. The target must make a Strength save or be pushed up to 15 ft away from me.
 • **Topple**. The target must make a Dexterity save or have the Prone condition.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.description: As a Bonus Action, I can regain Hit Points equal to my martial die + my Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Fleet Step
features.description: When I take a Bonus Action that's not Step of the Wind, I can also Step of the Wind after.

features.name: Implements of Mercy
features.description: I gain proficiency with Insight, Medicine, and herbalism kit; I have a special Merciful Mask

features.name: Physician's touch
features.description:
Hand of Healing also ends 1 disease, blinded, deafened, paralyzed, poisoned or stunned
Hand of Harm also causes target to be poisoned until the end of my next turn

features.name: Flurry of Healing and Harm
features.description:
I can use Hand of Healing instead of each Flurry of Blows unarmed strike without ki cost
I can use Hand of Harm on one Flurry of Blows unarmed strike without ki cost

features.name: Implements of Mercy
features.description:
I gain proficiency with the herbalism and poisoner's kit, and either Insight or Medicine
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to select the skill proficiency, Insight or Medicine

features.name: Noxious Aura
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can spend 1 ki point to gain a 5-ft radius toxic aura for 1 minute
While active, ranged attacks have disadv. vs. me; It ends if I'm incapacitated or dismiss it
Others who start their turn in it must make a Con save or be poisoned and take damage
They take my Wis mod in poison damage (min 0); Poisoned lasts until my next turn ends

features.name: Healing Technique
features.description: With hands of healing I can also end: 1 disease, blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned

features.name: Shadow Arts
features.description: I know the Minor Illusion cantrip and can cast certain spells by using ki (see page 3)

features.name: Shadow Step
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can teleport from and into dim light or darkness within 60 ft
After I do this, I have adv. on the next melee attack I make before the end of my turn

features.name: Cloak of Shadows
features.description: As an action, I can become invisible in dim light or darkness until I attack/cast

features.name: Opportunist
features.description: As a reaction, if a creature in 5 ft is hit by another, I can make a melee attack vs. it

features.name: Draconic Disciple
features.description:
I learn to speak, read, and write Draconic or one other language of my choice
I can change the damage type of my unarmed strikes to acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison
As a reaction when I fail an Intimidation or Persuasion check, I can reroll the check
If this reroll turns the check into a success, I can't do so again until I finish a long rest

features.name: Wings Unfurled
features.description: When I use Step of the Wind, I can gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed

features.name: Ascendant Aspect
features.description: I gain 10 ft blindsight and both Breath of the Dragon and Aspect of the Wyrm improve

features.name: Draconic Disciple
features.description:
I can change the damage type of my unarmed strikes to acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison
As a reaction when I fail an Intimidation or Persuasion check, I can reroll the check
If this turns it into a success, I can't do so again until I finish a long rest; I learn Draconic

features.name: Wings Unfurled
features.description:
When I use Step of the Wind, I can gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed
I can do this Prof Bonus per long rest, or by using 2 ki points to use Step of the Wind

structuredData.additional: Prof B. / long rest or 1 ki

features.name: Ascendant Aspect
features.description: I gain 30 ft blindsight and both Breath of the Dragon and Aspect of the Wyrm improve

features.name: Arms of the Astral Self
features.description: [1 ki; see 3rd page "Notes"]As a bonus action, I can use my ki to summon the arms of my astral self for 10 minutes

features.name: Visage of the Astral Self
features.description: [1 ki; see 3rd page "Notes"]As a bonus action, I can use my ki to summon the visage of my astral self for 10 minutes

features.name: Body of the Astral Self
features.description:
[see 3rd page "Notes"]When I have both my astral arms and visage summoned, my astral body appears as well
This spectral body covers me like an armor, connecting my astral arms and astral visage

features.name: Awakened Astral Self
features.description: [5 ki; see 3rd page "Notes"]As a bonus action, I can use 5 ki points to summon astral arms and visage with benefits

features.name: Arms of the Astral Self
features.description: My ki mastery allows me to summon portions of my astral self; See 3rd page notes

features.name: Visage of the Astral Self
features.description: I can now also summon the visage of my astral self; See third page notes section

features.name: Awakening of the Astral Self
features.description: While having both astral arms and visage summoned, I gain extra benefits, see 3rd page

features.name: Complete Astral Self
features.description:
I can now also summon the body of my astral self; See third page notes section
This spectral body covers my physique like armor, connecting with the arms and visage

action: Summon Astral Arms and/or Visage, or Complete

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.description: I gain proficiency with the Performance skill and brewer's supplies

features.name: Drunken Technique
features.description: When using Flurry of Blows, I gain the benefits of a Disengage and +10 ft speed this turn

features.name: Tipsy Sway
features.description: 1 ki point: as a reaction if missed in melee, attacker instead hits other I see within 5 ft

structuredData.additional: Standing up from prone costs only 5 ft

features.name: Drunkard's Luck
features.description: By spending 2 ki points, I can remove disadv. from an ability check, attack roll, or save

features.name: Intoxicated Frenzy
features.description: I can make 3 extra attacks with Flurry of Blows if each is used on a different target

features.name: Drunken Technique
features.description:
I gain proficiency with the Performance skill
When using Flurry of Blows, I gain the benefits of a Disengage and +10 ft speed this turn

features.name: Tipsy Sway
features.description: As a reaction when missed in melee, attacker instead hits another I can see within 5 ft

features.name: Drunkard's Luck
features.description: Before I roll for a save, I can spend 1 ki to give myself advantage on it

features.name: Intoxicated Frenzy
features.description: I can make 3 extra attacks with Flurry of Blows if each is used on a different target

features.name: Disciple of the Elements
features.description:
I know Elemental Attunement and additional Elemental Disciplines, depending on level
Use the "Choose Feature" button above to add Elemental Disciplines to the third page
From 5th level onward, I can use additional ki points to increase their spell slot level
I can trade known Elemental Disciplines for others when I gain new ones

extrachoices: Clench of the North Wind (prereq: level 6 monk)
Flames of the Phoenix (prereq: level 11 monk)
Gong of the Summit (prereq: level 6 monk)
River of Hungry Flame (prereq: level 17 monk)
Wave of Rolling Earth (prereq: level 17 monk)

features.name: Path of the Kensei
features.description:
Martial weapons I am proficient with count as kensei weapons for me
With these, I can use Dex instead of Str and use the Martial Arts damage die
As a bonus action, my kensei weapon deal +1d4 bludg. damage for an Attack action

features.name: One with the Blade
features.description: My unarmed strikes and kensei weapon attacks count as magical

features.name: Precise Strike
features.description:
As a bonus action, I can focus my attention on one creature I can see within 30 ft
   This turn, I double my proficiency bonus on my next weapon attack against that mark

features.name: Unerring Accuracy
features.description: On each of my turns, I can reroll one weapon attack roll I make that misses

features.name: Path of the Kensei
features.description:
Some weapons, that don't have the heavy or special property, are kensei weapons for me
At least one ranged and one melee weapon, more at higher levels (longbow does qualify)
With these: proficient, count as a monk weapons, special bonuses while holding them:
 - If I do an unarmed strike during an Attack action, +2 AC until my next turn starts
 - As a bonus action, ranged kensei weapon attacks deal +1d4 damage in current turn

features.name: One with the Blade
features.description: My unarmed strikes and kensei weapon attacks count as magical

features.name: Unerring Accuracy
features.description: Once per turn, if I miss a monk weapon attack on my turn, I can reroll the attack roll

features.name: Touch of Death
features.description: If I reduce someone within 5 ft to 0 HP, I gain Wis mod + monk level temporary HP

features.name: Hour of Reaping
features.description:
As an action, all creatures within 30 feet of me must make a Wisdom saving throw
On a failed save the creature is frightened until the end of my next turn

features.name: Mastery of Death
features.description: When I'm reduced to 0 HP, I can expend 1 ki point to have 1 HP instead

features.name: Hand Technique
features.description:
Whenever I hit a creature with a Flurry of Blows attack I can do one of the following:
• Have it make a Dexterity save or be knocked prone
• Have it make a Strength save or be pushed up to 15 ft away from me
• Stop it from taking reactions until the end of my next turn

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.description: As an action, I regain hit points equal to three times my monk level

features.name: Tranquility
features.description: After a long rest, I gain the effect of a Sanctuary spell until a next long rest

features.name: Radiant Sun Bolt
features.description:
I gain a ranged spell attack that I can use as an attack in the Attack action
If I do this and spend 1 ki point, I can make 2 of these attacks as a bonus action

features.name: Searing Sunburst
features.description:
As an action, anyone in a 20-ft radius light on a point within 150 ft makes a Con save
If failed and not behind opaque total cover, take 2d6 (+ 2d6/ki point) radiant damage

features.name: Sun Shield
features.description:
As a reaction, when I'm hit by a melee attack, I can deal 5 + Wis mod radiant damage
I can only do this while my light aura is on; I can turn it on/off as a bonus action

features.name: Healing Hands
features.description:
As an action, I use points to heal living creature; or 5 points to cure one poison/disease
With Flurry of Blows, I can replace one unarmed strike with a use of this feature

features.name: Path of Tranquility
features.description: I cast Sanctuary on me, no material comp., lasts 8 hours, hostiles must save every hour

features.name: Emissary of Peace
features.description:
[Performance or Persuasion prof]
   I get adv. on Cha checks to calm or counsel peace; not with Deception or Intimidation

structuredData.skillstxt: Choose one from: Performance or Persuasion

features.name: Anger of a Gentle Soul
features.description: As a reaction if another I see goes to 0 HP, I get bonus damage until my next turn ends

features.name: Tides of Chaos
features.description:
I can gain advantage on either one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw
After I cast a 1st-level or higher sorcerer spell, the DM can impose a Wild Magic Surge
After I roll on the Wild Magic Surge table, I regain my use of Tides of Chaos

features.name: Wild Magic Surge
features.description:
Wild Magic Surges can happen 5% of the time that I cast a sorcerer spell
This doesn't happen with cantrips and I only take this chance if the DM tells me to
Metamagic can't affect spells cast because of the surge, but they require no concentration
"See the "Notes" page for the table"

features.name: Bend Luck
features.description: As a reaction, I can add/subtract 1d4 from another's attack roll, ability check, or save

features.name: Controlled Chaos
features.description: Whenever I roll on the Wild Magic Surge table, I can roll twice and use either result

features.name: Spell Bombardment
features.description:
Once per turn, when I roll spell damage, I can take one damage die that rolled max
I can then roll this die again and add it to the spell's damage

species.name: Aarakocra
species.traits:
Aarakocra (+2 Dexterity, +1 Wisdom)

Flight: I have a flying speed of 50 feet. To use this speed, I can't be wearing medium or heavy armor.

Talons: My unarmed strikes deal 1d4 slashing damage on a hit.

species.name: Aasimar
species.traits:
Aasimar (+1 Wisdom, +2 Charisma)

Celestial Legacy:
   I know the Light cantrip.
   Once I reach 3rd level, I can cast the Lesser Restoration spell once per long rest.
   Once I reach 5th level, I can cast the Daylight spell once per long rest.
   Charisma is my spellcasting ability for these spells.

species.name: Aasimar Revenant
species.traits:
Aasimar Revenant (+1 Constitution, +2 Charisma) Light Bearer: I know the Light cantrip. Healing Hands: As an action, once per long rest, I can touch to heal for my level in HP.
Relentless Nature: I have returned to life with one goal: avenge my death or finish an unresolved task. I will rest once I fulfill my goal, but until then I can't truly die. Whenever I'm below half my max HP at the start of my turn, I regain 1 HP. If I die, I return to life within 24 hours. If my body was destroyed, it is reformed within 1 mile of where I died. I always know the distance and direction to creatures involved with my goal.

species.name: Abyssal tiefling
species.traits:
Abyssal Tiefling (+1 Constitution, +2 Charisma)
Abyssal Fortitude: My HP maximum increases with half the levels I have (min 1). Abyssal Arcana: After each long rest I gain randomly determined spellcasting ability (d6). This is a cantrip, and on both 3rd and 5th level a spell that I can cast once, at 2nd-level.
1: (Dancing Lights, Burning Hands, Alter Self); 2: (True Strike, Charm Person, Darkness); 3: (Light, Magic Missile, Invisibility); 4: (Spare the Dying, Hideous Laughter, Mirror Image); 5: (Message, Cure Wounds, Levitate); 6: (Prestidigitation, Thunderwave, Spider Climb)

species.name: Aereni high elf
species.traits: Aereni

species.name: Aereni wood elf
species.traits:
Aereni Wood Elf (+2 Dexterity, +1 Wisdom)
Trance: Elves don't need to sleep, but meditate semiconsciously, for 4 hours a day. While meditating, I can dream after a fashion; such dreams are actually mental exercises that have become reflexive through years of practice. After resting in this way, I gain the same benefit that a human does from 8 hours of sleep, thus needing only 4 hours for a long rest.
Mask of the Wild: I can attempt to hide even when I am only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, and other natural phenomena.

species.name: Air genasi
species.traits:
Air Genasi (+1 Dexterity, +2 Constitution)

Unending Breath: I can hold my breath indefinitely while I am not incapacitated.

Mingle with the Wind: I can cast the Levitate spell once with this trait, requiring no material components, and I regain the ability to cast it this way when I finish a long rest. Constitution is my spellcasting ability for this spell.

species.name: Amethyst gem dragonborn
species.traits:
Amethyst gem dragonbornForce Breath Weapon: When I take the Attack action on my turn, I can replace one attack with a breath weapon that deals 1d10 force damage to all in a 15-ft cone, Dex save halves (DC 8 + Con mod + Prof Bonus). I can do this my Prof. Bonus per long rest.
Psionic Mind: I can telepathically message a creature with a language I can see in 30 ft.
Gem Flight: From 5th level, I can manifest spectral wings. As a bonus action once per long rest, I can gain, for 1 minute, a flying speed equal to my walking speed and can hover.

species.name: Amethyst gem dragonborn
species.traits:
Amethyst gem dragonbornForce Breath Weapon: When I take the Attack action, I can replace one attack with a breath weapon that deals 2d8 force damage to all in a 15-ft cone, Dex save halves (DC 8 + Con mod + Proficiency Bonus). I can do this my Proficiency Bonus per long rest.
Psionic Mind: I can speak telepathically to a creature with a language I can see in 30 ft.
Gem Flight: From 3rd level, I can temporarily fly. As a bonus action once per long rest, I can gain a flying speed equal to my walking speed and can hover. This lasts for 1 minute.

species.name: Astral elf
species.traits:
Astral Elf (my creature type is humanoid, elf)
 • Starlight Step: A number of times per long rest equal to my proficiency bonus, as a bonus action, I can magically teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space I can see.
 • Astral Trance: I don't need to sleep, and magic can't put me to sleep. I can finish a long rest in 4 hours if I spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which I remain conscious. Whenever I finish this trance, I gain proficiency with one skill, and one weapon or tool of my choice. They last until I finish my next long rest.

species.name: Astral elf
species.traits:
Astral Elf
 • Radiant Soul: Once per short rest when I succeed on a death save, I can regain HP equal to my proficiency bonus + my Int, Wis, or Cha mod (choose when selecting this race).
 • Trance: I don't need to sleep, and magic can't put me to sleep. I can finish a long rest in 4 hours if I spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which I remain conscious.
 • Trance Proficiencies. Whenever I finish a long rest using Trance, I gain two proficiencies, each one with a weapon or a tool of my choice. They last until I finish my next long rest.

species.name: Autognome
species.traits:
Autognome (my creature type is Construct; I don't need to eat, drink or breathe)
 • Armored Casing: While I'm not wearing armor, my AC is 13 + my Dexterity modifier.
 • Built for Success: For my Prof B. per long rest, I can add +1d4 to an attack, check, or save. I can do this after seeing the d20 roll, but before knowing the roll's effects.
 • Sentry's Rest: I only need 6 hours to finish a long rest if I stay inactive and motionless.
 • Healing Machine: Cure Wounds, Healing Word, and Spare the Dying work on me. If Mending is cast on me, I can expend one HD like during a short rest to regain hit points.

species.name: Autognome
species.traits:
Autognome (type is Construct; Cure Wounds, Healing Word, Spare the Dying work on me)
 • Armored Casing: While I'm not wearing armor, my AC is 13 + my Dexterity modifier.
 • Built for Success: For my Prof B. per long rest, I can add +1d4 to an attack, check, or save. I can do this after seeing the d20 roll, but before knowing the roll's effects.
 • Mechanical Nature: I have immunities/resistances and don't need to eat, drink or breathe
 • Sentry's Rest: I only need 6 hours to finish a long rest if I stay inactive and motionless.
 • True Life: If Mending is cast on me, I can expend one HD like during a short rest.

species.name: Avariel
species.traits:
Avariel (+2 Dexterity)
Trance: Elves don't need to sleep, but meditate semiconsciously, for 4 hours a day. While meditating, I can dream after a fashion; such dreams are actually mental exercises that have become reflexive through years of practice. After resting in this way, I gain the same benefit that a human does from 8 hours of sleep, thus needing only 4 hours for a long rest.
Flight: I have a flying speed of 30 feet. To use this speed, I can't be wearing medium or heavy armor.

species.name: Baalzebul tiefling
species.traits:
Baalzebul Tiefling (+1 Intelligence, +2 Charisma)

Legacy of Maladomini:
   I know the Thaumaturgy cantrip.
   At 3rd level, I can cast Ray of Sickness once per long rest as a 2nd-level spell.
   At 5th level, I can also cast Crown of Madness once per long rest.
   Charisma is my spellcasting ability for these spells.

species.name: Beasthide shifter
species.traits:
Beasthide Shifter (+1 Strength, +2 Constitution)

Shifting: As a bonus action once per short rest, I can assume a more bestial appearance.
This transformation lasts for 1 minute, until I die, or until I revert back as a bonus action.
When I shift, I gain temporary HP equal to 1d6 + my level + my Constitution modifier (minimum 1 temporary hit point).
While transformed like this, I have a +1 bonus to AC.

species.name: Beasthide shifter
species.traits:
Beasthide Shifter: (+1 Dexterity, +2 Constitution)

Shifting: As a bonus action once per short rest, I can assume a more bestial appearance.
This transformation lasts for 1 minute, until I die, or until I revert back as a bonus action.
When I shift, I gain temporary HP equal to 1d6 + my level + my Constitution modifier (minimum 1 temporary hit point).
While transformed like this, I have a +1 bonus to AC

species.name: Beasthide shifter
species.traits:
Beasthide Shifter (+1 Dexterity, +1 Constitution)
Shifting:
   On my turn, I can shift as a bonus action. Shifting lasts for 1 minute or until I end it on my turn as a bonus action. I must finish a short rest before I can shift again.
   While shifted, I gain temporary hit points equal to my level + my Constitution modifier (minimum of 1) and I gain a +1 bonus to my AC.

species.name: Black chromatic dragonborn
species.traits:
Black chromatic dragonbornAcid Breath Weapon: When I take the Attack action on my turn, I can replace one attack with a breath weapon that deals 1d10 acid damage to all in a 5-ft by 30-ft line, Dex save halves (DC 8 + Con mod + Proficiency Bonus). I can do this my Proficiency Bonus per long rest. The damage increases with +1d10 at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.
Chromatic Warding: From 5th level, I can protect myself using my draconic energies. As an action once per long rest, I can become immune to acid damage for 1 minute.

species.name: Black chromatic dragonborn
species.traits:
Black chromatic dragonbornAcid Breath Weapon: When I take the Attack action, I can replace one attack with a breath weapon that deals 2d8 acid damage to all in a 5-ft by 30-ft line, Dex save halves (DC 8 + Con mod + Proficiency Bonus). I can do this my Proficiency Bonus per long rest. The damage increases to 3d8 at 5th level, 4d8 at 11th level, and 5d8 at 17th level.
Chromatic Warding: From 3rd level, I can protect myself using my draconic energies. As an action once per long rest, I can become immune to acid damage for 10 minutes.

I determine the specifics of the form like hair length, eye color, and sex. I can adjust my height and weight, but not so much that my size changes. I revert back when I die. I can make myself appear as a member of another race, though none of my game statistics change.

species.name: Dragonborn Revenant
species.traits:
Dragonborn Revenant (+1 Strength, +1 Constitution, +1 Charisma)
Breath Weapon: As an action, 5 ft by 30 ft line, Dex save halves, necrotic damage.
Relentless Nature: I have returned to life with one goal: avenge my death or finish an unresolved task. I will rest once I fulfill my goal, but until then I can't truly die. Whenever I'm below half my max HP at the start of my turn, I regain 1 HP. If I die, I return to life within 24 hours. If my body was destroyed, it is reformed within 1 mile of where I died. I always know the distance and direction to creatures involved with my goal.

species.name: Drow
species.traits:
Drow (+2 Dexterity, +1 Charisma)
Trance: Elves don't need to sleep, but meditate semiconsciously, for 4 hours a day. This gives the same benefit as a human gets from 8 hours of sleep (long rest takes only 4 hours).
Sunlight Sensitivity: Disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight when I or what I am trying to attack/perceive is in direct sunlight.
Drow Magic: 1st level: Dancing Lights cantrip; 3rd level: Faerie Fire; 5th level: Darkness. Both spells can be used once per long rest. Charisma is my spellcasting ability for these.

species.name: Duergar

Duergar (+2 Constitution, +1 Strength)

Duergar Magic: 3rd: Enlarge/Reduce to enlarge; 5th: Invisibility. If not in direct sunlight,
I can cast both spells on myself once per long rest without material components, using Int.

- Wards and Seals: I can cast Alarm and Mage Armor each once per long rest. At 3rd level, I can also cast Arcane Lock once per long rest. Intelligence is my spellcasting ability for these and none of them require material components.
- Spells of the Mark: I add several spells to my class' spell list(s).

species.name: Eladrin
species.traits:
Eladrin (+2 Dexterity, +1 Intelligence)
Trance: Elves don't need to sleep, but meditate semiconsciously, for 4 hours a day. While meditating, I can dream after a fashion; such dreams are actually mental exercises that have become reflexive through years of practice. After resting in this way, I gain the same benefit that a human does from 8 hours of sleep, thus needing only 4 hours for a long rest.
Fey Step: I can cast the Misty Step spell once using this trait. I regain the ability to do so when I finish a short rest.

Shifting Seasons: After I finish a long rest, I can align myself with a season of my choice.
